name: Warhammer 40,000 - 11th Edition
provenance: Community-derived dataset, compiled and quality-checked by the community and provided for personal use. Warhammer 40,000 and all unit/faction names, rules, and points values are the intellectual property of Games Workshop. This is an unofficial, fan-made compilation - not affiliated with, licensed by, or endorsed by Games Workshop.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Eye of Tzeentch
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Orbs of Unlife
enhancements.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Intoxicating Elixir
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Warmaster's Gift
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

enhancements.name: Eager for Vengeance
enhancements.desc: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

enhancements.name: Eye of Abaddon
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Mark of Legend
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Falsehood
enhancements.desc: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

enhancements.name: Cursed Fang
enhancements.desc: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Soul Link
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

enhancements.name: Despot's Claim
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Dread Reaver
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Hound
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Tyrant's Lash
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Willbreaker
enhancements.desc: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Night's Shroud
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Forge's Blessing
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Eater of Dread
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Bastion Plate
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Ironbound Enmity
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Warp Tracer
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

enhancements.name: Iron Artifice
enhancements.desc: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Goad
enhancements.desc: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

enhancements.name: Cultist's Brand
enhancements.desc: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Warped Foresight
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.desc: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
enhancements.desc: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

enhancements.name: Soul Harvester
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Tempting Addendum
enhancements.desc:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Surgical Precision
enhancements.desc: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Living Carapace
enhancements.desc: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Helm of All-Seeing
enhancements.desc: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Prime Test Subject
enhancements.desc: **^^Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** model (excluding **^^Damned^^** models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Touched by the Warp
enhancements.desc: The bearer gains the ^^**Psyker^^** keyword.

enhancements.name: Eye of Z'Desh
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Mind Blade
enhancements.desc: Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Infernal Avatar
enhancements.desc: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Greyveil Hex
enhancements.desc:
Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
enhancements.desc:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

enhancements.name: Terrorglut Parasite
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Voice of the Tyrant
enhancements.desc: The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Raid Leader
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a ^^**Transport**^^ that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Dread Reputation
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6” of the bearer’s unit (or within 12” if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Eager for Bloodshed
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Weaponised Hatred
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Hunter
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Fratricidal Trophies
enhancements.desc: In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Empyric Symbiote
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Infernal Fulgurite
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Warp
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Akshur's Binding Runes
enhancements.desc: The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Tzagulla
enhancements.desc: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Wyredjinn
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Cybinfernal Font
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer’s unit have the ^^**Soul Forge**^^ keyword.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Crown of Worms
enhancements.desc: Add 3” to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.

abilities.name: The Warmaster
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one Warmaster ability. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Dark Destiny
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 7+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ CHOSEN

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

subAbilities.name: Paragon of Hatred (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding DAMNED units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

subAbilities.name: Mark of Chaos Ascendant (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit (excluding DAMNED units) is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

subAbilities.name: Lord of the Traitor Legions (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding DAMNED units) is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Leadership and Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ RAPTORS

abilities.name: Head Taker
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6 for each model in this model’s unit which is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Herald of the Apocalypse (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if that enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test. This ability cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

- ^^**Chaos Terminator Squad^^** 
- ^^**Legionaries^^**

abilities.name: Lord of Badab (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry**^^ unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and ^^**Damned**^^ units) is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Hamadrya’s Knowledge (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

default.name: Tyrant's Claw and exalted power weapon

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Dark Blessing (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in that unit, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Ascended Daemon
abilities.desc: Each time this model shoot or fights, while resolving those attacks, you can re-roll one Hit roll and you can re-roll one Wound roll.

abilities.name: Lord of Chaos
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Daemonic Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Enhanced Warriors
abilities.desc: If this unit is attached to a unit at the start of the battle, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Bodyguard models in that unit and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of Bodyguard models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader

■ CHOSEN
■ CULTIST MOB
■ LEGIONARIES

abilities.name: Surgeon Acolyte
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, if this unit contains ^^**Fabius Bile**^^, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Chirurgeon
abilities.desc: The first time this unit’s ^^**Fabius Bile^^** model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set it back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with its full wounds remaining. If that model was attached to a unit when it was destroyed, it must be set up attached to that unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Agent of Discord (Aura)
abilities.desc: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that would increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

abilities.name: Guns Blazing
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attacks that targets a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
