abilities.name: Cursed Flames
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must make a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CULTIST MOB

mark.name: Khorne
mark.ability: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

mark.name: Nurgle
mark.ability: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

mark.name: Slaanesh
mark.ability: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

mark.name: Tzeentch
mark.ability: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Visions of Suffering (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER UNIT unit from your army with the Leader ability (excluding EPIC HEROES) can be attached to a LEGIONARIES unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

wargearAbilities.name: Voice eater
wargearAbilities.desc: Enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) cannot be targeted with Stratagems while they are within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit.

mark.name: Khorne
mark.ability: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

mark.name: Nurgle
mark.ability: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

mark.name: Slaanesh
mark.ability: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

mark.name: Tzeentch
mark.ability: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Fleet Command
abilities.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, if this unit is on the battlefield (or any ^^**Transport**^^ it is embarked within is on the battlefield) select up to three ^^**Heretic Astartes**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Plunder
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of it and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Masters of the Maelstrom
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one of the following units. This unit then counts as part of that unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.
- ^^**Chosen, Legionaries, Red Corsairs Raiders**^^


This unit cannot join an Attached unit, and only ^^**Huron Blackheart**^^ can join a unit this unit has joined.

abilities.name: Trophy Takers
abilities.desc: The first time this unit destroys an enemy unit, until the end of the battle, while this unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a ^^**Character**^^ unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Legionaries**^^ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

models.name: Red Corsairs Raider w/ power fist
Red Corsairs Raider w/ power fist and meltagun

mark.name: Khorne
mark.ability: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

mark.name: Nurgle
mark.ability: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

mark.name: Slaanesh
mark.ability: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

mark.name: Tzeentch
mark.ability: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brutal Raider
abilities.desc: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Raider's Due
abilities.desc: Each time this unit declares a Charge that targets one or more units that are within range of one or more objective markers, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chosen, Legionaries, Red Corsairs Raiders**^^

mark.name: Khorne
mark.ability: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

mark.name: Nurgle
mark.ability: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

mark.name: Slaanesh
mark.ability: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

mark.name: Tzeentch
mark.ability: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Headlong Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Architect of Ruin
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle, select one unit in your opponent’s army to be this model’s hated foe. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its hated foe, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s hated foe is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its hated foe.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chaos Terminator Squad, Mutilators, Obliterators.**^^

detData._format: Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Rebuild with build.ps1 after editing.

stratagems.name: Example Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase
stratagems.target: One unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: What the stratagem does.

Pactbound Zealots.rule:
When mustering, each non-EPIC HERO HERETIC ASTARTES unit must be given a Mark keyword (Khorne, Tzeentch, Nurgle, Slaanesh, or Chaos Undivided). Each time a marked unit gains a weapon ability from a Dark Pact and does not fail the Leadership test, until the end of the phase it also gains the associated ability:
If it gained [LETHAL HITS] — Khorne: melee Critical Hit on unmodified 5+. Tzeentch: ranged Critical Hit on 5+. Chaos Undivided: re-roll Hit rolls of 1.
If it gained [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — Nurgle: ranged Critical Hit on 5+. Slaanesh: melee Critical Hit on 5+. Chaos Undivided: re-roll Hit rolls of 1.
Restrictions: cannot pick Khorne for a Psyker; a Character can only attach to a unit sharing its Mark; a unit can only embark in a Transport sharing its Mark.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Gods
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding DAMNED, DAEMON and EPIC HERO units) destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER model in that unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Move, Toughness and Wounds characteristics of that CHARACTER model, and add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of that model's melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Eternal Hate
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6 (add 1 if it is a KHORNE unit): on a 4+, do not remove it; it can fight after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Profane Zeal
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHAOS UNDIVIDED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wound rolls. Chaos Undivided unit, not selected to shoot/fight this phase.

stratagems.name: Skinshift
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit is a TZEENTCH unit below its Starting Strength, one destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Torpefying Refrain
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a SLAANESH unit, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Festering Miasma
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. If your unit is a NURGLE unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Veterans of the Long War.rule: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army (excluding DAMNED models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Endless Ire
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your focus of hatred is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is considered to be your focus of hatred.

stratagems.name: Black Crusade
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using this ability.

stratagems.name: Contemptuous Disregard
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

defBuff.note: Worsen incoming AP by 1 (Armour of Contempt).

stratagems.name: Let the Galaxy Burn
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding TZEENTCH units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and change the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit to 6.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover for ranged. Torrent Attacks become 6 (not modelled).

stratagems.name: Bringers of Despair
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within Engagement Range of your focus of hatred.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Millennia of Experience
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Deceptors.rule:
In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select a number of LEGIONARIES and CULTIST MOB units from your army; until the end of the battle, those units, and any CHARACTER units attached to them (excluding EPIC HEROES), have the Infiltrators ability. The maximum number of units you can select depends on battle size:
Incursion — up to 2 Legionaries and up to 2 Cultist Mobs
Strike Force — up to 3 Legionaries and up to 3 Cultist Mobs
Onslaught — up to 4 Legionaries and up to 4 Cultist Mobs

stratagems.name: Detonator
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding TITANIC models) is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).

stratagems.name: Coils of Deception
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: From All Sides
stratagems.when: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit for each other HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this phase (to a maximum of +3).

stratagems.name: Relentless Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Pick Them Off
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Scrambled Coordinates
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.

Renegade Raiders.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Unfailingly Obdurate
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Warpcharged Engines
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TRANSPORT or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Scour and Seize
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Ruinous Raid
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit AND Wound â€” only when targeting a unit within range of an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Opportunistic Raiders
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6", or up to 12" if it is a MOUNTED unit. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a TRANSPORT at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.

stratagems.name: Reavers' Haste
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If you select one or more units within range of an objective marker as a target of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

Dread Talons.rule: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from the result. Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Depthless Cruelty
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP â€” only vs Battle-shocked OR Below Half-strength targets.

stratagems.name: Bloody Example
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit AND Wound â€” only vs Battle-shocked OR Below Half-strength targets.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Screaming Descent
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Merciless Pursuit
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase, but can only select that enemy unit as the target (and only if it is an eligible target). Even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

Fellhammer Siege-host.rule: Each time a ranged attack targets a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Persistent Assailants
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks this phase and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit is Below Half-strength you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits. Also re-roll Wounds if your unit is Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Brutal Attrition
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack is allocated to your unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Cannonade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: Critical Hit on 5+ â€” only vs Below Half-strength targets.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit's ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Steadfast Determination
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

defBuff.note: Feel No Pain 5+ (your opponent's Shooting phase).

stratagems.name: Siegecraft
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

Chaos Cult.rule: Each time a DAMNED unit from your army with the Dark Pacts ability is selected to make a Normal or Advance move or declare a charge (excluding units that arrived from Reserves this turn), it can make a Desperate Pact: until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Move characteristic of its models and add 2 to Charge rolls made for it. Desperate Pacts: each time a unit makes a Desperate Pact it must first take a Leadership test; if failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds before the Desperate Pact's effects are resolved. In addition, TRAITOR GUARDSMEN SQUAD units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Chosen for Glory
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if the unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Selfless Demise
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

stratagems.name: Infernal Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (in addition to any from failing the Leadership test), and until the end of the phase add 1 to the Attacks of its melee weapons; if it did not fail the Leadership test, improve the Strength of those weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Crazed Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration by 1, and if it did not fail the Leadership test, improve the Strength by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Reckless Haste
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Mortal Thralls
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army selected as a target, and one friendly DAMNED unit within 3" of it and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while your DAMNED unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack targeting your HERETIC ASTARTES unit, if the DAMNED unit is visible to the attacker and an eligible target, no roll is made; instead the DAMNED unit suffers mortal wounds equal to the attack's Damage.

Soulforged Warpack.rule: Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army makes a Dark Pact, it can invoke its contract. If it does, subtract 1 from the resulting Leadership test, and until the end of the phase: each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll; and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Desperate Pledge
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Glut of Souls
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wounds).

stratagems.name: Daemonic Possession
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding DAEMON units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, your unit has the DAEMON keyword.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Rampage
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

stratagems.name: Predatory Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Feeding Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of your units Falls Back, all models in that unit must take a Desperate Escape test; if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Creations of Bile.rule:
At the start of the battle, select which augmentations are active for HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY models (excluding DAMNED) from your army until the end of the battle: either select one, or randomly determine two by rolling 2D6 (if FABIUS BILE is your WARLORD you can re-roll one or both dice). Duplicates have no additional effect.
1 Cholinergic Accelerants: +1 Attack to this model's melee weapons.
2 Hyperadrenal Infusion: +2" Move.
3 Paraneural Reactions: improve this model's melee Weapon Skill by 1.
4 Supracutaneous Chitination: +1 Toughness.
5 Macrotensile Sinews: +1 Strength to this model's melee weapons.
6 Ophthalmic Enhancement: improve this model's ranged Ballistic Skill by 1.

stratagems.name: Monstrous Visages
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Masters Are Watching
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6 (subtract 1 if a DAMNED unit): on a 4+, do not remove it; it can fight after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Specimens for the Spider
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack targeting a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. After your unit fights, if one or more enemy CHARACTERS were destroyed, select one enemy unit within 6"; it takes a Battle-shock test. If the enemy WARLORD was destroyed, each enemy unit within 6" takes a Battle-shock test instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wound â€” only vs CHARACTER targets.

stratagems.name: Delayed Mutations
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations); until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have it in addition to any others.

stratagems.name: Diabolic Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: One destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) are returned instead.

stratagems.name: Autostimulants
stratagems.when: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Cabal of Chaos.rule:
Each time a unit from your army makes a Dark Pact, select one of the following abilities for that unit until the end of the phase:
Leaping Warpflame — while within 9" of one or more friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER models, improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
Monstrous Manifestation — while within 9" of one or more friendly HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE (or DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS) models, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Baleful Blessing
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army has a mortal wound allocated to it.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: No Rest in Death
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army within 9" of a HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER, DAEMON PRINCE or DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds. If your unit is BATTLELINE, instead return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) with their full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Mutation's Curse
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Roll one D6: on a 1, 1 mortal wound; on a 2-4, D3 mortal wounds; on a 5-6, 2D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Soulseekers
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover for ranged.

stratagems.name: Unholy Haste
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Shroud of Chaos
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER, DAEMON PRINCE or DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has Shroud of Chaos (Aura): models in friendly HERETIC ASTARTES units within 6" of this unit have the Stealth ability.

Nightmare Hunt.rule: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army, that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result (and does not take any other Battle-shock tests that phase). Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack targeting a Below Half-strength unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each time an attack targets a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army, if the attacking model is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack targeting a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Talons Sunk Deep
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Prey on the Weak
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Sadistic Display
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of and visible to your unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Malicious Surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Horrific Incursion
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: it must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Huron\u0027s Marauders.rule:
In your Command phase, select one of the following abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, each HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army has that ability. At the start of each phase, if such a unit is visible to a friendly Huron Blackheart model, until the end of the phase it has both:
Huron's Elite — each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
Mobile Marauders — this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Hardened Killers
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one: improve the Ballistic Skill of ranged weapons by 1; or improve the Attacks of Rapid Fire weapons by 1; or improve the Save characteristic by 1. Until the start of your next turn, your unit has that benefit.

stratagems.name: At the Tyrant's Command
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Seize the Prize
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army has been selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Do not make an Advance roll for your unit. Instead, until the end of the phase add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Reavers' Flurry
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

mathBuff.note: +1 Attacks on melee weapons.

stratagems.name: To the Favoured the Spoils
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move: roll one D6; models move up to that many inches, but must end as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT), and can move within Engagement Range of it.

stratagems.name: Encircling Surge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Renegade Warband.rule:
HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army lose the Dark Pacts ability. Ranged weapons equipped by HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. You cannot use the Cults of the Dark Gods rule.
Vendetta: At the start of your Command phase, select one enemy unit as your Vendetta target until your next Command phase; each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army (excluding DAMNED) makes an attack targeting it, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
Twisted Doctrine: In your Movement phase, each time you set up or select a HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding Battle-shocked units) to move, it can Default to Doctrine: it first takes a Battle-shock test, then select one — until end of turn, eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn it Fell Back; or eligible to declare a charge in a turn it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Never Outgunned
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.effect: Select either [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: Pick [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] â€” this toggle assumes LETHAL HITS. (Toggle Sustained via Dark Pact Sustained for the other half.)

stratagems.name: Vengeful Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY (excluding DAMNED units) or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound â€” only vs your Vendetta target.

stratagems.name: Undying Hatred
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it; it can fight after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Renegade Claim
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Corrupted Munitions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP for ranged.

stratagems.name: Reavers' Reaction
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Warpstrike Champions.rule: At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS and MUTILATORS units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units); remove them from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Maximum units by battle size: Incursion 1, Strike Force 2, Onslaught 3.

stratagems.name: Empyric Dislocation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1. (Cannot target the same unit with Empyric Dislocation and Armour of Corruption in the same phase.)

stratagems.name: Armour of Corruption
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. (Cannot target the same unit with Armour of Corruption and Empyric Dislocation in the same phase.)

defBuff.note: -1 to the Damage of each attack (Fight phase).

stratagems.name: Warp Flicker
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Warp-Tainted
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Siegebreaker Strike
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army that were set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover for ranged. Up to two Deep-Striking units.

stratagems.name: Portal of Spite
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets, add 2 to the Charge roll.

Cult of the Arkifane.rule: HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE units from your army gain the DAEMON keyword. HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE, LORD DISCORDANT and VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE units from your army gain the SOUL FORGE keyword. SOUL FORGE units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Touch of the Arkifane
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit is selected to make a Dark Pact, you can select both abilities for that unit's weapons to gain.

stratagems.name: Balefire Boon
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP for the unit. SOUL FORGE unit only.

stratagems.name: Soul-Tally Offering
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wound â€” only vs CHARACTER/MONSTER/VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Biomechanoid Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, one model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Forge-Fire Surge
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

stratagems.name: Unholy Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

enhancements.name: Death Mask of Ollanius
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. While the bearer’s unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, instead of changing it to 0

enhancements.name: Drill Commander
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, if that unit Remained Stationary this turn, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

enhancements.name: Reactive Command
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. Each time an enemy unit is set up within 9" of the bearer's unit, the bearer can issue one Order. This is not counted towards the number of Orders the bearer can issue each battle round.

enhancements.name: Grand Strategist
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. In your Command phase, the bearer can issue one additional Order.

enhancements.name: Bombast-class Vox-array
enhancements.desc: **^^Militarum Tempestus Officer^^** model only. Each time the bearer issues an Order, if the bearer’s unit contains one or more models equipped with a master vox, it can issue that Order to up to three different **^^Regiment^^** units, instead of only one.

enhancements.name: Priority-drop Beacon
enhancements.desc: **^^Militarum Tempestus Officer^^** model only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Advance Augury
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Regiment^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in 1 Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Shroud Projector
enhancements.desc: **^^Militarum Tempestus Officer^^** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Eager Advance
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a **^^Regiment^^** unit, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Flash Grenades
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Stalwart's Honours
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, when that unit is issued an Order, it is also affected by the Take Cover! Order.

enhancements.name: Legacy Sidearm
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer's Pistols.

enhancements.name: Bold Leadership
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer's unit (or any **^^Transport^^** it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

enhancements.name: Sacred Unguents
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Tech-Priest Enginseer^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one **^^Transport^^** from your army (excluding **^^Aircraft^^** and **^^Titanic^^** units) within 3" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that **^^Transport^^** makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Honours
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. The bearer's unit can disembark from a **^^Transport^^** after it has Advanced. If it does, it counts as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

enhancements.name: Smoke Grenades
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. The bearer's unit has the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability while the bearer's unit is wholly within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Transport^^** models.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Steed
enhancements.desc: **^^Vehicle Officer^^** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Calm Under Fire
enhancements.desc: **^^Vehicle Officer^^** model only. Once per turn, after the bearer issues an Order to a **^^Squadron^^** unit from your army, it can issue the same Order to another **^^Squadron^^** unit from your army.

enhancements.name: Veteran Crew
enhancements.desc: **^^Vehicle Officer^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Regimental Banner
enhancements.desc: **^^Vehicle Officer^^** model only. Add 3 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Guerrilla Honours
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Scare Gas Grenades
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8" of the bearer's unit (excluding **^^Monster^^** and **^^Vehicle^^** units); that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Tripwires
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model only. Each time an enemy **^^Infantry^^** or **^^Mounted^^** unit ends a Normal, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer's unit, roll a D6; on a 4+, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Survival Gear
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Abhuman Detail
enhancements.desc:
**^^Commissar^^** model only. Add the **^^Ogryn^^** keyword to the list of units this model can issue Orders too (as stated on its datasheet).

In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to an **^^Ogryn Squad^^** or **^^Bullgryn squad^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Aquilan Eye
enhancements.desc:
**^^Astra Militarum Officer^^** model only. Each time you select an Order for the bearer to issue, you can select the Order below:

**Target Weak Spot (Order):** Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Laud Hailer
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Officer^^** model only. Each time you select a unit for this **^^Officer^^** model to issue an Order to, that unit can be within 12" instead of within 6".

enhancements.name: Spec Ops Veteran
enhancements.desc:
**^^Astra Militarum Infantry Officer^^** model only. Each time you select an Order for the bearer to issue, you can select the Order below:

**Move to the Shadows (Order):** Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, until those attacks are resolved, models in this unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Rigged Blind Grenades
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, when an enemy unit opens a Hatchway, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit is Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Shipboard Veteran
enhancements.desc: Each time you target an **^^Astra Militarum^^** unit from your army with a Stratagem, if that unit is visible to the bearer, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Covert Breach
enhancements.desc: At the start of the first battle round, the bearer's unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Elimination Force
enhancements.desc: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the Toughness characteristic of that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Battalion Commander
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Titanic Character^^** model only. The bearer has the Voice of Command ability and the **^^Officer^^** keyword, and can issue up to 2 Orders to **^^Astra Militarum Titanic^^** and **^^Squadron^^** units.

enhancements.name: Titan Killer
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Titanic Character^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

enhancements.name: Assault Hatches
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Titanic Character Transport^^** model only. Each time a unit disembarks from the bearer after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Engine Speaker
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Tech‑Priest Enginseer^^** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Omnissiah’s Blessing ability, until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of the selected Vehicle model.

enhancements.name: Omnissian Unguents (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Astra Militarum Tech‑Priest Enginseer^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Armoured Skirmisher^^** unit is within 3" of the bearer, that unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Grand Strategist
enhancements.desc: **^^Officer^^** model only. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Exemplary Officer
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. Each time the bearer issues an Order to its own unit, you can select up to two other **^^Platoon^^** units within 3" of the bearer’s unit. That Order is also issued to each of those units.

enhancements.name: Master Manoeuvrist
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Officer^^** model only. All of the sections that have been set up are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.

subAbilities.name: Counterstrategist
subAbilities.desc:
At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up or ended a move within 9" of this model, and one friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 6" of and visible to this model that has not made a Normal move or been targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem this phase. That **^^Regiment^^**unit can then either:
- Make a Normal move of up to D6".
- Shoot at that enemy unit, but only if it is an eligible target. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon’s Ballistic Skill or any modifiers.
- Make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in that unit move a number of inches up to the result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding **^^Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. That unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle‑shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.
