At the end of every phase, If an enemy unit is within 1" of a Vox‑relay Beacon token you set up, that token is removed from the battlefield.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Fill from your rulebook; rebuild with build.ps1.

Combined Arms.rule:
Each time a model in a REGIMENT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Each time a model in a SQUADRON unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Action
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit from your army and one SQUADRON unit from your army within 6" of and visible to that REGIMENT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Orders affecting one of your units affect the other, and vice versa.

stratagems.name: Reinforcements!
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with all of its wounds remaining. Restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

stratagems.name: Flexible Command
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Any number of ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your Officers can issue Orders to REGIMENT units and SQUADRON units.

stratagems.name: Fields of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit and one SQUADRON unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time your selected REGIMENT and SQUADRON units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP â€” targeting your selected enemy unit. REGIMENT + SQUADRON pair.

stratagems.name: Inspired Command
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your OFFICER can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.

stratagems.name: Stalwart Protector
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is allocated to an INFANTRY model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of your VEHICLE, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

defBuff.note: Benefit of Cover for INFANTRY screened by your VEHICLE.

Bridgehead Strike.ruleName: Only the Best / Fire Zone Purge
Bridgehead Strike.rule:
Only the Best: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model from your army makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Fire Zone Purge: Each time a MILITARUM TEMPESTUS model from your army makes a ranged attack in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield from Reserves or it disembarked from a TRANSPORT, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Keywords: If a MILITARUM TEMPESTUS OFFICER model from your army is your WARLORD, TEMPESTUS SCIONS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword, and while such a unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of TEMPESTUS SCIONS models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Bellicosa Drop
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that is in Reserves and has the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. Restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Firing Hot
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One MILITARUM TEMPESTUS or KASRKIN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when targeting an enemy unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of hot-shot lascarbines, hot-shot lasguns, hot-shot laspistols, hot-shot marksman rifles, hot-shot volley guns and sentry hot-shot volley guns equipped by models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 S +1 AP â€” only for hot-shot weapons within 12". TEMPESTUS / KASRKIN.

stratagems.name: Fire and Relocate
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Servo-Designators
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that is visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Aerial Extraction
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, if all of its models have the Deep Strike ability, or one VALKYRIE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: On My Position
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT INFANTRY unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds. Then, your unit suffers 3D3 mortal wounds.

Mechanised Assault.rule: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM model from your army makes a ranged attack in a turn in which it disembarked from a TRANSPORT, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Vox-Relay
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER unit from your army embarked within a TRANSPORT. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it is embarked within a TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield, and it can issue Orders to ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT units from your army (excluding TITANIC units) regardless of the distance to and from your unit's TRANSPORT.

stratagems.name: Rapid Dispersal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your INFANTRY unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Clear and Secure
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit + Wound â€” disembarked this turn AND target on an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Swift Interception
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One TRANSPORT unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT and TITANIC units) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your TRANSPORT can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Hasty Extraction
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT.

stratagems.name: Move Out
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's turn.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT.

Hammer of the Emperor.rule: Each time a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and when making that Advance move, that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of enemy models.

stratagems.name: Final Hour
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that is Below Half-strength (excluding OFFICER units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle round, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding [ONE SHOT] weapons) have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Blazing Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Tactical Withdrawal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Crash Through
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

stratagems.name: Furious Cannonade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP â€” only vs targets within 12". SQUADRON unit.

stratagems.name: Ablative Plating
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

defBuff.note: -1 to the Damage of each attack (Shooting phase).

Recon Elements.rule: ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER and REGIMENT models from your army have the Benefit of Cover. While such a model has the Benefit of Cover for any other reason (e.g. because it is wholly within a RUIN), improve the Save characteristic of that model by 1 (to a maximum of 3+).

stratagems.name: Crack Shots
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Draw Them Out
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Scramble Field
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Courageous Diversion
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and each time an enemy model makes an attack, if your unit is the closest eligible target, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Tanglefoot Grenades
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM GRENADES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

stratagems.name: Scouting Outriders
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's turn.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED or ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER unit from your army that is wholly within 10" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Siege Regiment.rule:
At the start of the battle round, select one of the following types of artillery support.

Creeping Barrage: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield: On a 5+, until the end of the battle round, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

Incendiary Bombardment: Select a number of enemy units more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

Smoke Shells: Select a number of units from your army. Until the end of the battle round, those units have the Stealth ability.

Maximum number of units per battle round — Incursion: 2; Strike Force: 3; Onslaught: 4.

stratagems.name: Trench Fighters
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if it is a REGIMENT model. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Over the Top
stratagems.when: Start of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your model issues the Move! Move! Move! Order, it can issue that Order to any number of eligible friendly INFANTRY REGIMENT units, regardless of range to your model.

stratagems.name: Flare Burst
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit within 12", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit â€” only vs visible enemy within 12". CHARACTER unit.

stratagems.name: Callous Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model's unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, one model from your unit is destroyed after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Furious Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

mathBuff.note: +1 Attacks for ranged â€” only at half range. PLATOON unit.

stratagems.name: Minefield
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

Armoured Infantry.rule:
Add SQUADRON to the list of units each OFFICER unit from your army can issue Orders to. Add the Order below to those listed in the Voice of Command ability.

On My Signal (Order): This Order can only be issued to ARMOURED SKIRMISHER units (see below). Each time an enemy unit ends a Normal or Advance move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". Each unit can only move in this way once per turn.

Keywords: ASTRA MILITARUM SQUADRON units from your army have the ARMOURED SKIRMISHER keyword (excluding ARTILLERY units and units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 13 or higher).

stratagems.name: Order the Advance
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one or more friendly ASTRA MILITARUM units within 6" of your unit; until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for those units.

stratagems.name: Mobile Firebase
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Burst of Speed
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that did not Remain Stationary or arrive from Reserves this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Supporting Ordnance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit â€” only vs MONSTER/VEHICLE targets. ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit.

stratagems.name: Combined Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover, and each time an ARMOURED SKIRMISHER unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

mathBuff.note: +2 Strength â€” only vs the selected enemy unit, only for ARMOURED SKIRMISHER attacks.

stratagems.name: Opening Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound â€” disembarked this turn.

Grizzled Company.rule:
Add 1 to the number of Orders each ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER model from your army can issue, as stated on their datasheet.

While an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army is affected by an Order, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Snap to It
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's OFFICER model can issue 1 Order as if it were your Command phase.

stratagems.name: No Retreat!
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army affected by the Duty and Honour! Order.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Veteran Sharpshooters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover for ranged.

stratagems.name: Purging Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army affected by an Order that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is within range of an objective marker, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Lethal Hits â€” only when your unit is within range of an objective marker, and is affected by an Order.

stratagems.name: Mordian Minute
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army affected by the First Rank, Fire! Second Rank, Fire! Order.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength â€” INFANTRY unit, affected by First Rank Fire! Second Rank Fire! Order.

stratagems.name: Additional Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Steel Hammer.rule:
Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC or ASTRA MILITARUM SQUADRON unit from your army is selected to shoot, models in that unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of that unit (including with Blast weapons), provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. When doing so, such models do not suffer the penalty to their Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units (excluding attacks made with Indirect Fire weapons).

Keywords: In the Muster Armies step, you can select one or more ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC units from your army to gain the CHARACTER keyword. This means the selected units can be given Enhancements, and one of them can be selected as your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Engine of Wrath
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Until the end of the phase, add 6 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 2, and each time a model in your unit fights, it can only target that enemy unit.

mathBuff.note: +6 Attacks, +2 AP on melee â€” TITANIC only, target one enemy in Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Imposing Arrival
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set up your unit on the battlefield, wholly within 8" of the battlefield edge and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Adamantine Behemoth
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Shattering Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Withering Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Accuracy Under Pressure
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit rolls.

enhancements.name: Guiding Presence
enhancements.desc: Aeldari Psyker model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Harmonisation Matrix
enhancements.desc: Aeldari model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any Transport it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
enhancements.desc: Aeldari Psyker model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Aeldari Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Guileful Strategist
enhancements.desc: Aeldari model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Aeldari Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Aspect of Murder
enhancements.desc: **^^Autarch^^** or **^^Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Wisdom
enhancements.desc: ^^**Autarch^^** or ^^**Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading an ^^**Aspect Warriors^^** unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Shimmerstone
enhancements.desc: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Strategic Savant
enhancements.desc: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Gaze of Ynnead
enhancements.desc: Farseer model only. The bearer's Eldritch Storm weapon has the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Storm of Whispers
enhancements.desc: Warlock model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Borrowed Vigour
enhancements.desc: **^^Archon^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Morbid Might
enhancements.desc: Succubus model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Cegorach's Coil
enhancements.desc: Troupe Master model only. Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer's unit that is within Engagment Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Mask of Secrets
enhancements.desc: Harlequins model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Murder's Jest
enhancements.desc: Death Jester model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below Half-strength, each successful Hit scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Mistweave
enhancements.desc: Shadowseer model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Craftworld's Champion
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Ethereal Pathway
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two Guardians units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Protector of the Paths
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

enhancements.name: Breath of Vaul
enhancements.desc: **^^Asuryani^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a **^^Storm Guardians^^** unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re-roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a Guardian fusion gun in that unit, you can re-roll the result.

enhancements.name: Crucible of Malediction
enhancements.desc: **^^Haemonculus^^** model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a **^^Psyker^^** unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Eye of Spite
enhancements.desc: **^^Succubus^^** model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
enhancements.desc:
**^^Archon^^** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:
Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Dark Vitality
enhancements.desc: **^^Drukhari^^** model only. The bearer's unit is always Empowered - you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit's Pain abilities

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^, that ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^ has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Webway walker
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Reaper's Cowl
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

enhancements.name: Conductor of Torment
enhancements.desc:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Drukhari**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Harlequins**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.

enhancements.name: Lucid Eye
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

enhancements.name: Runes of Warding
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Torc of Morai-Heg
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Phantasmal Smoke
enhancements.desc:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of a friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the  Stealth ability
Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Sadistic Fulcrum
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower the bearer’s unit in the Shooting phase, select one friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^ within 6" of the bearer’s unit; until the end of the phase, each time that ^^**Transport**^^ makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Raider
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, if that enemy unit was within range of one or more objective markers when the bearer’s unit was selected to fight, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

enhancements.name: Nightmare Shroud
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Light of Clarity
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Infanty models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of Monster models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Stave of Kurnous
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding Titanic units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [Precision] ability.

enhancements.name: Rune of Mists
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Higher Duty
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. Oncer per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, the bearer's unit can make a normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Psychic Destroyer
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ ^^Psyker^^ model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Phoenix Gem
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one of more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Timeless Strategist
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Firstdrawn Blade
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Mirage Field
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Seersight Strike
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted Psyker model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [Anti-Monster 2+] and [Anti-Vehicle 2+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Master Regenesist
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer's unit instead of D3+1.

enhancements.name: Master Nemesine
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. The bearer's weapons have the ^^**[Anti-Beast 2+]**^^ and ^^**[Anti-Monster 4+]**^^ abilities.

enhancements.name: Master Artisan
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Master Repugnomancer [Aura]
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer's Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle-shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

enhancements.name: Leechbite Plate
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player's Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Webway Awl
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Informant Network
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ and/or ^^**Hand of the Archon**^^ units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Towering Arrogance
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ models only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Pharmacophex
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list. The result rolled applies to the bearer's unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

enhancements.name: Chronoshard
enhancements.desc: ^^** Succubus**^^ model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Periapt of Torments
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Morghenna's Curse
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Key of Ghosts
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only (excluding ^^**Solitaire**^^ models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Fanged Leer
enhancements.desc: ^^**Death Jester**^^ model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

enhancements.name: Shedskin Raiment
enhancements.desc: ^^**Shadowseer**^^ model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Harlequins units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Weavers' Wail
enhancements.desc: ^^**Troupe Master**^^ model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Pirate Prince
enhancements.desc: ^^**Prince Yriel**^^ unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Alacritous Assault
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[LANCE]**^^ ability.

enhancements.name: Exotic Munitions
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[ANTI‑MONSTER 5+]**^^ and ^^**[ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+]**^^ abilities.

enhancements.name: Adrenal Infusions
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

enhancements.name: Infamy (Aura)
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3” of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

enhancements.name: Webway Pathstone
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.desc:
^^**Anhrathe Character**^^ unit only. At the start of the battle, select one ^^**Character**^^ model in this unit. That model has the following ability: 


**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12” of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Voidstone
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Aeldari model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
