abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titanic Agility
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

options.name: Scattershield
options.ability: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save and each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Prince Yriel)
abilities.desc: Prince Yriel has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corsair Voidreavers
■ Corsair Voidscarred

abilities.name: Piratical Hero
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, that attack has the ^^**[Sustained Hits 1]**^^ ability and add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Prince of Corsairs
abilities.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, if this model is on the battlefield (or any ^^**Transport**^^ it is embarked within is on the battlefield), select up to three ^^**Aeldari**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Kharseth)
abilities.desc: Kharseth has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corsair Voidreavers
■ Corsair Voidscarred

abilities.name: Aethersense (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Fury of the Void (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Dread of the Deep Void. Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an ^^**Aeldari**^^ model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

default.name: Dread of the Deep Void
default.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Blast, Hazardous, Ignores Cover, Psychic

abilities.name: Hallucinogen Grenades
abilities.desc: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one ^^**Aeldari**^^ Infantry unit from your army visible to and within 36" of this unit: until the end of the phase, that unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Raid and Run
abilities.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3".

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Warhost.rule:
At the start of the battle round, you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

Each time a unit from your army performs the Swift as the Wind Agile Manoeuvre, until the end of the phase, add an additional 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Each time a unit from your army performs an Agile Manoeuvre that involves rolling a D6, add 1 to the result.

stratagems.name: Lightning-Fast Reactions
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ASURYANI unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Feigned Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ASURYANI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 12". If such a weapon already has that ability, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: Sustained Hits 1 ranged within 12". If weapon already has Sustained, crit on 5+ as well (toggle Critical Hit 5+ scenario manually for that case).

stratagems.name: Fire and Fade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT, ASURMEN and WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1". Restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge or embark within a TRANSPORT.

stratagems.name: Webway Tunnel
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Windrider Host.rule:
In the Declare Battle Formations step you can set up ASURYANI MOUNTED and VYPER units from your army in Reserves. During the battle, such units can be set up on the battlefield as if they were arriving from Strategic Reserves. For the purposes of setting up ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER units from your army on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units) and remove them from the battlefield, placing them into Strategic Reserves. Maximum per battle round: Incursion 1; Strike Force 2; Onslaught 3.

KEYWORDS: WINDRIDERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Death From On High
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was set upon the battlefield from Reserves this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds. ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER, came from Reserves this turn.

stratagems.name: Overflight
stratagems.when: End of your Shooting phase or the end of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 7".

stratagems.name: Wind of Blades
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Daring Riders
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting up your unit on the battlefield from Reserves, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. If set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn it is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Focused Firepower
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP. ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER.

stratagems.name: Spiralling Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Spirit Conclave.rule:
Each time an ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army is destroyed by an enemy unit, that enemy unit gains a Vengeful Dead token. Each time a WRAITH CONSTRUCT model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit with one or more Vengeful Dead tokens, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

ASURYANI PSYKER models from your army gain the following Aura: Spirit Guides (Aura) — While a WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit from your army is within 12" of this model, that unit has the Battle Focus ability.

KEYWORDS: WRAITHBLADES and WRAITHGUARD units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Seer's Eye
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI PSYKER model from your army and one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of it that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your PSYKER model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Armour Penetration and/or Damage characteristics of that attack.

stratagems.name: Wraithbone Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Blades from Beyond
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Devastating Wounds on melee. WRAITHBLADES/WRAITHLORD/WRAITHKNIGHT.

stratagems.name: Soul Bridge
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit from your army and one ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit is considered to be within 12" of your PSYKER model for the purposes of the Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides abilities.

stratagems.name: Spirit Token
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WRAITHBLADES or WRAITHGUARD unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Crushing Strides
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each WRAITHBLADES model in your unit, or 4D6 if WRAITHLORD, or 6D6 if WRAITHKNIGHT: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Guardian Battlehost.rule: Each time a DIRE AVENGER, GUARDIAN, SUPPORT WEAPON or WAR WALKER model from your army makes an attack, if that model's unit and/or the target unit are within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Warding Salvoes
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wound — only vs target on objective. DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS.

stratagems.name: Shield Nodes
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is within range of one or more objective markers, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Vaul's Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: One WAR WALKERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: After that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Time to Strike
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One STORM GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Blades of Asuryan
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Cost of Victory
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GUARDIANS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When doing so, return every destroyed GUARDIANS model to your unit.

Seer Council.rule: (Detachment rule pending — Fate Dice mechanic was retired with the Battle Focus army rule. Drop in the current Seer Council rule text and rebuild.)

stratagems.name: Presentiment of Dread
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Forewarned
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Unshrouded Truth
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: Fate Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover. Crit wound also improves AP by 1 (not yet modelled as a separate effect).

stratagems.name: Isha's Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Psychic Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Aspect Host.rule:
Each time an ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, select one of the following abilities for it to gain until the end of the phase:
- Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
- Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Warrior Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill, Weapon Skill, Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: To Their Final Breath
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Remove an Aspect Shrine token if available. Then, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6 (+1 if you removed a token). On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Doom Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AVATAR OF KHAINE model from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model's Wailing Doom ranged weapon has a Range characteristic of 18" and a Damage characteristic of 8.

stratagems.name: Preternatural Precision
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Remove an Aspect Shrine token if available. Then select 1 (or 2 if you removed a token) of: [IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected abilities.

mathBuff.note: This toggle models the LETHAL HITS pick. (Toggle Sustained or Ignores Cover separately when picking those; with an Aspect Shrine token, you get 2 of them.)

stratagems.name: Khaine's Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. If Battle-shocked, subtract 1.

Armoured Warhost.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by AELDARI VEHICLE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for AELDARI VEHICLE FLY units from your army.

stratagems.name: Layered Wards
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Swift Deployment
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI TRANSPORT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Disembarking units count as having made a Normal move and cannot charge that turn.

stratagems.name: Vectored Engines
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI FLY VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Cloudstrike
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and is in Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Deep Strike ability. Set up more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. If so, cannot charge that turn.

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll made for a model in your unit.

stratagems.name: Anti-Grav Repulsion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

Devoted of Ynnead.rule:
Lethal Intent: At the end of your opponent's Shooting phase, if one or more YNNARI units from your army were destroyed this phase, select one YNNARI INFANTRY or YNNARI MOUNTED unit from your army that was within 6" of your destroyed unit. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

Lethal Surge: Once per turn, when a YNNARI unit from your army performs the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre, it can make a Lethal Surge move instead of a Normal move. Roll one D6 and add 1: that unit can be moved a number of inches up to the total, and can move within Engagement Range of the enemy unit that just triggered that Agile Manoeuvre.

Lethal Reprisal: At the start of the Fight phase, select one YNNARI unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that is below its Starting Strength. Until the end of the phase, that unit has the Fights First ability.

Servants of the Whispering God: You can include YNNARI units in your army even though they do not have the ASURYANI Faction keyword. ASURYANI units (excluding EPIC HEROES) from your army gain the YNNARI keyword. You must include YVRAINE and/or THE YNCARNE in your army; one of those must be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Pall of Dread
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that was just destroyed while within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. It remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Macabre Resilience
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI INFANTRY or YNNARI MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Emissaries of Ynnead
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a YNNARI INFANTRY unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That YNNARI INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 melee. If below Starting Strength, full Hit re-roll (toggle Abaddon-style hit re-roll buff manually for that case).

stratagems.name: Parting the Veil
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

mathBuff.note: Lethal Hits + Ignores Cover on ranged.

stratagems.name: Death Answers Death
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One YNNARI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units), if one or more models in that unit were destroyed this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase.

Ghosts of the Webway.rule:
Each time a HARLEQUINS model from your army makes a Charge move, it can move through enemy models.

TRAVELLING PLAYERS: TROUPE units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword and TROUPE models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2. You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: DEATH JESTER, SHADOWSEER, TROUPE MASTER.

stratagems.name: Staged Death
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining. Once per battle per model.

stratagems.name: Heroes' Fall
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Mocking Flight
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HARLEQUINS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That HARLEQUINS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Tricksters' Retort
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One TROUPE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Bloody Dance
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units. Even if successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

stratagems.name: Exit the Stage
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Serpent's Brood.rule:
Weapons equipped by HARLEQUINS MOUNTED and HARLEQUINS VEHICLE models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Each time a HARLEQUINS unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, that unit's weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

TRAVELLING PLAYERS: TROUPE units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword, and TROUPE models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2. You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: DEATH JESTER, SHADOWSEER, TROUPE MASTER.

stratagems.name: Fangs of the Brood
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TROUPE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when using your unit's Dance of Death ability, you can select three of the abilities for your unit to gain, instead of one.

stratagems.name: Venomous Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Striking Stride
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Weavers' Coils
stratagems.when: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Weaving Stride
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Skyward Lunge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Eldritch Raiders.ruleName: Yriel's Own / Veterans of the Void
Eldritch Raiders.rule:
AELDARI units in your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced. Each time an ANHRATHE, RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army Advances, you can re-roll the Advance roll.

Veterans of the Void: Each time you add an ANHRATHE unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement must be unique. Costs increase the unit's points accordingly.

stratagems.name: Raiders' Spoils
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Ruthless Killers
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or Fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

mathBuff.note: +1 Damage on every attack. CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED.

stratagems.name: Yriel's Example
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: No Prey Too Big
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE, RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the highest Toughness characteristic of models in the target unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound when S < T. Toggle when targeting tougher units.

stratagems.name: Impeding Fire
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One RANGERS, SHROUD RUNNERS or STARFANG unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) visible to and within 36" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Withdraw and Reinforce
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If below Starting Strength, return all destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit.

Corsair Coterie.ruleName: Relentless Raiders / Veterans of the Void
Corsair Coterie.rule:
While an objective marker is under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

ANHRATHE units from your army have the Void Thieves ability: At the end of a phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Veterans of the Void: Each time you add an ANHRATHE unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement must be unique.

stratagems.name: Pirates' Due
stratagems.when: The Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit has the ANHRATHE keyword, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 melee. Full Wound re-roll if ANHRATHE and target on objective (toggle full Wound re-roll buff in that case).

stratagems.name: Lethal Ruse
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That AELDARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If ANHRATHE, also select one enemy unit your unit was within Engagement Range of at the start of the phase, and roll 6D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Outcast Ambush
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] and [RAPID FIRE 1] abilities, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover + Rapid Fire 1 + +1 AP. RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS.

stratagems.name: Into the Breach
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ANHRATHE unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units.
stratagems.target: That ANHRATHE unit.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has resolved all of its shooting attacks, it can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

stratagems.name: Cloak and Shadow
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker that you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability and your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Vengeful Sorrow
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army, if one or more models were destroyed by those attacks, and if that unit is neither Battle-shocked nor within Engagement Range of an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. Roll one D6, add 1: move up to that many inches toward the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). May end within Engagement Range.

enhancements.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

enhancements.name: Umbralefic Crystal
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Incandeum
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

enhancements.name: Arcane Might
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

enhancements.name: Empowered Manifestation
enhancements.desc: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Empyric Onslaught
enhancements.desc: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Noctilith Mantle
enhancements.desc: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

enhancements.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Diabolic Servant
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

enhancements.name: Duplicitous Malediction
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Tome of True Names
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Warpmeld Dagger
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

enhancements.name: Diamond of Distortion
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Bray Lord
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Tzaangors^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Flowing Flesh
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Risen Rubricae
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two ^^**Rubricae Battleline^^** units from your army or one other ^^**Rubricae^^** unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Arcane Thralls (Aura)
enhancements.desc: While a friendly ^^**Rubricae^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Rubricae
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a ^^**Rubricae^^** model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Stave Abominus
enhancements.desc: The bearer's melee weapons have the [Sustained Hits D3] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warp Syphon
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those ^^**Vehicle^^** units; that ^^**Vehicle^^** unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

enhancements.name: Perplexing Cloak
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability.

enhancements.name: Biomechanical Mutation
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Warp-cursed Runemaster
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Scryer of Fates (Psychic)
abilities.desc: if your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to 3 ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Arch-Sorcerer of Tzeentch (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines, Tzaangor Enlightened^^**

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.desc: Each time a unit disembarks from this ^^**Transport^^** after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**Thousand Sons Infantry^^** models. Each ^^**Terminator^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Ensorcelled Annihilation
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit that was hit by one or more Psychic attacks made by a ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** unit from your army this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Ensorcelled Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more Psychic attacks made by a ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** unit from your army this turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Sorcerous Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport^^** this turn makes a Psychic attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**Thousand Sons Infantry^^** models (excluding ^^**Terminator^^** models).

abilities.name: Regenerating Monstrosities
abilities.desc: At the start of each player’s Command phase, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Siege Shield
abilities.desc: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Destroyer of Futures
abilities.desc: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem. For each of those attacks that targets an enemy unit within 9" of one or more ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker**^^ units from your army, a hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ instead.

abilities.name: Arcane Shield (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rebind Rubricae (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit; on a 6, you can return up to 2 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines^^**

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Arcane Shield (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Binding Tendrils (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with Arcane Fire. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is ensnared. While a unit is ensnared, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines, Tzaangor Enlightened^^**

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

models.name: Exalted Sorcerer on Disc of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Blazing Salvos
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Terrifying Assault
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if that unit is within 9" of one or more ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** units from your army.

abilities.name: Devoted to Destruction
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Flame-wreathed
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Malefic Maelstrom (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Glimpse of Eternity (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Once per turn, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines^^**

abilities.name: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions Psyker^^** unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

default.name: ➤ Fires of the Abyss - focused witchfire

abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Unearthly Power
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, select one of the abilities in the Crimson King section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Lord of the Planet of the Sorcerers (Psychic)
