detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Hexwarp Thrallband.rule:
Certain areas of the battlefield are within your army's Flow of Magic, as follows:
- Your deployment zone is always within your army's Flow of Magic.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Flow of Magic.
- At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Flow of Magic.

Each time a THOUSAND SONS model from your army makes a Psychic Attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If such a model is wholly within your army's Flow of Magic, each time it makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

stratagems.name: Warding Hex
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control, if that objective marker is wholly within your army's Flow of Magic.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Wrath of the Doomed
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, +1 if your unit is wholly within Flow of Magic: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Strands of Time
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot OR declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is wholly within Flow of Magic when targeted, until end of turn it can shoot AND declare a charge after Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Through the Veil
stratagems.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES or SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.effect: If it is a RUBRIC MARINES unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Deep Strike ability. SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS can be set up wholly within Flow of Magic and more than 6" away from all enemy models; if so, cannot charge that turn.

stratagems.name: Scouring Warpflame
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is wholly within Flow of Magic.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. After your unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit; until end of phase, models in that unit cannot have Benefit of Cover.

mathBuff.note: Ignores Cover. THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit, wholly within Flow of Magic.

stratagems.name: Kaleidoscopic Tempest
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and if wholly within Flow of Magic, each time an attack targets your unit, it has the Benefit of Cover.

Grand Coven.rule:
In your Command phase, you can select one of the abilities listed below to take effect until the start of your next Command phase. You can only select each of these abilities once per battle.

Imbued Manifestation: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by THOUSAND SONS models from your army.

Psychic Maelstrom: Each time a THOUSAND SONS model from your army makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Wrath of the Immaterium: Psychic weapons equipped by THOUSAND SONS models from your army have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Psychic Dominion
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Psychic weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

stratagems.name: Destined by Fate
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a saving throw is failed for a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.target: That PSYKER model.
stratagems.effect: Change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

stratagems.name: Egotistical Power
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select Imbued Manifestation, Psychic Maelstrom or Wrath of the Immaterium. Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability applies to your unit instead of any other Kindred Sorcery ability, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

stratagems.name: Desecration of Worlds
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Arcane Focus
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after you take a Psychic test for a THOUSAND SONS model from your army that Channelled the Warp (before resolving that Ritual).
stratagems.target: That THOUSAND SONS model.
stratagems.effect: Re-roll all of the D6 rolled for that Psychic test (including the additional D6 for Channelling the Warp).

stratagems.name: Devastating Sorcery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 9" to the Range characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hit + Wound on Psychic weapons only. Filters by the [PSYCHIC] keyword — Magnus's Gaze/Blade/Firestorm benefit; non-Psychic weapons like a Defiler's lascannon don't.

Changehost of Deceit.rule:
SCINTILLATING LEGIONS units from your army have the following ability:

Daemonic Illusions (Aura): While a friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

THOUSAND SONS units from your army have the following ability:

Mortal Sorcery (Aura): While a friendly SCINTILLATING LEGIONS PSYKER unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

RESTRICTIONS: You can include SCINTILLATING LEGIONS units in your army even though they do not have the THOUSAND SONS Faction keyword. Combined points: Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500. No SCINTILLATING LEGIONS models can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Sulphurous Veil
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS or SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Deceptive Glamour
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets, it can only target your unit if there are no eligible SCINTILLATING LEGIONS targets.

stratagems.name: Ethereal Phantasm
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or 6" if wholly within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS units.

stratagems.name: Fractal Disjunction
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Chronosorcerous Bleed
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER or SCINTILLATING LEGIONS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Glimmershift Portal
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two SCINTILLATING LEGIONS units from your army (excluding MONSTERS), or one SCINTILLATING LEGIONS MONSTER unit, if more than 6" from all enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Warpmeld Pact.rule:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot or fight and one or more TZEENTCH MUTANT INFANTRY or TZEENTCH MUTANT MOUNTED units from your army are selected as a target, each of those TZEENTCH MUTANT units can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that TZEENTCH MUTANT unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Each time a TZEENTCH MUTANT INFANTRY or TZEENTCH MUTANT MOUNTED unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, before selecting its targets, that unit can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that TZEENTCH MUTANT unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

KEYWORDS: TZAANGORS units from your army have the BATTLELINE keyword, and while such a unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of TZAANGOR models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Gift of Change
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS CHARACTER model from your army (excluding MONSTERS) that was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, add one TZEENTCH CHAOS SPAWN unit (one model) to your army, set up as close as possible to where your model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of enemy units. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Warped Vicissitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TZAANGORS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Deranged Ferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That TZEENTCH MUTANT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of 3", and any models within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight.

stratagems.name: Blessed Transmutations
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army and one friendly TZAANGORS unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 12" of that PSYKER model.
stratagems.effect: Return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTERS) to your TZAANGORS unit.

stratagems.name: Touched by Tzeentch
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Twisted Mirage
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TZEENTCH MUTANT unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" away from all enemy units, or more than 9" away if a MONSTER. Cannot charge that turn.

Rubricae Phalanx.rule: Each time an attack with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a RUBRICAE model from your army, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

stratagems.name: Ardent Automata
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a RUBRICAE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That RUBRICAE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Inexorable Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One RUBRICAE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance rolls made for it, and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Infernal Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all inferno bolt pistols, inferno boltguns, inferno combi-bolters and inferno combi-weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and a Strength characteristic of 5.

mathBuff.note: Inferno boltguns/pistols/combi-bolters/combi-weapons gain +1 S (4 -> 5) and PSYCHIC keyword. Toggle applies to all ranged in the engine — most Tsons infantry are Inferno-armed anyway, so close.

stratagems.name: Revenge of the Rubricae
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One RUBRICAE unit from your army that was within 6" of that PSYKER model when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your RUBRICAE unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but only at the enemy unit that just destroyed your PSYKER model.

stratagems.name: Implacable Guardians
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit (excluding PSYKER models), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Unwavering Phalanx
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One RUBRIC MARINES unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Warpforged Cabal.rule:
Each time a THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, apply one of the following when resolving those attacks:
- If that VEHICLE unit is within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER models, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll.
- Otherwise, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll OR one Damage roll.

Each time a THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed while within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER models, that model's Deadly Demise inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of only a 6.

stratagems.name: Hex-marked Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Mutate Landscape
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is mutated, and remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. While mutated, each time an enemy unit ends a move within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Cyberspirit Machinations
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That VEHICLE unit, and one friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit within 6" of that VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your VEHICLE unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Malevolent Animus
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your VEHICLE unit is malevolent. While malevolent, it can ignore any or all modifiers to: the profile characteristics of its models; the WS/BS of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding saving throws).

stratagems.name: Ensorcelled Infusion
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase, that is within 6" of one or more friendly THOUSAND SONS PSYKER units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by VEHICLE models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and each time an attack is made with such a weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound on ranged. THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE within 6" of a Tsons Psyker unit.

stratagems.name: Warpflame Gargoyles
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. That enemy unit must then take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Berzerker Glaive
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Battle-lust
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. In addition, while the Unbridled Bloodlust Blessing of Khorne is active for your army, add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Helm of Brazen Ire
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Favoured of Khorne
enhancements.desc: Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to 2 of the D6 rolled.

enhancements.name: Archslaughterer
enhancements.desc: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1. While the bearer is a **^^Vessel Of Wrath^^**, improve the Damage characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

enhancements.name: Vox-Diabolus
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is a VESSEL OF WRATH: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Avenger's Crown
enhancements.desc: If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Gateways to Glory
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end a Normal or Advance move within Engagement Range of them.

enhancements.name: Brazen Form
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the bearer's Toughness characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Butcher Lord
enhancements.desc: During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Jakhals^^** or ^^**Goremongers^^** unit. If attached to a ^^**Goremongers^^** unit, the bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Chosen of the Blood God
enhancements.desc: Add 3" to the range of the bearer's Aura abilities.

enhancements.name: Strategic Slaughter
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to 3 ^^**Jakhals^^** and/or ^^**Goremongers^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Disciple of Khorne
enhancements.desc: During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Bloodcrushers^^** or ^^**Flesh Hounds^^** unit. While leading one of these units, the bearer has the Deep Strike ability, and it has the ^^**Blood Legions^^** Faction keyword instead of the ^^**World Eaters^^** Faction keyword.

enhancements.name: Blood-forged Armour
enhancements.desc: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. If the bearer is destroyed, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point.

enhancements.name: Icon of War
enhancements.desc: While a friendly ^^**Blood Legions^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit has the Blessings of Khorne ability. If the Might of Khorne ability is active for your army, then while a friendly ^^**Blood Legions^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Blade of Endless Bloodshed
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons. Each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, do not roll to gain a Blood Tithe point, you automatically gain 1 Blood Tithe point instead.

enhancements.name: Frenzied Focus
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

enhancements.name: Killing Clarity
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Violent Demise
enhancements.desc: The bearer's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+1 ability, instead of the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

enhancements.name: Malicious Vigour
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer's unit makes a Brazen Fury move, it is treated as having rolled a 6 for the distance the unit can be moved.

enhancements.name: Aggressive Deployment
enhancements.desc: In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a ^^**Dedicated Transport^^**, that ^^**Dedicated Transport^^** has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Unleash Hell
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one ^^**Vehicle^^** model within 6" of the bearer or, if the bearer is embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, you can select that ^^**Transport^^** model. Until the end of the phase, after the selected model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Infernal Infusion
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer's unit has the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Murderous Onslaught
enhancements.desc: If the bearer's unit disembarked from a ^^**Transport^^** this turn, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Reborn in Blood
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Wrathful Presence
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

subAbilities.name: The Blood God's Favour
subAbilities.desc: Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to 6 of the D6 rolled.

subAbilities.name: Driven by Ultimate Rage (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit is within 6" of this model, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that unit's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it, and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Weapon Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

subAbilities.name: Overwhelming Wrath (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit within 6" of this model is selected to Fall Back, that unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

abilities.name: Legendary Killer
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: The Betrayer
abilities.desc: At the end of your Charge phase, if this model is leading a unit and that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you must take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is failed, one Bodyguard model of your choice in that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Berserker Frenzy
abilities.desc: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Fire Riders
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When making a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Bloody Stampede
abilities.desc: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model, then roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lord of Murder
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Devastating Assault
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its hellforged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Direct the Slaughter
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Khorne with wings

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bloodied Terror
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Swooping Predator
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll 6 D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

models.name: Daemon Prince of Khorne with wings

abilities.name: Aggressive Advance
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 10" and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally though terrain features.

abilities.name: Crush All Who Stand Before Us
abilities.desc: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. When determining which models in this unit are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: A Worthy Skull
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's unit destroys a ^^**Character^^** model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Forwards, For Blood!
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

abilities.name: Blood Surge
abilities.desc: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

models.name: Khorne Berzerker w/ eviscerator and bolt pistol
Khorne Berzerker w/ eviscerator and plasma pistol
Khorne Berzerker w/ chainblade and plasma pistol

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Model in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bloody Fury
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Each time this unit declares a charge that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

weapons.name: Reaper autocannon
weapons.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Rapid Fire 2, Sustained Hits 1

abilities.name: Objective Ravaged
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Beacons of Rage (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**), add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brazen Fury
abilities.desc: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brazen Fury move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to the result of this roll, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Brazen Fury move while Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Brazen Fury move per phase.

abilities.name: Rend and Tear
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Damage characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brazen Fury
abilities.desc: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brazen Fury move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to the result of this roll, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Brazen Fury move while Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Brazen Fury move per phase.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.desc: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ^^**World Eaters Infantry^^** models. Each ^^**Possessed^^** and ^^**Terminator^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Blood-hungry Annihilator
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Punishing Suppression
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^*). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Unleash Wrath
abilities.desc:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:
- Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

weapons.name: Heavy reaper autocannon
weapons.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Rapid Fire 2, Sustained Hits 1

weapons.name: Heavy reaper autocannon
weapons.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Rapid Fire 2, Sustained Hits 1

abilities.name: Furious Onslaught
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.desc: In your opponent's Shooting phase, and in the Fight phase, each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot or fight, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Devoted to Destruction
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

abilities.name: Airborne Predator
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: The Scent of Blood
abilities.desc: Each time this model declares a charge that targets one or more units below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. If one or more of the targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Charge roll instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Savage Exaltation
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Meet Any Challenge
abilities.desc: In your opponent's Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ models. It cannot transport ^^**Possessed^^** or ^^**Terminator^^** models.

abilities.name: To Slake Its Rage
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Idol of Blessed Blood
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, if this unit is on the battlefield, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Loping Speed
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rage Eternal
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abilities.name: Possessed Lord
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**

abilities.name: Lord of the Eightbound
abilities.desc: If this model is attached to a ^^**World Eaters Possessed^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Deep Strike and Scouts 6" abilities.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rage Embodied (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Murderlust
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Slaughter and Carnage.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Khorne (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Relentless Carnage
abilities.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bane of Cowards
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brass Stampede
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Hunters from the Warp
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

wargearAbilities.name: Collar of Khorne
wargearAbilities.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

wargearAbilities.name: Collar of Khorne
wargearAbilities.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Berzerker Warband.rule: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Blood Offering
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was just destroyed while within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Hack and Slash
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and that made a charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP melee. WORLD EATERS unit that made a Charge move this turn.

stratagems.name: Frenzied Resilience
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Skulls for the Skull Throne!
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a WORLD EATERS unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER or MONSTER model.
stratagems.target: That WORLD EATERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the battle round, that Blessing of Khorne is active in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

stratagems.name: Apoplectic Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army is selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That KHORNE BERZERKERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Berzerker's Wrath
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army that can make a Blood Surge move as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll a D6 to determine how far models in your unit can move when they make their Blood Surge move. Instead, when making their Blood Surge move, these models can move up to 8".

Vessels of Wrath.rule:
At the start of the battle round, after activating Blessings of Khorne, you can select one or more models from your army from those listed below (including models embarked within TRANSPORTS):
- WORLD EATERS CHARACTER (excluding EPIC HEROES)
- Eightbound Champion
- Exalted Eightbound Champion
- Khorne Berzerkers Champion
- World Eaters Terminator Champion

You can select the same type of model multiple times. Maximum: Incursion 2 / Strike Force 3 / Onslaught 4.

Until the end of the battle round, each of those models has the VESSEL OF WRATH keyword. Then, select one Blessing of Khorne that is not currently active for your army; until the end of the battle round, that Blessing is active for VESSEL OF WRATH units in addition to any others currently active.

stratagems.name: Aspire to Infamy
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS or JAKHALS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within 8" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by non-CHARACTER models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 S and +1 AP melee on non-CHARACTER models. Within 8" of a WE CHARACTER.

stratagems.name: Overshadowed by None
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY, WORLD EATERS MOUNTED or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wound melee. Only vs MONSTER/VEHICLE targets — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Gory Dedication
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy models with a melee attack this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Punish the Craven
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. If your unit is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

stratagems.name: Meet Force with Force
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY, WORLD EATERS MOUNTED or WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Blood Surge move (up to D6" toward the closest enemy unit, can end within Engagement Range). KHORNE BERZERKERS or VESSEL OF WRATH units re-roll the D6.

stratagems.name: Brazen Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength of that attack is greater than the Toughness of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll, or for VESSEL OF WRATH units subtract 1 from the Wound roll outright.

Cult of Blood.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Idols of Khorne abilities listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability is active and its effects apply to all WORLD EATERS TITANIC and WORLD EATERS MONSTER units from your army. You can only select each Idols of Khorne ability once per battle.

Idol of Infinite Rage (Aura): While a friendly JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if this model is TITANIC), each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Idol of Burning Wrath (Aura): While a friendly JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if TITANIC), add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

Idol of Blessed Blood (Aura): While a friendly JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit is within 6" of this model (or within 9" if TITANIC), models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

KEYWORDS: JAKHALS and GOREMONGERS units from your army have the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Bloody Vengeance
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army that was just destroyed by an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a model in a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Drawn to the Slaughter
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS unit from your army that was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength. Restrictions: cannot return Attached units. Once per battle.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Brass Idols
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, FNP 5+ instead.

stratagems.name: Bloodthirsty Horde
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight; they can target enemy units within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Fail Not the Blood God
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 melee. Full Hit re-roll if near a WE MONSTER (6") or TITANIC (9").

stratagems.name: Brazen Idol
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select Idol of Infinite Rage, Idol of Burning Wrath or Idol of Blessed Blood. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Idols of Khorne ability is active for your unit instead of any other Idols of Khorne ability that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that ability this battle. Once per battle.

Khorne Daemonkin.rule:
Each time a BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point (BTP). At the start of the Command phase, you can spend BTP to activate one of the following until end of battle:

Enraged Abjuration [2BTP]: BLOOD LEGIONS and WORLD EATERS models have Feel No Pain 5+ against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

Daemonic Rage [3BTP]: Melee weapons equipped by BLOOD LEGIONS units have the [LANCE] ability.

Boon of Blood [4BTP]: BLOOD LEGIONS units have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Might of Khorne [5BTP]: BLOOD LEGIONS units gain the Blessings of Khorne ability.

RESTRICTIONS: You can include BLOOD LEGIONS units. Combined points: Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500. No BLOOD LEGIONS model can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Summoned by Slaughter
stratagems.when: Any phase, when the last model in a unit is destroyed, before removing it from play.
stratagems.target: One BLOODLETTERS unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Fury
stratagems.when: Start of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly WORLD EATERS unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your WORLD EATERS unit have the [LANCE] ability. If the Daemonic Rage ability is active for your army, then until end of phase those melee weapons also have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

mathBuff.note: LANCE = +1 to Wound when charging. WORLD EATERS unit within 6" of a Blood Legions unit. If Daemonic Rage active, also TWIN-LINKED — toggle Full Wound re-roll as well for that case.

stratagems.name: A Worthy Skull
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit from your army has fought, and one or more enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.target: That BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit.
stratagems.effect: You gain D3 BTP and can then spend one or more BTP to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

stratagems.name: Blessing of Burning Blood
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is within 6" of a friendly WORLD EATERS unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 5+ invulnerable save (4+ if Boon of Blood ability is active).

stratagems.name: Daemontide
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit within 6" of your unit. Return one destroyed MOUNTED model, up to D3 destroyed BEAST models, or up to D6 destroyed INFANTRY models to that BLOOD LEGIONS unit with full wounds. Cannot return Attached units.

stratagems.name: Murder-Call
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Possessed Slaughterband.rule:
WORLD EATERS POSSESSED units from your army have the following ability:

Brazen Fury: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brazen Fury move. Roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but the unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). The unit can move within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Cannot make a Brazen Fury move while Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units; one move per phase.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Resistance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Strength
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the EXALTED EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

mathBuff.note: +1 Damage melee. Eightbound only vs non-MONSTER/VEHICLE targets; Exalted Eightbound only vs MONSTER/VEHICLE — toggle when modelling that specific case.

stratagems.name: Immortal Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Rapid Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One EXALTED EIGHTBOUND unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. Cannot charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Warp Stalkers
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES).

stratagems.name: Horrifying Violence
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

Goretrack Onslaught.rule: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, add 1 to Charge rolls made for that unit and that unit's melee weapons have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Endless Pursuit of Violence
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit from your army and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your WE INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Smash Through
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Disembarkation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: One WE unit embarked within your RHINO can disembark. Models can be set up wholly within 6" of your RHINO and can be set up within Engagement Range of enemy units.

stratagems.name: Full-Throttle Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a WE unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Advance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6". Cannot also be targeted by Fury Unleashed this phase.

stratagems.name: Fury Unleashed
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has wounds remaining and was hit by one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Blood Surge move. Cannot also be targeted by Unrelenting Advance this phase.

enhancements.name: Droning Chorus
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

enhancements.name: Insectile Murmuration
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Rejuvenating Swarm
enhancements.desc: At the end of each phase, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Plagueveil
enhancements.desc: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Furnace of Plagues
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the Devastating Wounds abilty.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
enhancements.desc: If the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

enhancements.name: Revolting Regeneration
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Eye of Affliction
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by model's in the bearer's unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Witherbone Pipes
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

enhancements.name: Sorrowsyphon
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a ^^**Poxwalkers**^^ unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

enhancements.name: Face of Death
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Vile Vigour
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristics of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Warprot Talisman
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battle field and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Helm of the Fly King
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Arch Contaminator
enhancements.desc: While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Bilemaw Blight
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

enhancements.name: Shriekworm Familiar
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Tendrilous Emissions
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Vehicle**^^ units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those ^^**Vehicle**^^ units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Final Ingredient
