detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Flyblown Host.rule: DEATH GUARD INFANTRY units (excluding POXWALKERS units) from your army that are not embarked within a TRANSPORT have the Scouts 5" and Stealth abilities.

stratagems.name: Nauseating Paroxysms
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Vermin Cloud
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Eye of the Swarm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Droning Horror
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 ranged. Full Hit re-roll within half range — toggle when modelling half-range engagements.

stratagems.name: Enervating Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army makes a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). Roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is not a CULTIST or POXWALKER model: for each 5+, the selected enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Myphitic Invigoration
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more friendly MYPHITIC BLIGHT-HAULER units and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Virulent Vectorium.rule: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle's Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

stratagems.name: Putrid Detonation
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

stratagems.name: Disgustingly Resilient
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Plaguesurge
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

stratagems.name: Leechspore Eruption
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD model from your army that has lost one or more wounds.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Generosity
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll the number of Attacks (full) for ranged weapons vs the marked target unit.

stratagems.name: Creeping Blight
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit & Wound re-roll vs Afflicted targets. Toggle only when modelling Afflicted enemy.

Shamblerot Vectorium.rule:
In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves.

Incursion: rounds 2, 3
Strike Force: rounds 2, 3, 4
Onslaught: rounds 2, 3, 4, 5

KEYWORDS: POXWALKERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Grip of the Walking Pox
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

stratagems.name: Smeared With Filth
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Gnawing Hunger
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

mathBuff.note: +1 A and +1 S melee on POXWALKERS for one turn.

stratagems.name: Hidden Amongst the Dead
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Shock and Horror
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That DEATH GUARD unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Shambling Wall
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, and one friendly POXWALKERS unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

Death Lord's Chosen.rule: In your opponent's Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Blooming Pestilence
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Grim Reapers
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll melee. TERMINATOR unit; only vs non-MONSTER/VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Undying Spite
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Signal Pox
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Mortarion's Teachings
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit (HEAVY when remaining stationary). TERMINATOR unit only. Also gains ASSAULT — can shoot after Advancing.

stratagems.name: Sickening Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That TERMINATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

Mortarion's Hammer.rule:
At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size:

Incursion: 1
Strike Force: 2
Onslaught: 3

stratagems.name: Blighted Land
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

stratagems.name: Relentless Grind
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Drawn to Despair
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll ranged. Only when target is in opponent's deployment zone — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Font of Filth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Eyestinger Storm
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Stinking Mire
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

Champions of Contagion.rule: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle's Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

stratagems.name: Blessings of Filth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: Crit Hit on 5+ (instead of 6+). DEATH GUARD Attached unit (Leader + bodyguard) only.

stratagems.name: Malignance Magnified
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit & Wound re-roll vs targets below Starting Strength — toggle when modelling that case. DEATH GUARD Attached unit only.

stratagems.name: Grotesque Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Rabid Infusion
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: Mobile Vector
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one other friendly DEATH GUARD unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit's Starting Strength accordingly.

stratagems.name: Death's Heads
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle's Gift).

Tallyband Summoners.rule:
While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, that PLAGUE LEGIONS unit has the Nurgle's Gift ability.

While a DEATH GUARD unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD unit's Contagion Range.

PLAGUE LEGIONS ALLIES: You can include PLAGUE LEGIONS units in your army, even though they do not have the DEATH GUARD Faction keyword. Combined points cap — Incursion: 500 pts, Strike Force: 1000 pts, Onslaught: 1500 pts. No PLAGUE LEGIONS models can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Persistent Pests
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining. Once per battle.

stratagems.name: Clutching Corruption
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll melee vs targets engaged by a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: All Is Rot
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model's unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Fleshy Avalanche
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Avatars of Decay
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Mireslick
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

enhancements.name: Eager to Prove
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Repulsed by Weakness
enhancements.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster**^^ and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

enhancements.name: Proud and Vainglorious
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer's unit. While the bearer's unit is your army's Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Slayer of Champions
enhancements.desc: The bearer's melee weapons have the [^^Precision^^] ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character**^^ unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Faultless Opportunist
enhancements.desc: You can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP; and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Blinding Speed
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does so, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Distortion
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Rise to the Challenge
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

enhancements.name: Sublime Presence
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children Transport**^^ that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **^^Transport**^^ on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Spearhead Striker
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer disembarks from a **^^Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Accomplished Tactician
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **^^Transport**^^ that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **^^Emperor's Children**^^ unit can embark in that **^^Transport**^^.

enhancements.name: Heretek Adept
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **^^Emperor's Children Vehicle**^^ model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Eternal Servitude
enhancements.desc: The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. if that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).

enhancements.name: Pledge of Dark Glory
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Mortal Pain
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Pledge of Unholy Fortune
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer's unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

enhancements.name: Steeped in Suffering
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Intoxicating Musk
enhancements.desc: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Tactical Perfection
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **^^Emperor's Children**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Loathsome Dexterity
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

enhancements.name: Empyric Suffusion
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly **^^Slaanesh**^^ unit within 6" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Dark Blessings
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Possessed Blade
enhancements.desc: At the start of the battle, select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer; add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, when resolving those attacks add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that weapon and that weapon has the [^^Devastating Wounds^^] and [^^Hazardous^^] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warp Walker
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

enhancements.name: Soulstain Made Manifest
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Exalted Patron
enhancements.desc:
Add 1" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Flawless Blades^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Spiritsliver
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Tears of the Phoenix
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Flawless Blades^^**

abilities.name: Duellist’s Hubris
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: A Challenge Worthy of Skill
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character, Monster^^** or **^^Walker^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Poisons
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player's Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
abilities.desc: At the start of your opponent's Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Prince of Slaanesh section. Until the start of your opponent's next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Serpentine
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abilities.name: Beguiling Form
abilities.desc: Each time a model makes an attack that targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Daemonic Speed
abilities.desc: This model has the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Enthralling Hypnosis (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Perfectionists
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **^^[LETHAL HITS]^^** ability.

abilities.name: Euphoric Strikes
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does so, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Lord of the Host
abilities.desc: If this model is attached to an **^^Emperor's Children Battleline^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Tormentors^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Emperor's Children Terminator Squad; Noise Marines^^**

abilities.name: Obsessive Annunciation
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Doom Siren
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

options.name: Screamer pistol and close combat weapon

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Noise Marines; Tormentors^^**

abilities.name: Warped Interference (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Wracking Agonies (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lord of Excess
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Slaanesh Infantry^^**, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Excessive Vigour (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh^^** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Ecstatic Death
abilities.desc: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6 for each of this model's remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Stimulated by Pain
abilities.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

models.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

abilities.name: Objective Defiled
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Excessive Assault
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Daemonic Patrons
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack. an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lethal Obsession
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, if it makes one or more shooting attacks and all of those attacks target the same enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time this unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is a target of that charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scuttling Horrors
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.desc: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **^^Emperor's Children Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Terminator^^** and ^^**Flawless Blade^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Terrifying Crescendo
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Airborne Predator
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can ^^FLY^^: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Glutton for Punishment
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If this model is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Assault Vehicle
abilities.desc: Units can disembark from this **^^Vehicle**^^ after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Emperor's Children Infantry^^**models (excluding ^^**Terminator**^^ and ^^**Flawless Blade**^^ models).

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: No Prey Can Evade
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abilities.name: Monarch of the Hunt
abilities.desc: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's quarry.

default.name: ➤ Pavane of Slaanesh - focused witchfire
default.Keywords: Hazardous, Devastating Wounds, Psychic, Sustained Hits 3

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Legions of Excess**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Mesmerising Form
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

options.name: Shining aegis
options.ability: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

abilities.name: Horrifying Beauty
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit in Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Soporific Musk
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and **^^Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Revel in Desecration
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is not below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Slaanesh's Chosen.rule:
EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER units from your army can ignore any or all modifiers to their Move characteristic and any or all modifiers to Advance and Charge rolls made for them.

At the start of the battle, your WARLORD's unit is your army's Favoured Champions. The first time in each player's turn that an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, after resolving all of its attacks, that CHARACTER unit becomes your army's new Favoured Champions, replacing the old one.

Each time a model in your army's Favoured Champions unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Devoted Duellists
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One or more EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in those CHARACTER units have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting that enemy unit.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] melee for EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER units vs the marked enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Beautiful Death
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is your army's Favoured Champions. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Heightened Jealousy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit becomes your army's Favoured Champions, or just after your army's Favoured Champions unit destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: Your army's Favoured Champions unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army that is not your army's Favoured Champions makes an attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

mathBuff.note: +1 S on attacks made by EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER units that are not the current Favoured Champions.

stratagems.name: Diabolic Majesty
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit becomes your army's Favoured Champions.
stratagems.target: That EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Refusal to Be Outdone
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army. Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is one of the targets of that charge, add 2 to the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Surge
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can make a Surge move. Roll one D6: each model in your unit can move a distance in inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. Models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit is not your army's Favoured Champions, you can re-roll the dice to determine the distance of its Surge move.

Peerless Bladesmen.rule:
Each time an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, select one of the abilities below. While resolving those attacks, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability:
[LETHAL HITS]
[SUSTAINED HITS 1]

stratagems.name: Deft Parry
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Death Ecstasy
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Incessant Violence
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit ends that Consolidation move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Cruel Bladesman
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP melee. EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit that made a Charge move this turn.

stratagems.name: Terrifying Spectacle
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that made a Charge move in the previous turn and destroyed one or more enemy units in the previous Fight phase.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half-strength. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Cut Down the Weak
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army (you can only select a VEHICLE if it is a WALKER) that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can declare a charge. When doing so, you must select that enemy unit as a target of that charge, and your unit does not receive a Charge bonus this turn.

Rapid Evisceration.rule: Each time an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN model from your army makes an attack, if it is a TRANSPORT model or disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Onto the Next
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that destroyed an enemy unit this phase, and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Advance and Claim
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TRANSPORT from your army that has one or more TORMENTORS units embarked within it (excluding Battle-shocked units).
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your TRANSPORT is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Dynamic Breakthrough
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagems.name: Ceaseless Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT that made a Normal move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit is eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Reactive Disembarkation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TRANSPORT from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Outflanking Strike
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TRANSPORT from your army, or up to two EMPEROR'S CHILDREN DEDICATED TRANSPORTS from your army.
stratagems.effect: For each of those TRANSPORTS wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Coterie of the Conceited.rule:
At the start of the battle round, if your WARLORD is on the battlefield, you must pledge a number to Slaanesh representing how many enemy units will be destroyed this battle round. At the end of the battle round, if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than or equal to your pledge, you gain a number of Pact points equal to your pledge. Otherwise, you do not gain any Pact points this battle round and your WARLORD model suffers D3 mortal wounds.

EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units from your army gain a bonus depending on how many Pact points you have gained during the battle (these are all cumulative):

1+ Pact: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
3+ Pact: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
5+ Pact: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [SUSTAINED HITS 1] abilities.
7+ Pact: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

stratagems.name: Protection of the Dark Prince
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound or attack is allocated to a model in an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Unshakeable Opponents
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Embrace the Pain
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

stratagems.name: Martial Perfection
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll melee. EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit, Fight phase only.

stratagems.name: Unbound Arrogance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.
stratagems.effect: Increase your pledge to Slaanesh by 1. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Armour of Abhorrence
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Mercurial Host.rule: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units from your army.

stratagems.name: Violent Excess
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] melee. EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.

stratagems.name: Combat Stimms
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Honour the Prince
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Dark Vigour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army (excluding BEASTS and VEHICLES) that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Capricious Reactions
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Cruel Raiders
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within 3" horizontally of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Carnival of Excess.rule:
While an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly LEGIONS OF EXCESS units, it is Empowered.
While a LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units, it is Empowered.

While a unit from your army is Empowered, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If such a weapon already has that ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

LEGIONS OF EXCESS ALLIES: You can include LEGIONS OF EXCESS units in your army, even though they do not have the EMPEROR'S CHILDREN Faction keyword. Combined points cap — Incursion: 500 pts, Strike Force: 1000 pts, Onslaught: 1500 pts. No LEGIONS OF EXCESS models can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Sustained by Agony
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit within 6" of your unit. One model in that LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit recovers up to 3 lost wounds or, if it is a DAEMONETTES unit, return up to D3+3 destroyed models to it instead.

stratagems.name: Ecstatic Slaughter
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit and one friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit within 6" of it that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit can declare a charge. If it does so and it has already been selected to fight this phase, it cannot fight again this phase.

stratagems.name: Violent Crescendo
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SLAANESH BEASTS, SLAANESH INFANTRY or SLAANESH MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Sycophantic Surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, provided at least one of the targets of that charge is within Engagement Range of one or more EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units from your army.

stratagems.name: Uncanny Reactions
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SLAANESH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Dark Apparitions
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DAEMONETTES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If it arrives back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units (instead of more than 9"), provided it is also set up wholly within 9" of one or more friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units.

Court of the Phoenician.ruleName: Sensational Performance + Master of the Pageant
Court of the Phoenician.rule:
Sensational Performance: EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units from your army have the following ability — each time this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase:
- This unit cannot target a unit it was within Engagement Range of at the start of the turn.
- This unit cannot target a unit that was the target of another unit's attack this phase.
- Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this unit's melee weapons by 1.

Master of the Pageant: Once per battle round, when you target a FULGRIM unit from your army with the Sinuous Breach or Prideful Superiority Stratagem, you can reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

stratagems.name: Contemptuous Disregard
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Prideful Superiority
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit & Wound re-roll melee, EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit, only vs CHARACTER targets — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Sinuous Breach
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN DAEMON unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Close-Quarters Excruciation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an EMPEROR'S CHILDREN model in your unit makes an attack that targets an eligible unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 S and +1 AP ranged within 12". Toggle when modelling targets within 12".

stratagems.name: Euphoric Inspiration
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN DAEMON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Charge rolls for friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units within 6" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Catalytic Stimulus
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Stimulus move. Roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: A'rgath, the King of Blades
enhancements.desc: **^^Khorne Legiones Daemonica^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: The Everstave
enhancements.desc: **^^Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica^^** model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 3". While the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons and increase the Range characteristic of such weapons by 6" instead.

enhancements.name: The Endless Gift
enhancements.desc: NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Soulstealer
enhancements.desc: SLAANESH LEGIONES DAEMONICA model only. Each time the bearer destroys an enemy model with a melee attack, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. On a 4+, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: False Majesty (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH model only. While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTERS) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Dreaming Crown (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH model only. While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTERS) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Infernal Puppeteer
enhancements.desc:
^^**Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster**^^ model only. In your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, you can select one other friendly visible **^^Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch**^^ unit within 9" of the bearer. If you do, when selecting targets for ranged weapons equipped by the bearer, you can measure range and determine visibility from one model of your choice in the selected unit instead. 
***Designer’s Note:** When determining if a unit with the Lone Operative ability can be selected as the target, the range is determined from the model of your choice in the selected unit.*

enhancements.name: Soul Glutton
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER model only. At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed this phase as a result of one or more of the bearer’s attacks, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Avatar of Perfection
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER model only. At the start of each phase, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of the bearer, you can: re‑roll Advance rolls made for the bearer; re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer; ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to any Advance and/or Charge rolls made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Fury's Cage
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MONSTER model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3+1 mortal wounds, and until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Inescapable Eye
enhancements.desc: **^^Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch**^^ model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one additional Flux token.

enhancements.name: Improbable Shield (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Neverblade
enhancements.desc: **^^Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster^^** model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Slaugterthirst (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE model only.  While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit (excluding MONSTERS) is within 6" of the bearer, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Brazenmaw
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE model only. Add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Gateway Unto Damnation
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MONSTER model only. The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, if the bearer has destroyed one or more enemy units this battle, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+3 ability, instead of any other Deadly Demise ability on its datasheet.

enhancements.name: Maggot Maws
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE model only. In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 6" of the bearer; that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. Then roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

enhancements.name: Font of Spores (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE MONSTER model only. While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Cankerblight (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within 6" of the bearer fails a Battle‑shock test, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Each time the bearer uses this Enhancement, no mortal wounds are inflicted by your army’s Daemonic Terror rule.

enhancements.name: Droning Shroud (Aura)
enhancements.desc: LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE MONSTER model only. While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Leaping Shadows
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Gloom (Aura)
enhancements.desc: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Fade to Darkness
enhancements.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Malice Made Manifest
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: The Dark Master (Aura)
abilities.desc: The area of the battlefield within 6" of this model is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

abilities.name: Shadow Form
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, select one Shadow Form ability. Until the end of the battle round, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Disciples of Be'lakor
abilities.desc:
- This unit has the Dark Pacts army rule, and can use it as described in _Codex: Chaos Space Marines_, even though your Army Faction is not Heretic Astartes. If this unit is Be’lakor, it automatically passes the Leadership test required for Dark Pacts. 
- Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability.

subAbilities.name: Wreathed in Shadows (Aura, Psychic)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^Legiones Daemonica^^ unit or ^^Shadow Legion^^ unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

subAbilities.name: Pall of Despair (Aura, Psychic)
subAbilities.desc: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. For the purposes of this ability, if a unit has a Starting Strength of 1, it is considered to be below its Starting Strength while it has lost one or more wounds. In addition, for each enemy unit that fails a Battle-shock test within 9" of this model, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

subAbilities.name: Shadow Lord (Aura, Psychic)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^Legiones Daemonica^^ or ^^Shadow Legion^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
