abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over friendly MONSTER and VEHICLE models and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Penumbral Puppetry
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Daemonic Incursion.rule: Each time a LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within your army's Shadow of Chaos, and/or if it is set up wholly within 6" of one or more friendly BLOODTHIRSTER, GREAT UNCLEAN ONE, KAIROS FATEWEAVER, KEEPER OF SECRETS, LORD OF CHANGE, ROTIGUS, SHALAXI HELBANE or SKARBRAND units with which it shares the KHORNE, TZEENTCH, NURGLE or SLAANESH keyword, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 9".

stratagems.name: Corrupt Realspace
stratagems.when: Start of any Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is Corrupted and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While Corrupted and under your control, the area within 6" of that objective marker counts as within your army's Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Warp Surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within your army's Shadow of Chaos.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Draught of Terror
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. In addition, each time such a weapon targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP. LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit. (Re-roll Wound vs Battle-shocked is conditional — toggle the dedicated re-roll if modelling that case.)

stratagems.name: Denizens of the Warp
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: The Realm of Chaos
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's turn.
stratagems.target: Up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA units from your army that are within your army's Shadow of Chaos, or one other LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. They arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability. Restriction: cannot target units within Engagement Range of enemy units.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Invulnerability
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in your unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

Shadow Legion.ruleName: Thralls of the First Prince + First Prince of Chaos
Shadow Legion.rule:
MUSTERING — Cannot include any DAEMON PRINCE, DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS, or EPIC HERO units (excluding BE'LAKOR). Can include the following HERETIC ASTARTES units up to a per-battle-size points cap (Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500): Chaos Lord, Chaos Lord in Terminator Armour, Chaos Lord with Jump Pack, Chaos Terminator Squad, Chosen, Damned units, Dark Apostle, Havocs, Legionaries, Master of Possession, Possessed, Raptors, Sorcerer, Sorcerer in Terminator Armour, Warp Talons.

KEYWORDS — BE'LAKOR and HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army gain the SHADOW LEGION and UNDIVIDED keywords. LEGIONES DAEMONICA units from your army gain the SHADOW LEGION keyword.

FIRST PRINCE OF CHAOS — Units from your army have the relevant ability presented below:

• MURDERER'S COWL (SHADOW LEGION KHORNE only): This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

• PENUMBRAL PUPPETRY (SHADOW LEGION TZEENTCH only): Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

• GLOAM ROT (SHADOW LEGION NURGLE only): Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit's Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

• SHADOW'S CARESS (SHADOW LEGION SLAANESH only): Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

• DISCIPLES OF BE'LAKOR (SHADOW LEGION UNDIVIDED only): This unit has the Dark Pacts army rule and can use it as described in Codex: Chaos Space Marines even though your Army Faction is not HERETIC ASTARTES. If this unit is BE'LAKOR, it automatically passes the Leadership test required for Dark Pacts. SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Spiteful Demise
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a SHADOW LEGION unit from your army is destroyed, before removing the last model and before rolling for Deadly Demise.
stratagems.target: That SHADOW LEGION unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the last model in your unit, adding 2 to the result if your unit has the SLAANESH keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Channelled Wrath
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SHADOW LEGION unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit has the KHORNE keyword, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: [LANCE] = +1 to Wound when charging. SHADOW LEGION unit on the charge. (KHORNE units also get +1 AP melee — toggle a separate +1 AP if modelling Khorne.)

stratagems.name: Death Denied
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SHADOW LEGION unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit has the TZEENTCH keyword, return up to one destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Encroaching Darkness
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to one SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES unit and up to one SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army. Only units that arrived from Reserves this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your selected units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Shade Path
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One SHADOW LEGION unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit. If your unit has the NURGLE keyword, that enemy unit must also take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Binding Shadow
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to one SHADOW LEGION HERETIC ASTARTES unit and up to one SHADOW LEGION LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army. Cannot select units within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove the selected units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Blood Legion.rule:
MURDERCALL — Each time an enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends a Normal or Advance move within 6" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units from your army, one of those LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units can make a Surge move towards that enemy unit. Roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit (can be moved within Engagement Range of that unit). A unit cannot Surge while within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

BLOOD TAINTED — At the end of a phase in which a LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army destroyed an enemy unit that was within range of an objective marker at the start of the phase, if your unit has a higher Level of Control over that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Wrath Undeniable
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Gore-Hungry Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Skulls Beget Blood
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE INFANTRY or LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding units that Fell Back this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Blood Begets Skulls
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Fools' Flight
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against it.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit and resolves it. Even if successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

stratagems.name: Sheathed in Brass
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a Save characteristic of 3+.

Legion of Excess.rule:
BEGUILING AURA — LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

SEDUCTIVE GAMBIT — LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units from your army have the following ability: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, you can declare it will perform a Seductive Gambit. If you do, until the end of the turn, this unit does not have the Fights First ability, but instead, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Thieves of Pain
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an attack or mortal wound is allocated to a model in a LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES).
stratagems.target: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one other friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.

stratagems.name: Archagonists
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER unit or up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units (excluding MONSTERS) from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound. LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit, Fight phase only.

stratagems.name: Sensory Excruciation
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH MONSTER unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Each unit on the battlefield within your army's Shadow of Chaos must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Phantasmal Longing
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Cavalcade of Blades
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit within Engagement Range of that unit, or six D6 if your unit is a MONSTER: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Excess
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Plague Legion.rule: While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army's Shadow of Chaos. In each player's Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army's Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Seeping Virulence
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: Crit Hit on 5+ melee. LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit, Fight phase only.

stratagems.name: Fever Visions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. After your unit has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit. LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit.

stratagems.name: Foetid Resurgence
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit, or up to D3 destroyed models if BATTLELINE, with full wounds. If MONSTER, one model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Rot and Renewal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Murkshadows
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal move, add 5" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Plague of Woes
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase, before selecting any targets for the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test as a result of the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule, select one other enemy unit within 9" of your unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Scintillating Legion.rule:
You start the battle with three Flux tokens. You can spend one Flux token just after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw or Hazardous test is made for a LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH model or unit from your army to re-roll the result of that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance some Stratagems. Each time you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token.

Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an Advance / Hit / Wound roll or saving throw is made for a unit from their army to re-roll that result. They reduce their Flux tokens by one and you gain one.

In your Command phase, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token.

stratagems.name: Impossible Eclipse
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Select No Man's Land or your opponent's deployment zone, or spend one Flux token and select both. Until the end of the phase, the selected areas of the battlefield are within your army's Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Pyrogenesis
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight that phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit, or spend one Flux token and add 3 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 instead.

mathBuff.note: +2 to Strength. LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit. (Flux-token upgrade: +3 S and +1 AP instead — toggle additional +1 S and +1 AP toggles if modelling that case.)

stratagems.name: Flickering Reality
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6, then you can spend one Flux token to re-roll the result: until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll (after any re-roll) of that result, the attack sequence ends, even if the original Hit roll would have been a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Fateborne Nightmares
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Ficklefire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets for, and resolving attacks with, ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model is destroyed while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Delirium Unmade
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of enemy units. Alternatively, spend one Flux token to target up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH units instead (including those within Engagement Range).
stratagems.effect: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Artificer Armour
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: The Honour Vehement
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Codex
enhancements.desc: Captain model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for your army, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that doctrine is active for the bearer’s unit only, even if you have already selected that doctrine to be active for your army this battle.

enhancements.name: Fire Discipline
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, , you can reroll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Icon of the Angel
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

enhancements.name: Speed of the Primarch
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability

enhancements.name: Rage-Fuelled Warrior
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer's melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 3] ability.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle round, just after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for the bearer, you can treat the result as a unmodified 6 instead.

enhancements.name: Thief of Secrets
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of a melee attack made by the bearer this phase, until the end of the battle, improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Beacon Angelis
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Osseus Key
enhancements.desc: WATCH MASTER or TECHMARINE model only. At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That model must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: The Tome of Ectoclades
enhancements.desc:
WATCH MASTER or CAPTAIN model only. Once per battle, after you have selected your Oath of Moment target, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select a second enemy unit to be an Oath of Moment target. 


**Designer’s Note:** *This means that each time a model with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets either of your Oath of Moment targets, you can re-roll the Hit roll.*

enhancements.name: Shroud of Heroes
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining (if the bearer was Battle-shocked when it was destroyed, it is instead returned with its full wounds remaining).

enhancements.name: Stubborn Tenacity
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Battle-shocked and below its Starting Strength.

enhancements.name: Weapons of the First Legion
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Pennant of Remembrance
enhancements.desc:
Ancient model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. While that unit
is Battle-shocked, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

enhancements.name: Execute and Redeploy
enhancements.desc: Phobos model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to delcare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer's unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

enhancements.name: Ghostweave Cloak
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative Abilities

enhancements.name: Shadow War Veteran
enhancements.desc: Phobos model only.  Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP

enhancements.name: The Blade Driven Deep
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators Ability

enhancements.name: Feinting Withdrawal
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it fell back

enhancements.name: Fury of the Storm
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Mounted model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Portents of Wisdom
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Instincts
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Mounted model only. If the bearer's unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as being one higher than it actually is

enhancements.name: Adept of the Omnissiah
enhancements.desc: **^^Techmarine^^** model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **^^Adeptus Astartes Vehicle^^** model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Master of the Machine War
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that VEHICLE is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

enhancements.name: Target Augury Web
enhancements.desc: TECHMARINE model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that VEHICLE have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

enhancements.name: The Flesh is Weak
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Mantle
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a **[MELTA]** or **[TORRENT]** weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Champion of Humanity
enhancements.desc: Tacticus model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

enhancements.name: Forged in Battle
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an umodified 6.

enhancements.name: War-tempered Artifice
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes Infantry^^** model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Architect of War
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Fleet Commander
enhancements.desc: Captain model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12" of the center of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the center of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+ that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Fury
enhancements.desc: Gravis Model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll on D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+ set the bearer back on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Stoic Defender
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control and, while that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0

enhancements.name: Fear Made Manifest [Aura]
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-Shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by it's controlling player.) Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-Shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Iron Resolve
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer's unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Rites of War
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer's unit as well.

enhancements.name: The Imperium's Sword
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Master-crafted Weapon
enhancements.desc: RAVENWING model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the Precision ability.

enhancements.name: Mounted Strategist
enhancements.desc: RAVENWING model only. You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Master of Manoeuvre
enhancements.desc: RAVENWING model only. If the bearer's unit starts the battle in Strategic Reserves, its points value does not count towards the combined points limit for units from your army that are in Strategic Reserve, and for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Recon Hunter
enhancements.desc: RAVENWING model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Unseen
enhancements.desc: Deathwing model only. Each time you target the bearer's unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer is within range of your Vowed objective marker: on a 5+ you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Champion of the Deathwing
enhancements.desc: **^^Deathwing^^** model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if it is within range of your Vowed objective marker, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

enhancements.name: Singular Will
enhancements.desc: Deathwing model only. Each time the bearer's unit Pile In or Consolidates, models in that unit can move an additional 3".

enhancements.name: Deathwing Assault
enhancements.desc: Deathwing model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer's unit can set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcement step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Archangel's Shard
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [ANTI-CHAOS 5+] and [LANCE] abilities.

enhancements.name: Artisan of War
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1, and the bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+.

enhancements.name: Gleaming Pinions
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, if this bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"

enhancements.name: Visage of Death
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack model only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Blood Shard
enhancements.desc: Death Company model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Sanguinius' Grace
enhancements.desc: Death Company model only. Once per battle at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models. the bearer can fight one additional time.

enhancements.name: To Slay the Warmaster
enhancements.desc: Death Company Model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight Phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy Character units, you can select one of those Character units and roll six D6: for each 4+, one Character model in that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

enhancements.name: Vengeful Onslaught
enhancements.desc: Death Company model only. If the bearer is destroyed, until the end of your next turn, each time a friendly Death Company model make an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Calibanite Armaments
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Hunt
enhancements.desc: Ravenwing model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back and you can re‑roll Desperate Escape tests taken for models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Stalwart Champion
enhancements.desc: Captain, Chaplain or Lieutenant model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Fulgus Magna
enhancements.desc: Deathwing model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Prescience
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only (excluding Terminator models). Once per turn, when an enemy
unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer’s unit can
make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if the Divination Discipline is active for your army

enhancements.name: Celerity
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, and if the Biomancy Discipline is active for your army, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Obfuscation
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot
at the bearer’s unit, and if the Telepathy Discipline is active for your army, the bearer’s unit cannot be
targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Fusillade
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have
the [ANTI‑MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+] abilities, and:


■ The [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if the Pyromancy
Discipline is active for your army.
■ Add 6" to the Range characteristic of those
weapons if the Telekinesis Discipline is active for
your army

enhancements.name: Pyrebrand
enhancements.desc: Black Templars model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Sacred Rage
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use
this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Taramond's Censer
enhancements.desc: Black Templars model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result

enhancements.name: Benediction of Fury
enhancements.desc: Chaplain model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Wolves' Wisdom
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. The bearer’s unit can declare a charge against one or more units within 6" instead of within 3" when using The Great Wolf Watches Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Foes' Fate
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and  Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of
those tests.

enhancements.name: Fangrune Pendant
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Longstrider
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Prescient Flash
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability

enhancements.name: Troubling Visions
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, in your Command phase, the bearer can use this
Enhancement. When it does, until the start of your next Command phase, all Angelic Legacy abilities
(see left) are active for the bearer’s unit, instead of only two of them.

enhancements.name: Blazing Icon
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Ordained Sacrifice
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was  destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining

enhancements.name: Deathwing Assault
enhancements.desc: **^^Deathwing**^^ model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Tempered in Battle (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes**^^ model only. While a friendly **^^Adeptus Astartes**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Ravenwing
enhancements.desc: **^^Ravenwing**^^ model only. You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Ancient Weapons
enhancements.desc: ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Swift Hunter
enhancements.desc: SPACE WOLVES model only. Model's in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 7" ability.

enhancements.name: Fenrisian Grit
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Feral Rage
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add an additional 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons.

enhancements.name: Wolf Master
enhancements.desc: SPACE WOLVES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly SPACE WOLVES unit within 9" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, teeth and claws and Tyrnak and Fenrir weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Braggart's Steel
enhancements.desc: **^^Space Wolves^^** model only. Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer's unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 1 to the Damage characteristic as well.

enhancements.name: Hordeslayer
enhancements.desc: **^^Space Wolves^^** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, if there are more enemy models than friendly models wholly within 6" of the bearer, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer's unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic instead.

enhancements.name: Skjald
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time a SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army achieves a Boast, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain 1 CP

enhancements.name: Thunderwolf's Fortitude
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Wolf-Touched
enhancements.desc: SPACE WOLVES model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of the bearer. In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WULFEN INFANTRY unit

enhancements.name: Hunter's Guile
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY, WULFEN and/or BLOOD CLAWS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves

enhancements.name: Elder's Guidance
enhancements.desc: SPACE WOLVES model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, if the bearer is leading a BLOOD CLAWS unit, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Helm of the Beastslayer
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack is made by a CHARACTER, MONSTER, or VEHICLE model that targets the bearer's unit, reduce the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Animus
enhancements.desc: CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit by 1

enhancements.name: Oathbound Exemplar
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Add 1 to the Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit. If the mission pack you are playing features Actions, the bearer's unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Merciless Denunciation
enhancements.desc: CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the hit roll.

enhancements.name: Zealous Vanguard
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Consecrating Aura
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Model's in the bearer's unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Imperialis of the Eternal Crusade
enhancements.desc: ANCIENT model only. Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll)

enhancements.name: Warden of Honour
enhancements.desc: CRUSADE ANCIENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time you roll one D6 for the bearer's Vengeful Exhortation ability, add 1 to the result.

enhancements.name: Orb of the Emperor's Aegis
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability

enhancements.name: Paragon of Fury
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 2 the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time a melee attack made by the bearer is allocated to an enemy model, if the bearer disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Battle-Psalm Precentor
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer's unit declares a charge, if an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test as a result of the Shock and Awe detachment rule, subtract 1 from that Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Augury Servo-Host
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. At the start of your shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

enhancements.name: Herald of the Sacred Slaughter
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Mantle
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a **[MELTA]** or **[TORRENT]** weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: War-tempered Artifice
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes Infantry^^** model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Forged in Battle
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an umodified 6.

enhancements.name: Immolator
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the attacks characteristics of Torrent weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Champion of the Feast
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Disciple of Rhetoricus
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer's unit as well.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Champion
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Malodraxian Standard
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Ancient model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Blackwing Shroud
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the
Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Coronal Susurrant
enhancements.desc:
Phobos model only. The bearer has the following ability:


Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that
unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Umbral Raptor
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Instincts
enhancements.desc: ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ model only. In your Movement phase, if the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Spiritus Ferrum
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

enhancements.name: Medusan Roar [Aura]
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 6" of
the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle‑shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by
its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle‑shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Iron Laurel
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

enhancements.name: Steel Font
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

enhancements.name: Spearpoint Paragon
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Stormseer's Wisdom
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Eye
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the
[SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

enhancements.name: Chogorian Huntmaster
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Mounted model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Armour of Antoninus
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Oath of Macragge
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Student of the Codex
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it
can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the start of your next Command phase, the Tactical  doctrine is active for this unit (instead of any other Combat Doctrine you select to be active for your army, and even if there is no Combat Doctrine active for your army).

enhancements.name: Veteran of Behemoth
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, , you can reroll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Grimnar's Mark
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Terminator Captain model only. Once per battle round, from the second battle round
onwards, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for
0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.


In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Wolf Guard Terminators unit.

enhancements.name: Howlmaw
enhancements.desc:
Wolf priest model only. At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of the
bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Chariots of the Storm
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Adeptus Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Skjald's Foretelling
enhancements.desc: Wolf Guard Battle Leader model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Carmine Reliquary
enhancements.desc:
Chaplain model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability. Each time you take a
Battle-shock test for an Adeptus Astartes unit within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll the result

enhancements.name: Master of the Red Thirst
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use
this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights
First ability.

enhancements.name: Sanguinary Tear (Aura)
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. While a friendly Death Company unit is within 6" of the bearer, add 1 to
the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Angel's Fang
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a Character,
Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Primarch
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and Battleline models in the
bearer’s unit have the [PRECISION] ability

enhancements.name: Hero of the Chapter
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the Battleline keyword.

enhancements.name: Blades of Valour
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and Battleline models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Bombast Omnivox
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the Battleline keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Laurels of Thunder
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.

enhancements.name: Orbital Uplink Reliquary
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Adeptus Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Vanguard
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability

enhancements.name: Dedicated Gunship
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight
phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer
can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into
Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Seals of Reconquest
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Avenging Avatar (Aura)
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. In the Battle‑shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of the bearer, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Scroll of Proclamation
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time the bearer’s unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Charge roll.

enhancements.name: Liberatum
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if the
target is within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Honour Indefatigable
enhancements.desc: The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Castellum Omnivox
enhancements.desc:
Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn: 
- That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back. 
- That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Spy-skull Datalink
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Defensive Mastery
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Adeptus Astartes**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Liberator
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase,
and the bearer’s unit (or any Heavy Transport it is embarked within) is within range of that objective
marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over
that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Tip of the Spear
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a Transport, that transport
has the Scouts 6" ability

enhancements.name: Shock Deployment
enhancements.desc: Adeptus Astartes Terminator or Gravis model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a Transport this turn, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Armoured Commander
enhancements.desc:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this
Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Transport that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that Transport on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Bellicose Weapon Spirits
enhancements.desc: SPEEDER unit only. This unit can re-roll Damage rolls and rolls to determine the Attacks characteristic of a weapon.

enhancements.name: Raptorial Cogitator Core
enhancements.desc: SPEEDER unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Shroud Field
enhancements.desc: PHOBOS model only. This model has Lone Operative and Stealth.

enhancements.name: Death in the Dark
enhancements.desc: INFANTRY PHOBOS unit only. This unit's attacks that target a detected unit have +1 to Hit.

enhancements.name: Fervent Exemplars
enhancements.desc: SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit only. This unit has +1 to Charge rolls.

enhancements.name: Inheritors of Sigismund
enhancements.desc: SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit only. This unit has the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Guiding Omens
enhancements.desc:
EMPEROR'S CHAMPION model only. At the start of the first battle round, you can select up to three of the following abilities. This model has those abilities until the end of the battle:
Instrument of the God-Emperor (Once per battle, per army): In the Fight phase, when this unit is selected to fight, if this unit is engaged with an enemy CHARACTER unit, this model's melee attacks have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].
Foreseen Paths of the Unholy: This unit has 3" detection range.
Vision of Momentous Brutality: This model's melee attacks have +2 A.
Augury of Retribution: Melee attacks that target this unit have [HAZARDOUS].
Omen of Sacred Intervention: When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem, that use is 1CP.
Harbinger of Judgement: When an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) engaged with this model is selected to make a Fall Back move, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Petition of Stability
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit only. This unit's plasma attacks have +6" Range.

enhancements.name: Entreaty of Perpetual Ardour
enhancements.desc: HELLBLASTER SQUAD only. This unit's snap shooting attacks hit on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

enhancements.name: Thundercowl Turbines
enhancements.desc: RAVENWING FLY unit only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

enhancements.name: Nightforged Battery
enhancements.desc: LAND SPEEDER VENGEANCE unit only. This unit can re-roll rolls to determine the Attacks characteristic of a weapon, and Hazardous rolls.

enhancements.name: Limitless Zeal
enhancements.desc: CHAPLAIN model only. This unit has +1 to Charge rolls.

enhancements.name: Inescapable Interrogation
enhancements.desc: CHAPLAIN model only. This unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

enhancements.name: Blood Boil
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. This model's [PSYCHIC] attacks have [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] (vs non-MONSTER/VEHICLE) and can re-roll Damage rolls.

enhancements.name: Aureole of the Angel
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. This unit has 3" detection range.

enhancements.name: Angelic Executioner
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. When this unit is selected to fight, this unit's melee attacks have [LETHAL HITS], or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] instead.

enhancements.name: Shadow of Abomination
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. Once per battle, per army, when this unit is selected to fight, this model's melee attacks have +1 D.

enhancements.name: Instinctive Interception
enhancements.desc: DEATH COMPANY model only. When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem, that use is 1CP.

enhancements.name: On the Archtraitor's Bridge
enhancements.desc: DEATH COMPANY model only. This model's melee attacks have +2 A.

enhancements.name: Thirst for Glory
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. This unit has +1 OC.

enhancements.name: Fierce Example
enhancements.desc: WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS unit only. This unit has +1 T.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Hunter
enhancements.desc: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER model only. This unit's ranged attacks have [ASSAULT], [IGNORES COVER] and +1 AP.

enhancements.name: Weaver of Sagas
enhancements.desc: WOLF PRIEST model only. Once per battle round, per army, in your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit's move, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 6" (or one friendly GREY HUNTERS unit within 18") of this unit; that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Temporal Corridor
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. At the end of your opponent's Fight phase, you can place this unit into Strategic Reserves. If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike.

Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack
by 1.

abilities.desc:
At the Start of your Command phase, select two Author of the Codex abilities (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.’

Primarch of the XIII (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.

Master of Battle: After you have selected an enemy unit using the Oath of Moment ability, select a second enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, if your Oath of Moment target is destroyed, that second enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until you select a new one.

Supreme Strategist: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 12" of this model with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll; this model moves a number of inches up to the result, but must finish as close as possible to the closest enemy unit [excluding Aircraft]. detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string), 'stratagems' (array), and a 'chapter' tag (Codex / Ultramarines / ImperialFists / IronHands / Salamanders / RavenGuard / WhiteScars / BloodAngels / DarkAngels / BlackTemplars / SpaceWolves / Deathwatch). Filtered per chapter via _SM_CHAPTER_TAGS. Stratagems may have optional 'mathBuff' for Mathhammer toggles.

Gladius Task Force.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle.

Devastator Doctrine — This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
Tactical Doctrine — This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
Assault Doctrine — This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Only In Death Does Duty End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Honour the Chapter
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: [LANCE] = +1 to Wound on charge. (Under Assault Doctrine also +1 AP — toggle a separate +1 AP if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Adaptive Strategy
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Devastator, Tactical or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that doctrine this battle.

stratagems.name: Storm of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] ranged. (Devastator Doctrine adds +1 AP — toggle separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Squad Tactics
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine. Cannot select a unit within Engagement Range of enemy units.

Anvil Siege Force.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [HEAVY] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model's unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Rigid Discipline
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6". It must end that move either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Not One Backwards Step
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

stratagems.name: No Threat Too Great
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Wound re-roll ranged vs MONSTER/VEHICLE — toggle when modelling that target.

stratagems.name: Battle Drill Recall
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ranged. (Remained Stationary also gives Crit on 5+ — toggle separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Hail of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Ironstorm Spearhead.rule: Once per phase for each ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

stratagems.name: Unbowed Conviction
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Mercy Is Weakness
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a VEHICLE, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] vs below-Starting-Strength targets — toggle when modelling that case. VEHICLE attackers also crit on 5+.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Animus
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
