stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: Ancient Fury
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model's Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit for ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER. Also +1 T / +1 LD / +1 OC / +1 Move (not mathhammer-modelled).

stratagems.name: Power of the Machine Spirit
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Firestorm Assault Force.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Crucible of Battle
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound vs closest target within 6" — toggle when modelling that range/target.

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your INFANTRY unit can embark within that TRANSPORT. Cannot target a unit within Engagement Range of enemy units or that cannot normally embark.

stratagems.name: Immolation Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] on Torrent weapons only.

stratagems.name: Onslaught of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit ranged vs closest target within 12". Disembarked this turn — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Burning Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so.

Stormlance Task Force.rule: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ranged for weapons that already had [ASSAULT]. (Non-Assault weapons just gain Assault, no math change.)

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit (excluding WALKERS) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is MOUNTED.

stratagems.name: Shock Assault
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

mathBuff.note: [LANCE] = +1 to Wound on charge. ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit on the charge.

stratagems.name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Wind-swift Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". Cannot select a unit within Engagement Range of enemy units.

Vanguard Spearhead.rule: Each time a ranged attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.when: Start of the Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is Sabotaged, remaining under your control even if you have no models within range, until your opponent controls it. While Sabotaged, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Surgical Strikes
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Strike From the Shadows
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 BS and +1 AP ranged vs targets more than 12" away — toggle when modelling that range.

stratagems.name: Calculated Feint
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Tactics
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Each unit must be more than 3" away from all enemy models.

1st Company Task Force.rule: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Heroes of the Chapter
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit. Veteran/Terminator unit only. (Also +1 to Wound if Below Half-strength — toggle separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Terrifying Proficiency
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent's next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. Subtract 1 from that test if the unit taking it is Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Duty and Honour
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Orbital Teleportarium
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It arrives back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Legendary Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Librarius Conclave.rule:
At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines abilities. Friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER units have that ability until the end of the battle round.
Biomancy Discipline: This unit has +2" M.
Divination Discipline: This unit's attacks can re-roll Hit rolls of 1 and re-roll Wound rolls of 1.
Pyromancy Discipline: This unit's ranged attacks that target an enemy unit within 12" of this unit have +1 AP.
Telekinesis Discipline: Ranged attacks that target this unit have -1 S.
Telepathy Discipline: This unit's attacks can ignore modifiers to BS, WS and Hit rolls.

Bastion Task Force.rule:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back, and are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Codex Discipline
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1. (Auspex scanned target also re-rolls Wounds of 1 — toggle separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Guided Disruption
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army has finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the MONSTER or VEHICLE keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned (-2 Move, -2 Charge).

stratagems.name: Light of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] for BATTLELINE unit (or any unit vs auspex scanned target). Alt option: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — toggle that instead if preferred.

stratagems.name: Shock Bombardment
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed (each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll).

stratagems.name: Angels Defiant
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Heresy Undone
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.

Orbital Assault Force.rule:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of ADEPTUS ASTARTES units (excluding TITANIC units) from your army based on the battle size (Incursion 2 / Strike Force 3 / Onslaught 4). Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a DROP POD this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Suppression Strafing
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test (-1). If failed, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed (-1 to Hit). Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Tactical Decapitation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit vs CHARACTER targets — toggle when modelling that target. All weapons also have [PRECISION].

stratagems.name: Shock Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Auto-sense Coordination
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have this ability in a turn in which they disembarked from a DROP POD or while targeting an enemy unit within 12".

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] for disembarked-from-Drop-Pod or vs targets within 12". Alt: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — toggle that instead if preferred.

stratagems.name: Blind Screen
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding TITANIC) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES SMOKE VEHICLE or DROP POD unit within 9" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Onward For the Emperor
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

Ceramite Sentinels.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if that model's unit is within a terrain feature, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army gain the ENTRENCHED keyword while all of the following are true: that unit is within a terrain feature; that unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn; no model in that unit has moved more than 3" this turn.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Might
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Priority Strike
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Wound re-roll vs CHARACTER/MONSTER/VEHICLE — toggle when modelling that target.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Stand to the End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an ENTRENCHED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Augmented Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If your unit is ENTRENCHED, ranged weapons have BOTH [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LETHAL HITS] instead.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ranged. (ENTRENCHED also adds [LETHAL HITS] — toggle Lethal Hits separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Evasive Repositioning
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If ENTRENCHED, you can re-roll the D6.

Armoured Speartip.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT (excluding FLY) that made a Normal or Advance move this phase (excluding those that arrived from Strategic Reserves), that disembarked unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to D3+3" instead if that TRANSPORT is a HEAVY TRANSPORT.

KEYWORDS: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT units from your army (excluding FLY) with a Wounds characteristic of 14+ have the HEAVY TRANSPORT keyword.

stratagems.name: Machine Wrath
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a HEAVY TRANSPORT unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That HEAVY TRANSPORT unit, if you rolled a 6 for Deadly Demise. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise resolves, and before embarked units perform Emergency Disembarkation. Can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS/VEHICLES); auto-pass Desperate Escape tests.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units, and one friendly HEAVY TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is wholly within 6" of that HEAVY TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Ceramite Sledgehammer
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. HEAVY TRANSPORT also moves through enemy models (excluding M/V); auto-pass Desperate Escape.

stratagems.name: Advanced Deployment
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase and cannot declare a charge (unless Assault Ramp).

stratagems.name: Purgation Doctrine
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit disembarked from a HEAVY TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit ranged. (Disembarked from HEAVY TRANSPORT also gives +1 to Wound — toggle separately if modelling.)

Headhunter Task Force.rule:
Each time a TANK ACE unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Each time a TANK ACE unit from your army shoots in your Shooting phase, if that unit did not Advance this turn, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

KEYWORDS: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units from your army (excluding FORTIFICATIONS, DROP PODS, WALKERS and units that can FLY) have the TANK ACE keyword. In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to three TANK ACE units from your army to gain the CHARACTER keyword.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Target Weak Point
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. Cannot be targeted with this and Kill Shot in the same phase.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP ranged vs MONSTER/VEHICLE for TANK ACE — toggle when modelling that target.

stratagems.name: Kill Shot
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is below Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead. Cannot be targeted with this and Target Weak Point in the same phase.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 vs MONSTER/VEHICLE for TANK ACE. (Below Starting Strength target: full Wound re-roll — toggle that separately.)

stratagems.name: Rapid Gunnery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Reactive Repositioning
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units with Wounds 16+) that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Machine Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units with Wounds 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.

Emperor's Shield.rule:
Each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Each time a model in a DARNATH LYSANDER unit from your army makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include IMPERIAL FISTS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Fury of the First
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit. Veteran/Terminator only. (Below Starting Strength also gives +1 to Wound — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Obdurate Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Wrathful Conquerors
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any phase.

stratagems.name: Disciplined Extermination
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP ranged and [IGNORES COVER] for Veteran/Terminator unit.

stratagems.name: Dropship Extraction
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Blade of Ultramar.rule:
At the start of up to three of your Command phases, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You cannot select a Combat Doctrine you have already selected this battle, unless a friendly MARNEUS CALGAR model is on the battlefield.

Devastator — Eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
Tactical — Eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
Assault — Eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include ULTRAMARINES units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Tactical Foresight
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Courage and Honour!
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: [LANCE] = +1 to Wound on charge. (Assault Doctrine also adds +1 AP — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Ultramarian Adaptivity
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Devastator, Tactical or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for your unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine, even if you have already selected it this battle.

stratagems.name: Exemplary Vigilance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] ranged. (Devastator Doctrine adds +1 AP — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Practical Tactics
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units and within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.

Reclamation Force.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes a melee attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Each time an attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, if your unit is within range of an objective marker that you controlled at the start of the phase and if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit or your unit has the TITUS keyword, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

RESTRICTIONS: ULTRAMARINES units only.

stratagems.name: Crusading Conquerors
stratagems.when: End of the Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Furious Dedication
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not declared a charge or been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Charge rolls made for your unit and add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. Once per turn.

mathBuff.note: +1 Attack melee. (Also +2 to Charge roll.)

stratagems.name: Fight to the End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Scions of Guilliman
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Ultramarian Destiny
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Marching Ever On
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6"+1.

Shadowmark Talon.rule:
Each time a ranged attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Unparalleled Tactician: Once per battle round, if an AETHON SHAAN model from your army is on the battlefield, you can use the Into Darkness Stratagem for 0CP.

RESTRICTIONS: RAVEN GUARD units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Lay Low the Tyrants
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Feint and Thrust
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD, also eligible to shoot and declare a charge after Advancing.

stratagems.name: Stunning Fusillade
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. Destroyed models trigger a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 BS and +1 AP ranged vs targets more than 12" away — toggle when modelling that range.

stratagems.name: Raptorial Vigilance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.

stratagems.name: Into Darkness
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Forgefather's Seekers.rule:
Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

Seeker's Companions: If your army includes VULKAN HE'STAN, during your turn, each INFERNUS SQUAD unit from your army is eligible to: Start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced; Shoot in a turn in which it started to perform an Action.

RESTRICTIONS: SALAMANDERS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Crucible of Battle
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound vs closest target within 6" — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Wrathful Inferno
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Immolation Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] on Torrent weapons only.

stratagems.name: Burning Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so.

stratagems.name: Blazing Earth
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army equipped with one or more Torrent weapons.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS, VEHICLES, FLY) within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll.

Hammer of Avernii.rule:
Each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Recalculating: Once per battle round, after your Oath of Moment target is destroyed, if a CAANOK VAR model from your army is on the battlefield, select one enemy unit visible to that model. That enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until you select a new one.

RESTRICTIONS: IRON HANDS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Ruthless Butchery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES DREADNOUGHT, TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit for Dreadnought/Veteran/Terminator. (Below Starting Strength: +1 to Wound — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Dominator Beacon
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES DREADNOUGHT, TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Cogitated Ferocity
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES DREADNOUGHT, TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee for Dreadnought/Veteran/Terminator. Alt: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — toggle that instead if preferred.

stratagems.name: Augmetic Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Dropship Extraction
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Spearpoint Task Force.ruleName: Storm-swift Onslaught + Wrath of the First Khan
Spearpoint Task Force.rule:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Wrath of the First Khan: At the end of the Fight phase, if a SUBODEN KHAN unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

RESTRICTIONS: WHITE SCARS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Spear Thrust and Sabre Swing
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LANCE] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If MOUNTED, weapons have BOTH [LANCE] and [LETHAL HITS] instead.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee. Alt: [LANCE] (+1 Wound on charge). MOUNTED units get both — toggle additionally.

stratagems.name: Mobile Lethality
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Hunter's Instincts
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit. Cannot target a unit within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Evasive Manoeuvres
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Withdraw and Regroup
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Companions of Vehemence.rule:
You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army.

RESTRICTIONS: BLACK TEMPLARS units only.

Note: Templar Vows replaces Oath of Moment for BT. Select one Vow at start of battle round 1: Abhor the Witch (re-roll Charge vs PSYKER, [PRECISION] vs PSYKER); Accept Any Challenge (+1 Wound if Strength <= Toughness); Suffer Not the Unclean to Live (charge after Fall Back, free Pile-in/Consol direction); Uphold the Honour of the Emperor (objective lock, INFANTRY Action after Advance).

stratagems.name: Devout Push
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". Cannot be targeted with this and Hearts Hardened to Duty in the same phase unless CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR.

stratagems.name: Hearts Hardened to Duty
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model (or closest enemy unit if Suffer Not the Unclean Vow is active).

stratagems.name: For the Emperor's Honour!
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Pious Enmity
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 melee for CHAPLAIN/JUDICIAR. (Vs MONSTER/VEHICLE: also re-roll Wounds of 1 — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Heresy Begets Retribution
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Retribution move. Roll one D6: models in your unit move up to that result, must end as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). Can move within Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Dread Crusaders
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Vindication Task Force.rule:
Each time an attack targets an ANCIENT unit from your army, if that unit is within range of one or more objective markers and the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Each time a CRUSADER SQUAD unit from your army makes a Righteous Zeal move, that unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

RESTRICTIONS: BLACK TEMPLARS units only.

stratagems.name: Refusal to Yield
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ANCIENT model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That ANCIENT model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of enemy units, with its full wounds remaining. Once per battle per model.

stratagems.name: Litanies of Purgation
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if that model's unit is within range of one or more objective markers or the target unit is within range of one or more objective markers, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP melee. Either attacker or target unit must be within range of an objective marker — toggle when modelling that case.

stratagems.name: Spoor of the Unholy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to: that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] ranged. Also ignore Hit/BS/WS modifiers (handles enemy debuffs).

stratagems.name: Reclaim Our Honour!
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys an ANCIENT model from your army that has not been targeted with Refusal to Yield this phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army visible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Recitation of the Revered
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ANCIENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Perfervid Intervention
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within 6" of one or more enemy units and eligible to declare a charge against one or more.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. No Charge bonus this turn.

Godhammer Assault Force.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army declares a charge, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, after selecting the targets of that charge, select one of those targets; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Each time a model in an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army makes a melee attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll.

RESTRICTIONS: BLACK TEMPLARS units only.

stratagems.name: A Ceaseless Cause
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Cannot embark within a TRANSPORT if it disembarked from one this turn.

stratagems.name: Uncompromising Egress
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LAND RAIDER model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit embarked within your LAND RAIDER can disembark. Models can be set up anywhere wholly within 6" of your LAND RAIDER and can be set up within Engagement Range of enemy units.

stratagems.name: Gauntlet of the God-Emperor
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Focused Hatred
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after you make a Charge roll for an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Charge move, models in your unit can move through models.

stratagems.name: Condemnatory Info-screed
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that TRANSPORT has the LAND RAIDER keyword, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 melee. Disembarked from TRANSPORT this turn. (LAND RAIDER: full Wound re-roll — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Blessed Hull
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Wrathful Procession.rule:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Litanies listed below. If you do, until the end of the battle round, that Litany is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY and ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED units from your army.

Chorus of Relentless Hate — Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit and add 1 to Advance rolls made for it.
Rite of Perfervid Wrath — Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.
Chant of Deathless Devotion — Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

RESTRICTIONS: BLACK TEMPLARS units only.

stratagems.name: Fuelled by Faith
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Castigate the Demagogues
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Brute Fervour
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and you can ignore any or all modifiers to: that attack's Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 melee. Also ignores WS/Hit/Wound roll modifiers (handles enemy debuffs).

stratagems.name: Relentless Momentum
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when determining which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models within 3" of enemy models are eligible. They can target enemy units within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Voice of Devotion
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select Chorus of Relentless Hate, Rite of Perfervid Wrath or Chant of Deathless Devotion. Until the end of the battle round, that Litany is active for your unit instead of any other Litany that is active for your army.

Liberator Assault Group.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

RESTRICTIONS: BLOOD ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Angelic Grace
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army has a mortal wound allocated to it.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Savage Echoes
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just charged by an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select either Strength or Attacks characteristic of melee weapons. Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the selected characteristic. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and add 1 to BOTH Strength and Attacks instead.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength melee. Alt: +1 Attack. (Red Thirst: both +1 S and +1 A — toggle Attacks +1 separately if going Battle-shocked.)

stratagems.name: Red Rampage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either [LANCE] or [LETHAL HITS]. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons have the selected ability. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and have BOTH abilities.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee. Alt: [LANCE] (+1 Wound on charge). (Red Thirst: both — toggle Lance separately if going Battle-shocked.)

stratagems.name: Aggressive Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army has Advanced.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot OR declare a charge, even though it Advanced. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and be eligible to BOTH shoot and declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Relentless Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot OR declare a charge after Falling Back. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and BOTH shoot and declare a charge.

The Lost Brethren.rule:
Each time a DEATH COMPANY model from your army makes a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 if that model's unit is below its Starting Strength; if that model's unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

KEYWORDS: DEATH COMPANY MARINES and DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLT RIFLES units gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

RESTRICTIONS: BLOOD ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Glorious Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was just destroyed while within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Final Retribution
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if your unit is within 12" of a friendly CHAPLAIN; on a 4+, do not remove. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Furious Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before a DEATH COMPANY unit from your army Piles in.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If within 12" of a CHAPLAIN or below Starting Strength, up to 6" instead.

stratagems.name: Lost to Rage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that is below Starting Strength and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. Unless within 12" of a CHAPLAIN, those weapons have [HAZARDOUS].

mathBuff.note: +1 A, +1 S, +1 AP melee for DEATH COMPANY unit below Starting Strength. (Without nearby CHAPLAIN: weapons are [HAZARDOUS] — kills models on Hit rolls of 1.)

stratagems.name: Wrathful Rampage
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DEATH COMPANY unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If within 12" of a CHAPLAIN or below Starting Strength, also eligible to shoot.

The Angelic Host.rule:
At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of enemy units). Maximum: Incursion 1 / Strike Force 2 / Onslaught 3.

Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set each of those units up using their Deep Strike ability.

RESTRICTIONS: BLOOD ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Unbridled Ardour
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Angel's Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of all of its attacks.

stratagems.name: Martial Exemplars
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee for JUMP PACK unit. Also [PRECISION] (can target Characters in a unit).

stratagems.name: Descent of Angels
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. Not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Death From the Skies
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Angelic Inheritors.rule:
At the start of the first battle round, select two of the Angelic Legacy abilities listed below. Until the end of the battle, those Angelic Legacy abilities are active and their effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER units from your army.

Sanguinary Grace — Eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
Carmine Wrath — Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
Their Appointed Hour — You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

RESTRICTIONS: BLOOD ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Focused Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a CHARACTER unit, those weapons have the [LANCE] ability as well.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee. (CHARACTER units also gain [LANCE] = +1 Wound on charge — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Instant of Grace
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one non-CHARACTER model in your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the CHARACTER keyword (so it interacts with Legacy of the Angel).

stratagems.name: Strike Now For Glory
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ranged.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Great Wings
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Unto the Burning Skies
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units, unless it is THE SANGUINOR.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Rage-Cursed Onslaught.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit. If your unit is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic instead.

RESTRICTIONS: BLOOD ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: A Grim Warning
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One BLOOD ANGELS unit from your army that was just destroyed while within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
