stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Insensate Rampage
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Limb From Limb
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Select either Strength or Armour Penetration of melee weapons. Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the selected characteristic. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and add 1 to BOTH.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength melee. Alt: +1 AP. (Red Thirst: both — toggle +1 AP separately if going Battle-shocked.)

stratagems.name: Deathless Duty
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Red Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot OR declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. Or give in to Red Thirst (Battle-shocked) and BOTH shoot and declare a charge.

Unforgiven Task Force.rule:
While an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army is Battle-shocked, change the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit to 1, instead of 0.

In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army; until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

RESTRICTIONS: DARK ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Unforgiven Fury
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are currently Battle-shocked, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] all weapons. (Any Battle-shocked unit also gives Crit on 5+ — toggle separately if modelling.)

stratagems.name: Intractable
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Fire Discipline
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT], [HEAVY] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

mathBuff.note: [HEAVY] gives +1 to Hit when stationary; [IGNORES COVER] always. Also [ASSAULT] (shoot after Advance).

stratagems.name: Grim Retribution
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target the enemy unit that just attacked it.

stratagems.name: Unbreakable Lines
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Inner Circle Task Force.rule:
At the start of your Movement phase, select one of the following:
- Defensive Footing: Select one objective marker you control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that objective marker is your Vowed objective marker.
- Aggressive Push: Select one or more objective markers you do not control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, each of those objective markers is one of your Vowed objective markers.

Each time a DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more of your Vowed objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

RESTRICTIONS: DARK ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Martial Mastery
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 melee for DEATHWING INFANTRY. (Within range of Vowed objective marker: full Wound re-roll — toggle separately.)

stratagems.name: Duty Unto Death
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker. On a 4+, do not remove it from play.

stratagems.name: Relic Teleportarium
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models. Not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Wrath of the Lion
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that just ended a Charge move.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit, adding 1 if that enemy unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (max 3).

stratagems.name: Unmatched Fortitude
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than your unit's Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Company of Hunters.rule:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to shoot in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

KEYWORDS: OUTRIDER SQUAD units gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

RESTRICTIONS: DARK ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Hunters' Trail
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One RAVENWING MOUNTED unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Talon Strike
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One RAVENWING MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY CHARACTER or MOUNTED CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound vs INFANTRY/MOUNTED CHARACTER for RAVENWING MOUNTED — toggle when modelling that target.

stratagems.name: Death on the Wind
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a RAVENWING unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that was hit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test. -1 if RAVENWING units are within 6".

stratagems.name: High-speed Focus
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One RAVENWING unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Rapid Reappraisal
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One RAVENWING unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Wrath of the Rock.rule: Each time an attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Inescapable Justice
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your Oath of Moment target is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until the start of your next Command phase.

stratagems.name: Lion's Will
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, if your unit does not have DEATHWING, RAVENWING or VEHICLE, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit (excluding DEATHWING/RAVENWING/VEHICLE — toggle off if those). Also +1 OC.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Tactical Mastery
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If RAVENWING, also after Falling Back.

stratagems.name: Relics of the Dark Age
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit.

mathBuff.note: +2 to Strength ranged. ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY/MOUNTED only.

stratagems.name: Leonine Aggression
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within 3" of enemy units, or one DEATHWING unit within 6".
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units. No Charge bonus this turn.

Lion's Blade Task Force.rule:
Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of one or more RAVENWING units from your army Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. If Battle-shocked, subtract 1.

Each time a DEATHWING unit from your army declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more RAVENWING units from your army, add 2 to the Charge roll.

RESTRICTIONS: DARK ANGELS units only.

stratagems.name: Overpowering Exaction
stratagems.when: Command phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. -1 if your unit has DEATHWING or RAVENWING. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Strength in Unity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of RAVENWING units, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If within Engagement Range of DEATHWING units, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, if Strength > Toughness of target, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Knights of Iron
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One RAVENWING unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Illuminating Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a RAVENWING unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of your unit that was selected as the target. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly DEATHWING unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound for DEATHWING vs target marked by a RAVENWING unit's shooting — toggle when modelling that combo.

stratagems.name: Inescapable Wrath
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY or DEATHWING WALKER unit from your army within 6" of enemy units and eligible to charge.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units. No Charge bonus this turn.

Black Spear Task Force.rule:
RESTRICTIONS: ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH units only. Cannot include: Assault Squad / Attack Bike Squad / Devastator Squad / Land Speeder Storm / Relic Terminator Squad / Scout Bike Squad / Scout Squad / Scout Sniper Squad / Tactical Squad / Terminator Assault Squad / Terminator Squad / Vanguard Veteran Squad / Vanguard Veteran with Jump Packs (and a few others).

Mission Tactics: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Mission Tactics. Each can only be selected once per battle.

Furor — Weapons have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].
Malleus — Weapons have [LETHAL HITS].
Purgatus — If a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has [PRECISION].

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KILL TEAM units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: For each unit targeted, select Furor, Malleus or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Mission Tactic is active for that unit instead of any army-wide tactic.

stratagems.name: Hellfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] abilities. Cannot stack with Kraken or Dragonfire.

stratagems.name: Kraken Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve the Range characteristic of those weapons by 6".

mathBuff.note: +1 AP ranged for KILL TEAM. Cannot stack with Hellfire or Dragonfire.

stratagems.name: Dragonfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities. Cannot stack with Kraken or Hellfire.

stratagems.name: Site-to-site Teleportation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KILL TEAM units, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Until the end of your next Movement phase, models without Deep Strike have Deep Strike.

Saga of the Hunter.rule:
Each time a model in a SPACE WOLVES unit from your army makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit, if that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more other ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army, or if the attacking unit contains more models than that enemy unit: Add 1 to the Hit roll. If your Saga is completed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Saga of the Hunter: Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army fights, after all attacks have been resolved, add 1 to your Quarry tally for each enemy unit destroyed by those attacks. Once your Quarry tally is equal to or greater than (Incursion 2 / Strike Force 3 / Onslaught 4), your Saga is completed.

stratagems.name: Hunters' Trail
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Territorial Advantage
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed by an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or one SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit within Engagement Range.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Chosen Prey
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPACE WOLVES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Bounding Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC).

stratagems.name: Marked for Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army (excluding BEASTS) that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to both of your units. Until the end of the phase, models in your units can only target that enemy unit and each time a model in one of your units makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (must target the marked enemy unit only).

Saga of the Bold.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, apply one of the following: If your Saga is completed, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll. Otherwise, if that unit is a SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll.

Saga of the Bold: Once three or more different Boasts (Your Hide as a Trophy / Slay Them All / Overrun Their Position / Hold the Line) have been achieved by units from your army, your Saga is completed.

stratagems.name: Inspiring Presence
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] melee for ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.

stratagems.name: Champion's Guidance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll for SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit.

stratagems.name: Birth of a Saga
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Wolf Guard Headtaker or Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the CHARACTER keyword (so it interacts with Heroes All rule).

stratagems.name: Alpha Strike
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Heroic Resolve
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Countercharge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army within 6" of enemy units and eligible to charge.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only one or more of those enemy units. No Charge bonus this turn.

Saga of the Beastslayer.rule:
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if that attack targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit or if your Saga is completed, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Saga of the Beastslayer: At the start of the first battle round, your Beastslayer tally is 0, and you determine your Beastslayer target by halving the number of CHARACTER/MONSTER/VEHICLE units in your opponent's army (rounding up). Each time you destroy one, add 1 to your tally. Once tally >= target, Saga is completed.

stratagems.name: Unbridled Ferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound melee. SPACE WOLVES unit, Fight phase only.

stratagems.name: Shock Cavalry
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models and sections of terrain features 4" or less in height.

stratagems.name: Pinning Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after your unit has shot, select one enemy CHARACTER, MONSTER, or VEHICLE unit hit. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned (-2 Move, -2 Charge).

stratagems.name: Thunderous Pursuit
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY, up to 6" instead.

stratagems.name: Impetuosity
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WULFEN INFANTRY or BLOOD CLAWS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after that enemy unit has shot, if one or more models in your unit were destroyed, your unit can make an Impetuous move. Roll one D6: move up to that result, must end as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). Can move within Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Strike
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Champions of Fenris.rule:
At the end of your opponent's Charge phase, each ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY and ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army within 3" of enemy units and eligible to declare a charge can do so, resolving as if your Charge phase. No Charge bonus this turn.

While ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR units from your army are not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in those units.

RESTRICTIONS: SPACE WOLVES units only.

stratagems.name: Preytaker's Eye
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] for ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY. Alt: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — toggle that instead if preferred.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Runes of Claiming
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Chilling Howl
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that unit is Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Stalking Wolves
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: Onrushing Storm
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Saga of the Great Wolf.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Hunting Packs listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hunting Pack is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You can only select each Hunting Pack once per battle.

Encircling Jaws — This unit can re-roll Advance rolls and Charge rolls.
Hunter's Eye — Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
Ferocious Strike — Each time this unit is selected to fight, select either [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until end of phase, weapons have selected ability.

Howling Onslaught: Once per battle, when selecting a Hunting Pack, if a LOGAN GRIMNAR model from your army is on the battlefield, you can select a Hunting Pack you have already selected this battle.

RESTRICTIONS: SPACE WOLVES units only.

stratagems.name: The Foe Foreseen
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Grimnar's Command
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hunting Pack from the Master of Wolves Detachment rule. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hunting Pack is active for your unit instead of any other Hunting Pack, even if you have already selected it this battle.

stratagems.name: Fenrisian Ferocity
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models (excluding TITANIC) and terrain features.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If SPACE WOLVES, also after Advancing or Falling Back.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Pack
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Wound ranged. ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.

stratagems.name: Battle Instincts
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Fulguris Task Force.rule:
Friendly LAND SPEEDER / STORM SPEEDER HAILSTRIKE / STORM SPEEDER HAMMERSTRIKE / STORM SPEEDER THUNDERSTRIKE units have the SPEEDER keyword.
In your first Movement phase, friendly SPEEDER units can make an ingress move.

stratagems.name: Data-Link Augury
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly SPEEDER unit is selected to shoot.
stratagems.target: That SPEEDER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until your unit has shot.

stratagems.name: Reactive Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged SPEEDER unit.
stratagems.target: That SPEEDER unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

stratagems.name: Anti-Grav Surge
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged SPEEDER unit.
stratagems.effect: Place your unit in Strategic Reserves.

Subversion Assets.rule:
Friendly PHOBOS / SCOUT SQUAD units have the following ability:
Transhuman Perception: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected. While a unit is detected, that unit has +3" detection range.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Operations
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit starts an Action.
stratagems.target: That PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: That Action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

stratagems.name: Strike from the Shadows
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

stratagems.name: Cloaked Position
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.

Marshal's Household.rule:
Friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD units have +1 OC.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include BLACK TEMPLARS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Slayers of Abominations
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's melee attacks that target a MONSTER/VEHICLE unit have +2 S.

mathBuff.note: +2 Strength on melee attacks vs MONSTER/VEHICLE.

stratagems.name: Blade of Detestation
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit ends a charge move.
stratagems.target: That SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit engaged with that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Unsparing Execution
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.target: That SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, that enemy unit must use the Desperate Escape mode, with -1 to those hazard rolls if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked.

The Living Miracle.rule:
When a friendly EMPEROR'S CHAMPION unit is selected to fight, that model's melee attacks can re-roll one Hit roll and re-roll one Wound roll.
Enhancements selected from this detachment do not count towards the total number of enhancements in your army.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include BLACK TEMPLARS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

Dark Age Arsenal.rule:
Friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES units' weapon profiles with 'Plasma' in their names are plasma weapon profiles.
Plasma weapon profiles have +1 S.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include DARK ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Searing Bursts
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly HELLBLASTER SQUAD unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That HELLBLASTER SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by your unit's plasma ranged attacks. That enemy unit is seared until the start of your next turn. While a unit is seared, that unit has -2" M.

stratagems.name: No Sacrifice Too Great
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is selected to shoot.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's [HAZARDOUS] plasma ranged attacks have +1 S.

stratagems.name: Revelation of Guilt
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is selected to shoot.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's plasma ranged attacks have +1 to Hit rolls.

Darkflight Pursuit.rule:
Friendly RAVENWING FLY units' ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include DARK ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Surveillance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly RAVENWING FLY unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That RAVENWING FLY unit.
stratagems.effect: Visible enemy units within 6" of your unit have +3" detection range.

stratagems.name: Wings of Shadow
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly RAVENWING FLY unit.
stratagems.target: That RAVENWING FLY unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: We Are Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged RAVENWING FLY unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That RAVENWING FLY unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

Interrogation Conclave.rule:
In the Fight phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit destroys an enemy unit, enemy units within 6" of that CHAPLAIN unit must take a Battle-shock test.
Friendly CHAPLAIN units have the following ability:
Sower of Dread (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, that enemy unit has -1 Ld.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include DARK ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Exacting Punishment
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit is selected to attack.
stratagems.target: That CHAPLAIN unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's attacks have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Terrifying Zeal
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit ends a charge move.
stratagems.target: That CHAPLAIN unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) engaged with your unit. That enemy unit takes a Leadership test; if it fails, that enemy unit's attacks have -1 to Hit rolls until the end of the turn.

stratagems.name: Wages of Cowardice
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly CHAPLAIN unit ends a Fall Back move, if that CHAPLAIN unit is unengaged.
stratagems.target: That CHAPLAIN unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

Legacy of Grace.rule:
Friendly BLOOD ANGELS INFANTRY CHARACTER units (excluding Commander Dante) have +1 to Advance rolls and Charge rolls.
This detachment has the GRACE tag and cannot be taken with another GRACE detachment.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Martial Paragon
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit is selected to attack.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's attacks have [LETHAL HITS], or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] instead.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] for an ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER.

stratagems.name: Soul-darkened Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, that enemy unit must use the Desperate Escape mode, with -1 to those hazard rolls if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Aura of the Angel's Grace
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.target: That CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has a 5+ invulnerable save.

Encarmine Speartip.rule:
When a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to shoot or to declare a charge.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Judgement of the Golden Host
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit ends a charge move.
stratagems.target: That SANGUINARY GUARD unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit engaged with that enemy unit: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Inexorable Valour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit ends a Fall Back move, if that SANGUINARY GUARD unit is unengaged.
stratagems.target: That SANGUINARY GUARD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

stratagems.name: Blinding Blurs of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit.
stratagems.target: That SANGUINARY GUARD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has the Stealth ability.

Wrath of the Doomed.rule:
When a friendly DEATH COMPANY unit is selected to make an Advance move, you can use this ability. If you do: that unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds; and that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
This detachment has the DOOMED tag and cannot be taken with another DOOMED detachment.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include BLOOD ANGELS units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Death Begets Vengeance
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a friendly DEATH COMPANY unit is destroyed by an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit is hated until the end of the battle. While a unit is hated, friendly DEATH COMPANY units' attacks that target that unit have +1 to Wound rolls.

stratagems.name: No Barrier to Retribution
stratagems.when: Your Movement or Charge phase, when a friendly DEATH COMPANY DREADNOUGHT unit is selected to make a Normal, Advance or charge move.
stratagems.target: That DEATH COMPANY DREADNOUGHT unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has the MOBILE ability (can move through terrain/models as noted).

stratagems.name: Rage-fuelled Response
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged DEATH COMPANY unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That DEATH COMPANY unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

Legends of Saga and Song.rule:
Friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR units have +1 to Charge rolls.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include SPACE WOLVES units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Fangs of the Pack
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Chilling Howl
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test, with -1 if that enemy unit is at or below half-strength.

stratagems.name: Wings of the Blizzard
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit.
stratagems.effect: Place your unit in Strategic Reserves.

Veterans of the Fang.rule:
When a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit starts an Action, that Action does not prevent the unit from being eligible to shoot.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can split a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit into two units, each with a Starting Strength of 5.
RESTRICTIONS: Your army can include SPACE WOLVES units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

stratagems.name: Grizzled Killers
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That GREY HUNTERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1], or [LETHAL HITS] instead.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] melee for GREY HUNTERS.

stratagems.name: Icy Calm
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit is selected to make an Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That GREY HUNTERS unit.
stratagems.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an Action.

stratagems.name: Blade-Keen Senses
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One friendly unengaged GREY HUNTERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

enhancements.name: Divine Aspect
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

enhancements.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Litanies of Faith
enhancements.desc: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Saintly Example
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Through Suffering, Strength
enhancements.desc: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Ophelia
enhancements.desc: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

enhancements.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
enhancements.desc: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.

enhancements.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

enhancements.name: Verse of Holy Piety
enhancements.desc: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

enhancements.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
enhancements.desc: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
enhancements.desc: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Righteous Rage
enhancements.desc: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).

enhancements.name: Fire and Fury
enhancements.desc: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

enhancements.name: Triptych of Judgement
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of Devotion
enhancements.desc: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Oracle
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Amulet
enhancements.desc: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this units have an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units: 
- Battle Sisters Squad
- Celestian Sacresants
- Dominion Squad
- Retributor Squad
- Sisters Novitiate Squad

abilities.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Defenders of the Faith
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.Keywords: Anti-Psyker 2+, Devastating Wounds, Precision, Rapid Fire 1

wargearAbilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
wargearAbilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

models.name: Battle Sister w/ Special or Heavy Weapon

abilities.name: The Emperor's Grace
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

abilities.name: Sacred Command
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units: 
- Battle Sisters Squad
- Celestian Sacresants
- Dominion Squad
- Retributor Squad
- Sisters Novitiate Squad

options.name: Null Rod
options.ability: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

options.name: Rod of Office
options.ability: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.Keywords: Anti-Psyker 2+, Devastating Wounds, Precision, Rapid Fire 1

abilities.name: Rites of Castigation
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Sworn Protectors
abilities.desc: While an ^^**Adepta Sororitas Character^^** is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 4+.

abilities.name: Executioner of Heretics (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Unflinching Determination
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Battle Sisters Squad
■ Celestian Sacresants
■ Dominion Squad
■ Retributor Squad
This model can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, even if one Canoness, Palatine, Junith Eruita, or Aestred Thurga unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Holy Vanguard
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step and this unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, that Leader unit gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Righteous Awareness
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 6+.

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun

wargearAbilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVITIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.
