detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle (scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'). Rebuild with build.ps1.

Hallowed Martyrs.rule: Each time an ADEPTA SORORITAS model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model's unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model's unit is Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Divine Intervention
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model is set back up with that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds). You cannot select SAINT CELESTINE as the target. You cannot select the same CHARACTER more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Suffering and Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY or ADEPTA SORORITAS WALKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

stratagems.name: Righteous Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and, if your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: Full melee Hit re-roll. Wound re-roll ONLY while the unit is Below Half-strength — untick the wound re-roll if not.

stratagems.name: Sanctified Immolation
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: Spirit of the Martyr
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Praise the Fallen
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Army of Faith.rule: Each ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of just one.

stratagems.name: Shield of Faith
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds. If you targeted a JUMP PACK unit, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Light of the Emperor
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is blessed. While blessed, it can ignore any or all modifiers to: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill of its weapons; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws). If your unit has the JUMP PACK keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

stratagems.name: Faith and Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of your unit's attacks this phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

stratagems.name: Blinding Radiance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of such a unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If you targeted a JUMP PACK unit, then while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Divine Guidance
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP on all attacks this phase.

stratagems.name: Angelic Descent
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army (not within Engagement Range of any enemy units).
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Bringers of Flame.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTA SORORITAS models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 6", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Shield of Aversion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Righteous Blows
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of those attacks this phase, select one destroyed model; that model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: Melee weapons gain [LETHAL HITS].

stratagems.name: Carry Forth the Faithful
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just before an ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your TRANSPORT, and units can disembark from your TRANSPORT even though it Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Cleansing Flames
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Torrent weapons only — toggle when simulating a Torrent weapon.

stratagems.name: Rites of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 6" that is also within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed, select one; that model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound vs targets within 6" that are on an objective. Toggle when modelling that situation.

stratagems.name: Blazing Ire
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Champions of Faith.rule:
In your Command phase, you can select up to 3 ADEPTA SORORITAS units from your army (including units embarked within TRANSPORTS). Until the start of your next Command phase, those units are Righteous. While a unit is Righteous:
- Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
- Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.
- Improve the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill of weapons equipped by BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, CELESTIAN SACRESANTS and PARAGON WARSUITS models in that unit by 1.

KEYWORDS: While a CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit from your army is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Celestian Sacresants models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Shield of Denial
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds. If your unit is Righteous, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Suffer Not the Unfaithful
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that is Righteous and that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: Requires a Righteous unit. Models [LETHAL HITS]; alternatively the Stratagem can grant [SUSTAINED HITS 1] instead — pick one in play.

stratagems.name: To the Heart of Heresy
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If your unit is Righteous, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those melee weapons by 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 S melee always; +1 AP only while the unit is Righteous — untick AP if not Righteous.

stratagems.name: Path of the Righteous
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". If your unit is Righteous, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Bastion of Faith
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If your unit is Righteous, you can select one other CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit (not Battle-shocked, within 6"); each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

stratagems.name: Indefatigable Dedication
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is Righteous, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

Penitent Host.rule:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the following Vows of Atonement to be active for your army until the start of the next battle round. You can only select each Vow once per battle.

The Path of the Penitent: Add 3" to the Move characteristic of PENITENT models from your army.

Absolution in Battle: Each time a unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by PENITENT models in that unit.

Death Before Disgrace: Each time a PENITENT model from your army is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Final Redemption
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Purity of Suffering
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, PENITENT models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Passion of the Penitent
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a PENITENT model in your unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Lash of Guilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just before a PENITENT unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That PENITENT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the PENITENT ENGINES keyword, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit until the end of the phase.

stratagems.name: Boundless Zeal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the PENITENT keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

stratagems.name: Devout Fanaticism
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: your unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units.

enhancements.name: Raptor Blade
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons. While the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy **^^Psyker^^** units that are Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Castellan's Mark
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how  any units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Panoptispex
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: From the Hall of Armouries
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Radiant Mantle
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Aegis Projector
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Gift of Terran Artifice
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Champion of the Imperium
enhancements.desc: The range of the bearer’s Null Aegis or Deadly Unity ability (see left) is increased to 9".

enhancements.name: Auric Mantle
enhancements.desc: **^^Shield-Captain^^** or **^^Blade Champion^^** model only. Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: Enhanced Voidsheen Cloak
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made by a **^^Psyker^^** or Battle-shocked model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: Huntress' Eye
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Oblivion Knight
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targeted an enemy **^^Psyker^^** unit, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Blade Imperator
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Once per battle, when the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, all enemy units within 6" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Inspirational Exemplar
enhancements.desc: The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 5+. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Adeptus Custodes^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer: that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Veiled Blade
enhancements.desc: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, triple the bearer's Objective Control characteristic until the end of the turn.

enhancements.name: Martial Philosopher
enhancements.desc: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Honoured Fallen (Aura)
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE model only. While a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes  an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Augury Uplink
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS CUSTODES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Talisman
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Custodes^^** model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Veteran of the Kataphraktoi
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED model only. In your Command phase, select one ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Superior Creation
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Custodes Infantry^^** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Praesidius
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

enhancements.name: Fierce Conqueror
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding  down).

enhancements.name: Admonimortis
enhancements.desc: **^^Shield‑Captain^^** model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by  1.

abilities.desc: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Merciless Hunter
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Advanced Firepower
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Guardian Eternal
abilities.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Devoted to Destruction
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with 2 Telemon caestus weapons in addition to its armoured feet weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those Telemon caestus weapons.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

options.name: Telemon caestus and twin plasma projector

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^Transport^^ this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 8 ^^Adeptus Custodes Infantry^^ models.

abilities.name: Infernus Firebomb
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Dropship
abilities.desc: If a unit disembarks from this TRANSPORT before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligibile to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY models. This model can also transport 1 VENERABLE CONTEMPTOR DREADNOUGHt, 1 CONTEMPTOR-ACHILLUS DREADNOUGHT or 1 CONTEMPTOR GALATUS-DREADNOUGHT; while doing so, its transport capacity is reduced to 6 ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY models.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle (scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'). Rebuild with build.ps1.

Shield Host.rule:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the bullet points below. If you do, until the start of the next battle round, that effect applies:
- Each time an ADEPTUS CUSTODES model from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
- Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ADEPTUS CUSTODES models from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability by 1.

stratagems.name: Arcane Genetic Alchemy
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound has been allocated to an ADEPTUS CUSTODES model from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA models).
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES model's unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Fallen
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those melee weapons instead.

mathBuff.note: +1 A melee (requires the unit below Starting Strength). Set +2 instead while Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Unwavering Sentinels
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that is within range of an objective marker you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Multipotentiality
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that Fell Back this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Vigilance Eternal
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES BATTLELINE unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Archeotech Munitions
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged [LETHAL HITS]; the Stratagem can grant [SUSTAINED HITS 1] instead — pick one in play.

Auric Champions.rule: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER unit from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Slayer of Champions
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected with your Assemblage of Might ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll. In addition, if the destroyed unit was a CHARACTER unit, gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: Superhuman Reserves
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD model from your army has used a 'once per battle' ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use its 'once per battle' ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase). You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: The Emperor's Auspice
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CHARACTER models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Earning of a Name
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CHARACTER model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit & Wound re-roll, but only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets. Toggle when the defender is one of those.

stratagems.name: Vigil Unending
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Shoulder the Mantle
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army that is not leading a unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead. Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit's Starting Strength accordingly.

Lions of the Emperor.rule: Each time a model in an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding VEHICLES) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Gilded Champion
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army has used a 'once per battle' ability on its datasheet.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model.
stratagems.effect: Your model can use that 'once per battle' ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase). You cannot use this Stratagem on the same model more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: Defiant to the Last
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the CHARACTER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Peerless Warrior
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Unleash the Lions
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ALLARUS CUSTODIANS or AQUILON CUSTODIANS unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.

stratagems.name: Manoeuvre and Fire
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Swift as the Eagle
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Null Maiden Vigil.rule:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is either a PSYKER unit or below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more ANATHEMA PSYKANA models from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that unit is Below Half-strength, it must subtract 1 from its Battle-shock test this phase instead.

KEYWORDS: If you select this Detachment, PROSECUTORS units from your army have the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Desperation's Price
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy PSYKER unit has either finished using a Psychic ability that targets a unit, or finished making Psychic Attacks.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit from your army within 18" of that enemy PSYKER unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy PSYKER unit must take a Leadership test. If the test is passed, that PSYKER unit is Battle-shocked; if the test is failed, that PSYKER unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Witch Hunters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability, but models in your unit can only target PSYKER units with their attacks.

mathBuff.note: Only when targeting a PSYKER unit. [LETHAL HITS]; can be [SUSTAINED HITS 1] instead — pick one.

stratagems.name: Anathema Blademastery
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One VIGILATORS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If the target of that attack is Battle-shocked or a PSYKER, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: Full melee Hit re-roll. Wound re-roll only vs Battle-shocked or PSYKER targets — untick it otherwise.

stratagems.name: Psy-chaff Volley
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One PROSECUTORS unit from your army that has just shot.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while your unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is prosecuted. While a unit is prosecuted, each time an ANATHEMA PSYKANA model makes an attack against it, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1. While a PSYKER or Battle-shocked unit is prosecuted, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Purgation Sweep
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One WITCHSEEKERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit. If such a weapon targets a PSYKER or Battle-shocked unit this phase, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic instead.

mathBuff.note: Torrent weapons only: +1 Attacks (set +2 instead vs a PSYKER or Battle-shocked target).

stratagems.name: Psychic Abominations
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and Battle-shocked and PSYKER models can only select your unit as a target of a ranged attack if they are within 12".

Solar Spearhead.rule:
While an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army is at Starting Strength (unless it is an AIRCRAFT or is Battle-shocked), add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
While such a unit is below Starting Strength, each time a model in it makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
While such a unit is Below Half-strength, each time a model in it makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

MORITOI ANCIENTS: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER units from your army and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for such units.

KEYWORDS: In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER models; the selected units gain the CHARACTER keyword (so they can take Enhancements and one can be your WARLORD).

stratagems.name: Flawless Construction
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Emperor's Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the WALKER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Wrathful Advance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army Piles In.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Unstoppable
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE or ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Relentless Persecution
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the WALKER keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

stratagems.name: Punishment Inescapable
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] on ranged weapons (also lets you ignore Hit/BS modifiers).

Talons of the Emperor.rule:
ANATHEMA PSYKANA units from your army gain Null Aegis (Aura): While an ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

All other ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army gain Deadly Unity (Aura): While an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Hunt as One
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your units are eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. You can only select two units if exactly one of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

stratagems.name: Talons Interlocked
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY units from your army, and one enemy unit that is an eligible target for all of those units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of your units makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. You can only select two units if exactly one of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength and +1 AP on ranged attacks (must focus a single target unit).

stratagems.name: Empyric Severance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, and one friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit within 6" of that ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic attacks and mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Emperor's Executioners
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll. You can only select two units if exactly one of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound, but only vs enemy units that are below their Starting Strength. Toggle when modelling that.

stratagems.name: Taloned Pincer
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two ADEPTUS CUSTODES units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your units can make a Normal move of up to 6". You cannot select units within Engagement Range of any enemy units. You can only select two units if exactly one of them is an ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit and both are within 6" of each other.

stratagems.name: Shield of Honour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target, and one other friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY unit (excluding ANATHEMA PSYKANA units) within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, any attack that targets your ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit must instead target your other ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit (unless it is not an eligible target).

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Iron Chalice
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other **^^Imperial Knights^^** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That selected model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if your army is Honoured.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Evanescent Ion
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other **^^Imperial Knights^^** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that selected model has the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Judicant's Helm
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one other **^^Imperial Knights^^** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that selected model have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Lancer's Sigil
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Charge phase, select one other **^^Imperial Knights^^** model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that selected model.

enhancements.name: Vengeful Tread
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. Once per turn, you can target the bearer with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Acquisitor-at-Arms
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. While the bearer is on your defensive line and there are no enemy units on your defensive line, add the bearer's Objective Control characteristic to that of each model affected by the bearer's Bondsman ability.

enhancements.name: Purgation's Hand
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is on your defensive line, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Augury Halo
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, while the bearer is on your defensive line, weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

enhancements.name: Crushing Condemnation
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

enhancements.name: Herald of Triumph
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. When the bearer ends a Charge move, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, the each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Wyrmslayer Divination
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, when the bearer is selected to shoot, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack that targets a unit that can **^^Fly^^**, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Pennant of Silvered Fury
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, melee equipped by the bearer have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability.

enhancements.name: Martial Tuition
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. While two or more **^^Armiger^^** models are under the effects of the bearer's Bondsman ability, once per turn, you can target one of those **^^Armiger^^** models with the Counter-offensive Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Mentor's Pride
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. While two or more **^^Armiger^^** models are under the effects of the bearer's Bondsman ability, each time each of those **^^Armiger^^** models makes an attack, you can re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Fables of Nightmare
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. While two or more **^^Armiger^^** models are under the effects of the bearer's Bondsman ability, melee weapons equipped by those **^^Armiger^^** models have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

enhancements.name: Tales of Heroism
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. While two or more **^^Armiger^^** models are under the effects of the bearer's Bondsman ability, each time one of those **^^Armiger^^** models makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and/or the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Sanctuary
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Mysterious Guardian
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your subsequent Movement phase, set the bearer up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9” horizontally away from all enemy units. If the battle ends and the bearer is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

enhancements.name: Bringer of Justice
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. Improve the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Eye
enhancements.desc: **^^Imperial Knights^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.
