detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string) and 'stratagems' (array of {name, type, cp, when, target, effect}). Optional 'mathBuff' on each stratagem to surface as a Mathhammer toggle (scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'). Rebuild with build.ps1.

Questoris Companions.rule:
At the start of your turn, if your current Oath is fulfilled, determine an additional Oath as normal, except you cannot select a Deed or Quality you have already selected (re-roll/re-select duplicates). If you have already selected every Deed and Quality, do not determine an additional Oath. The Qualities from Oaths you have fulfilled continue to apply to all models with the Code Chivalric ability. When the Deed for an additional Oath is completed, you instead gain 1CP.

Valour's Reward: The Enhancements in this detachment can become expended (you cannot use them while expended). Each time you fulfil your Oath, each expended Enhancement is no longer expended.

stratagems.name: Courageous Stand
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

stratagems.name: Titanic Duel
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER, TITANIC or WALKER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit and +1 Wound, but ONLY vs MONSTER / TITANIC / WALKER targets. Toggle when the defender is one of those.

stratagems.name: Moment of Glory
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Hero's Tread
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: Your Level of Control over that objective marker is 5 (unless it would otherwise be higher), until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Warrior
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Driven by the Past
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Freeblade Company.rule: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS models from your army have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. In addition, at the start of your Command phase, each IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army regains 1 lost wound.

stratagems.name: Noble Sacrifice
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 4+, adding 1 to the result if it is an ARMIGER unit, instead of only a 6.

stratagems.name: Strength from Exile
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 9" of your unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 and Wounds of 1 — only while no other friendly unit is within 9".

stratagems.name: Full Tilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is an ARMIGER or DESTRIER unit.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Barrage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when making ranged attacks with Blast weapons, models in your unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of your unit (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). Your unit does not suffer the penalty to Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range; but each time a model makes a Blast attack against a unit within Engagement Range, on an unmodified Hit roll of 1 your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all its attacks resolve.

stratagems.name: Survivor of Strife
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Flanking Manoeuvres
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER unit from your army that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Gate Warden Lance.rule:
At the start of the first battle round, select two objective markers to be your foundations. Draw a line from any part of one of your foundations to the other; if any part of a model's base (or hull) crosses that line, that model's unit is on your defensive line.

While an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army is on your defensive line, it has Against the Horde: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll, and weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Each time one of your foundations is removed from the battlefield, just after it is removed, select a new objective marker to be one of your foundations.

stratagems.name: Drive Them Out!
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit on your defensive line, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Lancebreaker
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Steadfast Superiority
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that is on your defensive line and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll. Requires the unit to be on your defensive line and in Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Marshal the Defence
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units from your army that have not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your units.

stratagems.name: Titanic Bombardment
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that Remained Stationary this turn, that is on your defensive line and that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [SUSTAINED HITS 2]. Requires Titanic, Remained Stationary, on your defensive line.

stratagems.name: Fortress of Intimidation
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Questor Forgepact.rule:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units from your army have Sacristan Pledge: In your Command phase, one model in this unit regains 1 lost wound; if within 3" of one or more friendly TECH-PRIEST models, one model regains up to D3 lost wounds instead.

ADEPTUS MECHANICUS units from your army have Divine Inspiration: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1; if within 6" of one or more friendly IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

FORGE WORLD ALLIES: You can include the following ADEPTUS MECHANICUS units: TECH-PRIEST DOMINUS; TECH-PRIEST MANIPULUS; SKITARII MARSHAL; SKITARII RANGERS; SKITARII VANGUARD. Combined points by battle size — Incursion: up to 250 pts; Strike Force: up to 500 pts; Onslaught: up to 750 pts. No ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Omnissiah's Grace
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Vengeance of the Machine Cult
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, the enemy unit that destroyed your unit is Marked. Each time an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model from your army makes an attack that targets a Marked unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Bonded Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase, just before an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army uses a Bondsman ability.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: When selecting targets for that Bondsman ability, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit within 12" in addition to, or instead of, selecting one ARMIGER model. Until the start of your next Command phase, every model in that ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit is affected by that Bondsman ability. You cannot target a KNIGHT PRECEPTOR with this Stratagem.

stratagems.name: Machine Focus
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to: the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill of weapons equipped by its models; any Hit roll or Wound roll made for it.

stratagems.name: Aggression Begets Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Throneghiest Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit from your army that is within 24" of and visible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one ranged weapon equipped by a model in your unit. That model can shoot at that enemy unit (if an eligible target) using only that weapon, and each time it makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of Ballistic Skill or modifiers.

Spearhead-at-Arms.rule:
Each time a model from your army uses its Bondsman ability, if no other model from your army has used that Bondsman ability that turn, you can select up to three friendly ARMIGER models (instead of one) within 12" of that model, or within 15" while your army is Honoured (you still cannot select a model already affected by a Bondsman ability). Until the start of your next Command phase, those models are affected by that Bondsman ability.

KEYWORDS: ARMIGER models from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Virtue of Courage
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model's Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit for ARMIGER models vs the selected enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Exemplar's Wisdom
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by its Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP for ARMIGER models vs the selected enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Mantle of the Mentor
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model's Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your ARMIGER models are eligible to shoot in a turn in which they Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Thin Their Ranks
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model's Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your ARMIGER models have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Let Duty Be Your Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Squires of the Hunt
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ARMIGER model, or one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model's Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: For each of your ARMIGER models that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove that ARMIGER model from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Valourstrike Lance.rule: Each time an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army Advances, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by IMPERIAL KNIGHTS models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Run Them Through!
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by your models have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Thunderstomp
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, the Attacks characteristic of any armoured Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 8, the Attacks characteristic of any titanic Feet melee weapons is 12, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

mathBuff.note: Feet weapons only: also sets their Attacks to 8 (armoured) / 12 (titanic). Toggle when simulating a Feet weapon; set its Attacks manually.

stratagems.name: Full Tilt
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of your models and add 2 to Advance rolls made for those models' units.

stratagems.name: Vow of Retribution
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your models have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [LETHAL HITS].

stratagems.name: Tactical Foil
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 9" of that unit.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Rotate Ion Shields
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Paragon of Sanctity
enhancements.desc: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly **^^Grey Knights^^** unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

enhancements.name: Phial of the Abyss
enhancements.desc: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Mandulian Reliquary
enhancements.desc: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Radiant Champion
enhancements.desc: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [^^**Precision**^^] ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Augurium
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

enhancements.name: Sanctic Reaper
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Inescapable Judgement (Psychic)
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Nemesis Rounds
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only.  Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

enhancements.name: Sigil of Exigence
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when the bearer's unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer's unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Driven by Duty
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights Walker^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of 3".

enhancements.name: Quickening Foci
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only.  In your Movement phase, each time the bearer's unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Spiritus Machina
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer's unit disembarked from a ^^**Transport^^** this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Blinding Aura
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch ability to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Tome of Forbidden Ways
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

enhancements.name: Banishing Wave (Psychic)
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Purity of Purpose
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Pyresoul (Psychic)
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Ephemeral Tome
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6" and, until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

enhancements.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Sigil of the Hunt
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: One Foot in the Future
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

enhancements.name: Doomseer's Amulet
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from that test.

enhancements.name: Grimoire of Conjunctions
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Shield of Prophecy
enhancements.desc: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Tactical Haruspexy
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, when the bearer declares a charge, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can select units that are not visible to it as targets of that charge, provided they are within 9" of it.

enhancements.name: Sigil of Warding
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can make a Normal move of up to 3" and can then attempt to operate a Hatchway. The bearer is then not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Close and Sanction
enhancements.desc: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if the bearer was hit by one or more of those attacks, the bearer can make a Dash move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must finish that move as close as possible to the closest visible enemy unit. When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. The bearer can only make one Dash move per phase.

enhancements.name: Shield of Admonishment
enhancements.desc: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Psychic Celerity
enhancements.desc: TERMINATOR model only. This unit has +1 to Charge rolls.

enhancements.name: Vigilance of Titan
enhancements.desc: TERMINATOR model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit has +6" detection range.

enhancements.name: Precognicient Volleys
enhancements.desc: PURGATION SQUAD unit only. This unit's snap shooting attacks hit on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

enhancements.name: Boons of Deimos
enhancements.desc: PURGATION SQUAD unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have +2 S.

enhancements.name: Predestined Coordinates
enhancements.desc: INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

enhancements.name: Astral Overlap
enhancements.desc: INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit only. This unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that ^^**Vehicle^^** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Techmarine
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Force Edge (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles^^** or ^^**Monsters^^**), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sanctity of Purpose
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Sanctifying Ritual (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker that you control, that objective marker remains under you control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. ruleName + rule (string) + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Brotherhood Strike.rule: Each time a unit from your army is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Channelling
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Psychic melee weapons gain [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

stratagems.name: Combat Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn it is not eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Purgation Pattern
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

mathBuff.note: Requires the unit to have Deep Struck this turn. Weapons gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

stratagems.name: Duty Unending
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GREY KNIGHTS units Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One of those GREY KNIGHTS units that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Shining Veil
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: Expeditious Exit
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If every model in your unit has the Deep Strike ability, remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Augurium Task Force.rule: From the second battle round onwards, at the start of your Movement phase, if you did not select the maximum number of GREY KNIGHTS units using the Gate of Infinity ability at the end of your opponent's previous turn, you can select one GREY KNIGHTS unit on the battlefield that could have been selected using Gate of Infinity. Remove that unit and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Anticipation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Appointed Hour
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Forewarned Evasion
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS WALKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Necessary End
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. If the result is greater than the current battle round number, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Redirected Strike
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Mirage of Echoes
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is within 12" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

Banishers.rule:
Each time a GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army is selected to fight, that unit can take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, select one of the following. Until the end of the phase, that unit has that rule:
- Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit with the [PSYCHIC] ability also have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
- Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit with the [PSYCHIC] ability also have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Hexwrought Reprisal
stratagems.when: End of any phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is on the battlefield and suffered one or more mortal wounds this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit which inflicted one or more mortal wounds on your unit this phase, then roll a number of dice equal to the number of mortal wounds your unit suffered this phase: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (max 6). These are Psychic Attacks.

stratagems.name: Warding Chant
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against attacks with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1.

stratagems.name: Chaos Bane
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-CHAOS 4+] ability.

stratagems.name: Celerity
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Circle of Sanctuary
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your model.

stratagems.name: Shadow of Anarch
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" or, if it has the Deep Strike ability, it can be placed into Strategic Reserves.

Hallowed Conclave.rule: GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Giants of the Battlefield
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

mathBuff.note: +1 Attacks on melee weapons (Terminator unit).

stratagems.name: Unending Fidelity
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Purgation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, storm bolter weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] and [TWIN-LINKED] abilities.

mathBuff.note: Storm bolters gain [TWIN-LINKED] (full Wound re-roll) — toggle when simulating a storm bolter.

stratagems.name: Grind Them Underfoot
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Precognitive Strategies
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Shining Resolve
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Sanctic Spearhead.rule: Each time a GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Will
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Abominus-Class Targets
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound, but only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Armoured Aegis
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS PSYKER VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds.

stratagems.name: Redoubled Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Force Wave
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Argent Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 3" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

Warpbane Task Force.rule:
Certain areas are within your army's Hallowed Ground: your deployment zone always; within 6" of any PURIFIER SQUAD unit; No Man's Land (at the start of any phase if you control at least half its objectives); your opponent's deployment zone (at the start of any phase if you control at least half its objectives).

Each time a model in a GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army makes a ranged attack against a visible target or makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that unit is a PURIFIER SQUAD and/or is wholly within your army's Hallowed Ground, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Sanctified Kill Zone
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase and that is wholly within your army's Hallowed Ground.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1, or re-roll the Wound roll instead if your unit is a PURIFIER SQUAD.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (requires wholly within Hallowed Ground). Set to full Wound re-roll if the unit is a PURIFIER SQUAD.

stratagems.name: Flames of Sanctity
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One PURIFIER SQUAD unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your unit, adding 1 if your unit includes CASTELLAN CROWE: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Hallowed Beacon
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit (excluding TERMINATOR units) arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Set up your unit wholly within your army's Hallowed Ground and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Fires of Covenant
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 6" of your unit, roll one D6, adding 2 if your unit is wholly within your army's Hallowed Ground: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Aegis Eternal
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit that are wholly within your Hallowed Ground have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Repelling Sphere
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit declares a charge and your unit is one of the targets, subtract 1 from the Charge roll, or subtract 2 instead if your unit is wholly within your army's Hallowed Ground.

Argent Assault.rule: When a friendly PALADIN SQUAD unit is selected to fight, if the Strength of those attacks is lower than the Toughness of the target, those attacks have +1 to Wound rolls.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Aegis
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a friendly PALADIN SQUAD unit suffers a mortal wound.
stratagems.target: That PALADIN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: A Threat Ended
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly PALADIN SQUAD unit is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That PALADIN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have the [PRECISION] ability.

mathBuff.note: [PRECISION] on melee for a PALADIN SQUAD.

stratagems.name: Aura of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly PALADIN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.target: That PALADIN SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit's melee attacks have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Fires of Purgation.rule: When you select a unit to be pinned by a friendly PURGATION SQUAD unit's Righteous Persecution ability, that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test with -1 to that test.

stratagems.name: Soul-Locked
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly PURGATION SQUAD unit is selected to make a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That PURGATION SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

stratagems.name: Focused Immolation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PURGATION SQUAD unit is selected to shoot.
stratagems.target: That PURGATION SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Your unit's ranged attacks that target that unit have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

mathBuff.note: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] + [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ranged vs the chosen unit.

stratagems.name: Spiritsear
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PURGATION SQUAD unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That PURGATION SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one Battle-shocked enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

Immaterial Interdiction.rule: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit has shot, if that unit did not make an ingress move this turn, you can use this ability: that unit cannot use its Personal Teleporters ability, and that unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".

stratagems.name: Blades From the Beyond
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: That INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have the [LANCE] ability.

mathBuff.note: [LANCE] (+1 to Wound on the charge) melee for an INTERCEPTOR SQUAD.

stratagems.name: By Thought Alone
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit starts an Action.
stratagems.target: That INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: That Action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

stratagems.name: Responsive Displacement
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit ends a Fall Back move, if that INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit is unengaged.
stratagems.target: That INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

enhancements.name: Cantic Thrallnet
enhancements.desc: At the start of the battle round, you can select one friendly SKITARII unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of the next battle round, the Protector Imperative and the Conqueror Imperative are both active for that unit.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Infiltrator
enhancements.desc: The bearer, and models in any unit they are leading, have the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

enhancements.name: Veiled Hunter
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three SKITARII INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Battle-Sphere Uplink
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Radial Suffusion
enhancements.desc: From the second battle round onwards, when resolving the Fallout effect of the Rad-bombardment Detachment rule, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your opponent’s deployment zone, in addition to those that are within your opponent’s deployment zone.

enhancements.name: Malphonic Susurrus
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Peerless Eradicator
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Autoclavic Denounciation
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Magos
enhancements.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Genetor
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Logis
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Artisan
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit that is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for that unit to an unmodified 6.

enhancements.name: Mechanicus Locum
enhancements.desc: The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and, once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly CULT MECHANICUS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Mantle of the Gnosticarch
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

enhancements.name: Data-blessed Autosermon
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can select the Benediction of the Omnissiah you did not select at the start of the first battle round. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Benediction of the Omnissiah is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to the one that is currently active for your army.

enhancements.name: Temporcopia
enhancements.desc: The bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Necromechanic
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, when a saving throw made for a friendly **^^Legio Cybernetica^^** or **^^Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** model within 12" of the bearer is failed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If they do, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Lord of Machines
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: Emotionless Clarity
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, when a friendly LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE model with the Deadly Demise ability that is within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, do not roll to determine whether any mortal wounds are inflicted as a result of that model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

enhancements.name: Arch Negator
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

enhancements.name: Transoracular Dyad Wafers
enhancements.desc: CYBERNETICA DATASMITH model only. When the bearer is attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, until the end of the battle, models in that unit gain the Halo Override keyword. That unit cannot be selected when selecting units as part of the Noospheric Transference Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Cognitive Reinforcement
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only (excluding CYBERNETICA DATASMITH models). The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Ordnance
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model only. Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit and, each time a Hazardous test is taken for that unit, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Inloaded Lethality
enhancements.desc: **^^Tech-Priest Dominus^^** or **^^Tech-Priest Manipulus^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Omnicogitator
enhancements.desc: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. The Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Martial Signatum Amplificator
enhancements.desc: **^^Tech‑Priest^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the **^^Skitarii^^** keyword.

enhancements.name: Belicosa-class Capacitor Vanes
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Mechanicus^^** model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit, and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons.

enhancements.name: Omnissiah's Fury
enhancements.desc: **^^Skitarii Marshal^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Bomb Rack
abilities.desc: Each time this model finishes a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

options.name: Chaff Launcher
options.ability: The bearer has the Smoke keyword.

options.name: Command Uplink
options.ability: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Strafing Run
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding units that can Fly), add 1 to the Hit roll.

options.name: Chaff Launcher
options.ability: The bearer has the Smoke keyword.�

options.name: Command Uplink
options.ability: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Aerial Deployment

abilities.name: Canticles of the Omnissiah
abilities.desc:
At the start of your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Canticles of the Omnissiah section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

Invocation of Machine Vengeance (Aura): At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Machine Vengeance target. Each time a model in a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit makes an attack that targets your Machine Vengeance target, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

Mantra of Discipline:  This model has the Battleline keyword and has the following ability:
Binharic Courage (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and each time you take a Battle-shock or Leadership test for that unit, add 1 to that test.’

Shroudpsalm (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of this model, that unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Electro-shock

Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shocked. While a unit is shocked, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model must be attached to the following unit:
■ ^^**Kastelan Robots^^**

You must attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, even if one or more other Cybernetica Datasmith models havealready been attached to it. In such cases, if that bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths. If you cannot attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model cannot be deployed and counts as having been destroyed during the first battle round. While attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model loses the INFANTRY keyword.

abilities.name: Battle Protocols
abilities.desc:
At the start of the battle, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, that unit enters Aegis Protocols (see below). In your Command phase, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, you can select one protocol from those listed below for that unit to enter. Once a unit enters a protocol, it remains in that protocol until it enters a different one
- Protector Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Conqueror Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Aegis Protocol: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
