detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Haloscreed Battleclade.rule:
In your Command phase, select one or more ADEPTUS MECHANICUS units from your army (including embarked units). Max units by battle size — Incursion: 1, Strike Force: 2, Onslaught: 3. Until the start of your next Command phase those units gain the HALO OVERRIDE keyword. Then select one Override ability for HALO OVERRIDE units until your next Command phase:
- Electromotive Energisation: +2" Move.
- Microactuator Bracing: +1 Toughness.
- Predation Protocols: eligible to charge after Advancing.
- Muted Servomotors: Stealth.

stratagems.name: Eradication Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1, and, if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1; also re-roll Hits of 1 if the unit is a HALO OVERRIDE unit (tick hit re-roll of 1 separately if so).

stratagems.name: Targeting Override
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Neural Overload
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, it suffers D3 mortal wounds. Select one Override ability; until the start of your next Command phase, that ability is active for your unit (in addition to others if already HALO OVERRIDE).

stratagems.name: Aggressive Impulse
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One SKORPIUS DUNERIDER model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Guided Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army makes a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and, if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit, you can re-roll Desperate Escape tests taken for it.

stratagems.name: Analytical Divination
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit (excluding KATAPHRON units) from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a HALO OVERRIDE unit.

Cohort Cybernetica.rule: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in LEGIO CYBERNETICA units from your army. In addition, unless that unit is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Motive Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: Auto-Divinatory Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army, and one objective marker.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have a Ballistic Skill of 3+ and the [IGNORES COVER] ability, but can only target units within range of the selected objective marker.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] and BS 3+, but only vs units within range of the chosen objective marker.

stratagems.name: Machine Spirit Resurgent
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: Requires the unit below Starting Strength. Full Hit re-roll; also full Wound re-roll while Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: Machine Superiority
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back, and you can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Transcendent Cogitation
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for your unit.

stratagems.name: Benevolence of the Omnissiah
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LEGIO CYBERNETICA or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, improved to Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.

Data-psalm Conclave.rule:
At the start of the first battle round, select one Benediction to be active for CULT MECHANICUS units from your army until the end of the battle:
- Panegyric Procession: Each time a CULT MECHANICUS model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within half range, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.
- Citation in Savagery: Each time a CULT MECHANICUS unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Incantation of the Iron Soul
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after you allocate a mortal wound to a CULT MECHANICUS model from your army.
stratagems.target: That CULT MECHANICUS model's unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CULT MECHANICUS models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Chant of the Remorseless Fist
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CULT MECHANICUS model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound on melee attacks.

stratagems.name: Verse of Vengeance
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a CULT MECHANICUS model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Tribute of Emphatic Veneration
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army and one enemy unit within 18" of it.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If failed, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Litany of the Electromancer
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of one or more CULT MECHANICUS models in your unit, adding 1 if that model is an ELECTRO-PRIEST. On a 5+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Luminescent Blessing
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CULT MECHANICUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, CULT MECHANICUS models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Eradication Cohort.rule:
Each time a model in a SKITARII unit from your army makes an attack:
- If the Protector Imperative is active for that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
- If the Conqueror Imperative is active for that unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Servo-driven Charge
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the SKITARII keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

stratagems.name: Unshackled Wrath
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead select [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LETHAL HITS] and [HAZARDOUS] to apply all three.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or [LETHAL HITS]; or both + [HAZARDOUS]). Adjust to taste.

stratagems.name: Threat-Cogitation Targeters
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

stratagems.name: Precision Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a SICARIAN unit from your army declares a charge.
stratagems.target: That SICARIAN unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit within Engagement Range of it: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Analytic Reprisals
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII INFANTRY unit from your army that lost one or more models as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit, and only if it is an eligible target.

Explorator Maniple.rule: At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that is your Acquisition objective marker. Each time an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS model from your army makes an attack, if that model's unit is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, or if the target of that attack is within range of it, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Cached Acquisition
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that was just destroyed while within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Priority Reclamation
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit ends within range of your Acquisition objective marker. Cannot be used if the unit is within 3" of any enemy units.

stratagems.name: Infoslave Skull
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TECH-PRIEST model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of it (excluding your Acquisition objective marker).
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is also considered to be one of your Acquisition objective markers for all rules purposes.

stratagems.name: Auto-Oracular Retrieval
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound (requires the unit disembarked this turn and the target within range of your Acquisition objective).

stratagems.name: Incense Exhausts
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target, and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS SMOKE unit within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, both of those units have the Stealth ability and the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Reactive Safeguard
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY unit from your army within range of your Acquisition objective marker that was selected as a target of that charge, and one friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can embark within that TRANSPORT (every model must be within 3" and there must be sufficient capacity).

Rad-zone Corps.rule:
BOMBARDMENT (Battle round 1): At the start of the first battle round, for each enemy unit within your opponent's deployment zone, your opponent decides whether it takes cover or stands firm. Roll one D6 per unit:
- Standing Firm: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
- Taking Cover: until the end of the battle round it is Battle-shocked and, on a 5+, suffers D3 mortal wounds.

FALLOUT (Battle rounds 2-5): At the start of your Command phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within your opponent's deployment zone. On a 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound and must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Baleful Halo
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target. If it is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE) within 6".
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is made that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Extinction Order
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TECH-PRIEST model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of it.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within range of that objective marker. On a 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound and must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Aggressor Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase. If it is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE) within 6".
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Pre-Calibrated Purge Solution
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. If it is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE) within 6".
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes a ranged attack, if the target is within your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll, but only vs targets within your opponent's deployment zone.

stratagems.name: Lethal Dosage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [LETHAL HITS].

stratagems.name: Bulwark Imperative
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army that was selected as the target. If it is BATTLELINE, you can also target one friendly SKITARII unit (excluding BATTLELINE) within 6".
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in those units have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Skitarii Hunter Cohort.rule: SKITARII INFANTRY, SKITARII MOUNTED and IRONSTRIDER BALLISTARII units from your army have the Stealth ability, and each time a ranged attack targets a SICARIAN unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

stratagems.name: Bionic Endurance
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SICARIAN, PTERAXII or SYDONIAN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Binharic Offence
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Two SKITARII units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration of weapons equipped by models in both of your units by 1. Each model in either unit can only target that enemy unit (if eligible).

mathBuff.note: +1 AP (both selected units must focus the single chosen enemy unit).

stratagems.name: Expedited Purge Protocol
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Isolate and Destroy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SICARIAN, PTERAXII, SYDONIAN, IRONSTRIDER BALLISTARII or SKITARII MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other enemy units within 6" of the unit targeted by that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound, but only vs an isolated target (no other enemy unit within 6" of it).

stratagems.name: Shroud Protocols
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SKITARII INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Programmed Withdrawal
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two SICARIAN units from your army, or one SKITARII INFANTRY or SKITARII MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Each unit must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Universal Anathema
enhancements.desc: Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities

enhancements.name: Blackweave Shroud
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Beacon Angelis
enhancements.desc: Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Auto-chastisement
enhancements.desc: At the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: Liber Heresius
enhancements.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to 3 AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: No Escape
enhancements.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time it is selected to Fall Back it must first take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

enhancements.name: Witch Hunter
enhancements.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a PSYKER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Ignis Judicium
enhancements.desc: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], [MELTA 1] and [PRECISION] abilities.

enhancements.name: Formidable Resolve
enhancements.desc: Improve the bearer's Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Battle-shocked unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Daemon Slayer
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons, and those weapons have the **[ANTI-DAEMON 3+]** ability.

enhancements.name: Grimoire of True Names
enhancements.desc: While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, while an enemy DAEMON unit is within 9" of the bearer, each time a model in that DAEMON unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Gift of the Prescient
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. When doing so, you must target a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army, and when using the Stratagem, that unit can be set up on the battlefield anywhere that is more than 3" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Digital Weapons
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer is selected to fight, roll three D6; for each 4+, one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound. Mortal wounds inflicted by this Enhancement are allocated as if they have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Operation
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY units from your army (excluding GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD units) - those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Fleetmaster
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Violent Acquisition, Masters of the Void or Close-quarters Barrage Stratagems for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Combat Landers
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three VOIDFARERS units from your army - those units gain the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Shieldbreaker
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when selecting targets for this model’s exitus rifle, it can fire a shieldbreaker round. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack with that weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll and any successful Wound roll scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Dead-shot
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, when selecting targets for that attack, you can ignore the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Shadow Assignment
abilities.desc: This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD. If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided that the points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing this model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN).

default.name: Exitus pistol
default.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Ignores Cover, Pistol, Precision

default.name: Exitus rifle
default.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Heavy, Ignores Cover, Precision

options.name: Micromelta Round
options.ability: This model’s exitus rifle has the [ANTI‑MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Abomination
abilities.desc: This model has the Feel No Pain 2+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Soulless Horror
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, each enemy unit within 9" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test (or subtracting 2 if that unit is a PSYKER).

abilities.name: Etheric Emergence
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Shadow Assignment
abilities.desc: This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD. If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided that the points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing this model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN).

options.name: Esoteric Explosives
options.ability: Each time this model is targeted with the Grenades Stratagem, 1 mortal wound is inflicted for each D6 roll of 3+ instead of for each 4+

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Frenzon
abilities.desc: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Overkill
abilities.desc: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, this model can use this ability before it makes a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, add 6" to this model's Movement characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Shadow Assignment
abilities.desc: This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD. If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided that the points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing this model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN).

options.name: Intra-neural Biotech
options.ability: Once per battle round, you can target this model with the Heroic Intervention or Counter‑offensive Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Reign of Confusion
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after your opponent uses a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the battle, the CP cost your opponent must pay to use that Stratagem again is increased by 1CP.

abilities.name: Acrobatic Escape
abilities.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move of up to D6". In addition, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this model is not within 3" of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this model is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

abilities.name: Shadow Assignment
abilities.desc: This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD. If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided that the points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing this model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN, it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN).

options.name: Decoy Targets
options.ability: Twice per battle, in your Movement phase, you can select one other friendly INFANTRY model that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is removed from the battlefield and set up again as close as possible to where that destroyed model was and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. This ability cannot be used more than once in the same battle round.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Backroom Deals
abilities.desc: If your army contains one or more units with this ability, during the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of those units. While the selected unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS

abilities.name: Warrant of Trade
abilities.desc: If your army contains one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to D3 IMPERIUM BATTLELINE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserve.

wargearAbilities.name: Healing Serum
wargearAbilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTERS) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Masters of Close Confines
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Navy Bodyguards
abilities.desc: If your Army Faction is not AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then for each VOIDFARERS CHARACTER unit you include in your army, you can include one VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS unit in your army that does not count towards the number of RETINUE units your army can include.

abilities.name: Breaching Team
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Gheistskull
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when you select this unit as the target of the Grenade Stratagem, you can target one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of this unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army, instead of one within 8".

abilities.name: CAT Unit
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by this unit gain the [Ignores Cover] ability.

wargearAbilities.name: Endurant shield
wargearAbilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Dedication to Duty
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit (excluding the Cyber-mastiff) have a 4+ invulnerable save.

options.name: Nuncio-aquila
options.ability: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

wargearAbilities.name: Nuncio-aquila
wargearAbilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Imperial Law
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [Lethal Hits] and [Precision] abilities.

options.name: Nuncio-aquila
options.ability: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

wargearAbilities.name: Nuncio-aquila
wargearAbilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

wargearAbilities.name: Arbites medi-kit
wargearAbilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Exaction Vigilants to this unit.

wargearAbilities.name: Soulguilt scanner
wargearAbilities.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Veiled Blade Elimination Force.rule:
OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM units from your army can use the Overkill, Soulless Horror and Shieldbreaker abilities twice per battle instead of once (but not more than once in the same battle round).

When mustering, each OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM unit gains its relevant Extremis ability for an added points cost (if this exceeds the battle's points limit, you cannot include that unit):
- Decoy Targets (+40, CALLIDUS): twice per battle, swap places with a destroyed friendly INFANTRY model.
- Esoteric Explosives (+40, CULEXUS): Grenades Stratagem inflicts a mortal wound on each 3+ instead of 4+.
- Intraneural Biotech (+35, EVERSOR): once per battle round, target this model with Heroic Intervention or Counter-offensive for 0CP.
- Micromelta Rounds (+45, VINDICARE): exitus rifle gains [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+].

stratagems.name: Prime Target
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that attack is made by an OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model and targets the enemy WARLORD, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1, only vs CHARACTER targets. Full Wound re-roll if an OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model targets the enemy WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Hyperstimms
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit. If it is an EVERSOR ASSASSIN unit, it also has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: Will-Sapping Salvo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If it is a CULEXUS ASSASSIN unit, change the Damage characteristic of its ranged weapons to 3.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (CULEXUS ASSASSIN ranged weapons also become Damage 3).

stratagems.name: Orbital Oversight
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18", or within 6" if your unit has the Lone Operative ability.

stratagems.name: Blind Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM GRENADES or VINDICARE ASSASSIN unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit, or subtract 2 instead if your unit is a VINDICARE ASSASSIN.

stratagems.name: Ensnaring Trap
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of them.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can declare a charge (selecting one or more of those enemy units), but does not receive a Charge bonus this turn. If it is a CALLIDUS ASSASSIN and makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn each melee attack it makes adds 1 to the Wound roll.

Alien Hunters (Ordo Xenos).rule:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one Mission Tactic. Until the start of your next Command phase it is active for all DEATHWATCH units from your army. Each can only be selected once per battle:
- Furor Tactics: weapons equipped by DEATHWATCH units have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
- Malleus Tactics: weapons equipped by DEATHWATCH units have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
- Purgatus Tactics: each time a DEATHWATCH model makes an attack, on a Critical Wound that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select Furor, Malleus or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase that Mission Tactic is active for your unit instead of any other active for your army, even if already selected this battle.

stratagems.name: Hellfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] abilities. Cannot combine with Kraken or Dragonfire Rounds this phase.

stratagems.name: Dragonfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities. Cannot combine with Kraken or Hellfire Rounds this phase.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [IGNORES COVER] (and [ASSAULT]).

stratagems.name: Kraken Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve their Range characteristic by 6". Cannot combine with Dragonfire or Hellfire Rounds this phase.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP on ranged weapons (also +6" Range).

stratagems.name: Rapid Tactical Relocation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISITOR or DEATHWATCH INFANTRY unit from your army (not within Engagement Range of any enemy units).
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield. In your next Movement phase Reinforcements step, set it up anywhere more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

Daemon Hunters (Ordo Malleus).rule: Each time an INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO MALLEUS model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if the target is a DAEMON unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Ritual of Warding
stratagems.when: Start of any Command phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker is Warded and remains under your control even with no models in range, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While Warded and under your control, enemy DAEMON units cannot be set up within 6" of it.

stratagems.name: Rites of Exorcism
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy DAEMON unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test. If failed, until the end of the phase each time a friendly AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit makes an attack that targets that DAEMON unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Attacks gain [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], but only vs the targeted DAEMON unit (and only if it failed its Battle-shock test).

stratagems.name: Steel Heart
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Truesilver Armour
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Hexagrammic Wards
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORDO MALLEUS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all Psychic weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: Psybolt Ammunition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PSYCHIC] abilities.

Imperialis Fleet.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the following to apply:
- Eliminate At All Costs: Select one enemy unit. Until your next Command phase, each time an AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
- Acquire At All Costs: Select one objective marker. Until your next Command phase, while an AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit is within range of it, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1 and they have a 5+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Violent Acquisition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LANCE] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [IGNORES COVER] and [LANCE], but only vs an enemy unit within range of an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Masters of the Void
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One VOIDFARERS CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit arriving from Strategic Reserves this turn can be set up within your opponent's deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

stratagems.name: Close-Quarters Barrage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One VOIDFARERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength and +1 AP, but only vs targets within 12".

stratagems.name: Emperor's Will
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Displacer Field
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save and, after the attacking unit resolves its attacks, unless within Engagement Range of an enemy unit, your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" (moving as if it has Fly).

stratagems.name: Selfless Bodyguard
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM Attached unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack with the [PRECISION] ability is allocated to a CHARACTER model in your unit, if there are one or more Bodyguard models in your unit, roll one D6: on a 2+, that attack is allocated to a Bodyguard model of your choice instead.

Purgation Force (Ordo Hereticus).rule:
Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS and ORDO HERETICUS models from your army have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Each time an ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITOR, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS model from your army makes an attack that targets a CHAOS unit containing 5 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Stun Grenades
stratagems.when: Start of any phase (excluding the Command phase).
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS GRENADES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS or VEHICLES) within 8" of and visible to your unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in it makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Dispense Justice
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Weapons gain [LETHAL HITS].

stratagems.name: Inviolate Jurisdiction
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Execution Order
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy CHARACTER unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit targets that CHARACTER unit, its weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Line of Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of friendly units with ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons), provided the target is within 12".

stratagems.name: Exact Punishment
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit from your army is destroyed as the result of an enemy unit's attacks.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ARBITES, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS or ORDO HERETICUS unit from your army that was within 6" of the destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

enhancements.name: Malevolent Heraldry
enhancements.desc: Each time you roll dice to randomly select which Dread abilities are active for your army, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one or both results rolled.

enhancements.name: Veil of Medrengard
enhancements.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks, and a 5+ invulnerable save against melee attacks.

enhancements.name: Tyrant's Shadow
enhancements.desc: At the end of your Command phase, select one objective marker the bearer is in range of and that you control. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Deathly Terror ability as if it were a ^^**Chaos Knights^^** model from your army.

enhancements.name: Nightmare's Master
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Warp-borne Stalker
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Blade of Celerity
enhancements.desc: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [Assault] ability. In addition, once per battle, in the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Putrid Carapace
enhancements.desc: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. In addition, once per battle, at the start of either player's Command phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer regains up to D6 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Mirror of Fates
enhancements.desc: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if another unit from your army has already been targeted by that Stratagem this phase. In addition, you gain the Lord of Deceit abiity.

enhancements.name: Blessing of the Dark Master
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Stealth ability. In addition, once per battle, after you make a saving throw for the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Throne Mechanicum of Skulls
enhancements.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. In addition, once per battle, in your Charge phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Loping Predator
enhancements.desc: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [Assault] ability.

enhancements.name: Final Howl (Aura)
enhancements.desc: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of the bearer, each time that model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Panoply of the Cursed Knights
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack targets the bearer, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Preyslayer's Mantle
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Super-Heavy Walker ability.

enhancements.name: Fleshmetal Fusion
enhancements.desc: Add 1 to the bearer's Toughness characteristic. While the bearer is using the Unnatural Fortitude ability, each time an attack with a Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to the bearer, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

enhancements.name: Blasphemous Engine
enhancements.desc: Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic. Each time the bearer's unit makes a Malefic Surge, you can re-roll the Leadership test taken to see if it suffers any mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Bestial Aspect
enhancements.desc: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [Assault] ability. While the bearer is using the Unholy Hunger ability, it can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and/or to Advance rolls made for its unit.

enhancements.name: Knight Diabolus
enhancements.desc: Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1. While the bearer is using the Diabolic Power ability, its melee weapons have the [Lance] ability.

enhancements.name: Diabolical Resilience
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability and you can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and/or to any Advance or Charge rolls made for it.

enhancements.name: Pave The Way
enhancements.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three DAMNED units from your army. The selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Profane Altar
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a Dark Sacrifice, the maximum number of models are destroyed in the selected DAMNED unit (i.e. 3 if the unit’s Leadership test is passed, or 6 if it is failed) but, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s weapons have both [LETHAL HITS] and [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

enhancements.name: Tyrant's Banner
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer makes a Dark Sacrifice, select one visible friendly DAMNED unit to take a Leadership test instead of a friendly DAMNED unit within 6".

enhancements.name: Hunter's Helm
enhancements.desc: You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Octagram of Conjuration
enhancements.desc: While a friendly ^^**War Dog**^^ model is within 9” of this model, after that ^^**War Dog**^^ model has shot, you can select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

enhancements.name: Throne Tyrannicus
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one other ^^**Chaos Knights Character**^^ model within 9” of the bearer. If the bearer has one or more Aura abilities that affect friendly **^^War Dog**^^ units, until the start of your next Command phase, the selected **^^Chaos Knights Character**^^ model is affected by those Aura abilities as well.

enhancements.name: Aspect of the Beast
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Command phase, select one Dread ability to be active for the bearer until the start of your next Command phase, in addition to the Dread abilities active for your army.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Sunderer of Fortresses
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Vehicle^^**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a ^^**Fortification^^**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Dread Tyrants (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Damned^^** unit is within 9" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Dark Sacrifice
abilities.desc: Each time a ^^**Chaos Knights^^** unit with this ability is selected to shoot or fight, it can make a Dark Sacrifice. If it does, select one friendly ^^**Damned^^** unit within 6". That ^^**Damned^^** unit must take a Leadership test: if passed, destroy D3 models in that ^^**Damned^^** unit; if failed, destroy D3+3 models in that ^^**Damned^^** unit. In either case, then select one of the following abilities for your Chaos Knights unit’s weapons to have until the end of the phase: [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

That ^^**Damned^^** unit must take a Leadership test: if passed, destroy D3 models in that ^^**Damned^^** unit; if failed, destroy D3+3 models in that ^^**Damned^^** unit. In either case, then select one of the following abilities for your Chaos Knights unit’s weapons to have until the end of the phase: [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

abilities.name: Infernal Aegis (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, that ^^**War Dog^^** model has the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Bastion of Corruption
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Dread Tyrants (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Damned^^** unit is within 9" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Methodical Destruction
abilities.desc: At the start of the first battle round, select one unit from your opponent's army to be this model's victim. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its victim, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's victim is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's victim.

abilities.name: Close-range Killers (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 9" of this model, each time that ^^**War Dog^^** model makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-9 wounds remaining
