detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Iconoclast Fiefdom.rule:
TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS units have Dread Tyrants (Aura): while a friendly DAMNED unit is within 9", each time a model in that DAMNED unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1.

CHAOS KNIGHTS units have Dark Sacrifice: each time this unit is selected to shoot or fight, it can make a Dark Sacrifice — select a friendly DAMNED unit within 6", which takes a Leadership test (passed: destroy D3 of its models; failed: destroy D3+3). Then select [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] for your CHAOS KNIGHTS unit's weapons until end of phase.

WRETCHED THRALLS: you can include DAMNED units (Codex: CSM). Combined points — Incursion 250 / Strike Force 500 / Onslaught 750. No DAMNED model can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Masters!
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, the enemy unit that destroyed your unit is Marked. Each time a DAMNED model from your army makes an attack that targets a Marked unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Wretched Masses
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit (excluding ACCURSED CULTISTS) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to the destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength with all wounds remaining. Once per battle; cannot return CHARACTER units to Attached units.

stratagems.name: Soul Hunger
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army has fought.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: If one or more models were destroyed by those attacks, your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If one or more models from Battle-shocked units were destroyed, it regains up to D3+2 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Unrestrained Rage
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Worthless Chattel
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered within Engagement Range of your unit for selecting ranged targets. Each time an enemy model loses a wound while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, one model from your unit is destroyed after the attacking unit finishes its attacks.

stratagems.name: Preserve the Idols
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one DAMNED unit (not Battle-shocked, not within Engagement Range, within 6" of your unit). That DAMNED unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", ending closer to that enemy unit.

Helhunt Lance.rule: If a TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army has an Aura ability that affects friendly WAR DOG units, while two or more friendly WAR DOG models are within range of that Aura, the TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS unit is affected by that Aura as well.

stratagems.name: Feral Arrogance
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Merciless Fusillade
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS unit and up to two friendly WAR DOG units that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit eligible for each of those units. Until the end of the phase, those units can only target that enemy unit, and those attacks have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — the selected units must all focus the one chosen enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Beasthide Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Flush the Quarry
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS unit and up to three friendly WAR DOG units within 6" of it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those WAR DOG units makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, its models can move through models and terrain features (cannot end within Engagement Range; Desperate Escape tests auto-passed).

stratagems.name: Contemptuous Volleys
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Goaded Beast
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move: roll one D6; models move up to that many inches but must end as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT), and can move within Engagement Range.

Houndpack Lance.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a WAR DOG model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if it is visible, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

KEYWORDS: Your army must include three or more WAR DOG units; WAR DOG units gain the BATTLELINE keyword; select three WAR DOG units to gain the CHARACTER keyword (can take Enhancements / be WARLORD).

stratagems.name: Vox-Howl
stratagems.when: Start of the Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WAR DOG CHARACTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each friendly WAR DOG unit within 6" that is Battle-shocked takes a Leadership test; if passed, it is no longer Battle-shocked. Once per turn.

stratagems.name: Hungry for Combat
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Two or more WAR DOG units from your army within Engagement Range of the same enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of those units. Until the end of the phase, those units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in them makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Cunning Hunter
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a WAR DOG unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That WAR DOG unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Animalistic Rage
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a WAR DOG unit from your army that has not yet fought is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That WAR DOG unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Before resolving Deadly Demise, your unit can shoot or fight, targeting only the enemy unit that destroyed it. Then resolve Deadly Demise as normal.

stratagems.name: Harrying Hounds
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One WAR DOG unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Encircling Pack
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WAR DOG unit from your army wholly within 12" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Infernal Lance.rule:
In your Command phase, one or more CHAOS KNIGHTS units can make a Malefic Surge. Each takes a Leadership test first; if failed, it suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then it is Empowered until your next Command phase and can use one Malefic Surge ability (after which it is no longer Empowered):
- Unholy Hunger: +3" Move on a Normal/Advance/Fall Back move.
- Diabolic Power: when selected to shoot or fight, weapons gain [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (your choice).
- Unnatural Fortitude: when targeted, choose a 5+ invulnerable save OR Feel No Pain 6+.

stratagems.name: Profane Symbiosis
stratagems.when: End of any phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that is not Empowered.
stratagems.effect: Your unit makes a Malefic Surge. Cannot select the same unit more than once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Hellforged Construction
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Corrupting Taint
stratagems.when: Your Command phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army makes a Malefic Surge.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker your unit is within range of that you control. It remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Unleash Balefire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit shoots, select one enemy unit hit. It takes a Battle-shock test; if failed, until the end of your opponent's next turn it is aflame (−2" Move and −2 to Charge rolls).

stratagems.name: Warp Vision
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [IGNORES COVER].

stratagems.name: Diabolic Bulwark
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Lords of Dread.rule: Improve the Objective Control characteristic of CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER models from your army by 2. In addition, once per battle round, if your WARLORD is on the battlefield, you can use the Claimed for the Dark Gods Stratagem for 0CP.

stratagems.name: Claimed for the Dark Gods
stratagems.when: Start of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers you control.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. It remains under your control with a Level of Control of 5 (unless higher) until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Spiteful Demise
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: When rolling for your unit's Deadly Demise ability, it inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 4+ instead of 6.

stratagems.name: Runes of Disdain
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Titanic Duel
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is TITANIC, you can re-roll the Hit roll and the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits/Wounds of 1 vs a chosen MONSTER or VEHICLE unit. Set to full re-rolls if that target is TITANIC.

stratagems.name: Trophy Hunter
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before a CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army consolidates.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Crushed Like Vermin
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit from your army ends a Normal move.
stratagems.target: That CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) your unit moved over and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If one or more models are destroyed, that unit takes a Battle-shock test.

Traitoris Lance.rule: At the start of the first battle round, after selecting one or more Dread abilities to be active for your army, you can select one additional Dread ability to be active for your army (this additional Dread ability cannot be randomly selected).

stratagems.name: Pterrorshades
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound and one model in your unit regains up to 1 lost wound. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Conquerors Without Mercy
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS model from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by your model by 1. After it fights, if it destroyed one or more enemy units, each enemy unit within 6" must take a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP melee (model must have charged this turn).

stratagems.name: Disdain for the Weak
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against attacks made by Battle-shocked models.

stratagems.name: A Long Leash
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ABHORRENT unit from your army and up to two friendly WAR DOG units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, those WAR DOG units are treated as being within range of any Aura abilities your ABHORRENT unit has.

stratagems.name: Imperious Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two WAR DOG units from your army or one TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in those units can move through models and terrain features on any move; any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed (Super-heavy Walker does not apply while using this Stratagem).

stratagems.name: Storm of Darkness
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability, and each time an attack targets your unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Alien Cunning
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Perfectly Adapted
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer

enhancements.name: Synaptic Linchpin
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Biology
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

enhancements.name: Instinctive Defense
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Harvester^^** units, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit. The first time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, until the end of battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only (excluding **^^Monsters^^** models) The bearer's unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

enhancements.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Harvester^^** model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that **^^Harvester^^** model can Regenerate one friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit that is within 9" instead of one within 6".

enhancements.name: Monstrous Nemesis
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Monster^^**or **^^Vehicle^^**unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Null Nodules
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Ominous Presence
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Add 3 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Enraged Reserves
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up with 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Control
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the attack.

enhancements.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

enhancements.name: Power of the Hive Mind
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Psyker^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of psychic weapons equipped by the wearer of 1.

enhancements.name: Naturalised Camoflage
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, select up to three friendly **^^Endless Multitude^^** units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Piercing Talons
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time a model in the Bearer's unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Relentless Hunger
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit makes a Pile In or Consolidation, models in this unit can move an additional 3"

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+ that unit must make a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Neuronode
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three **^^Vanguard Invader^^** units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Stalker
enhancements.desc: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Chameleonic
enhancements.desc: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Sensory Assimilation
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Elevated Might
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Ocular Adaptation
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Tyrant
enhancements.desc: **^^Neurotyrant^^** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **^^Tyranid Warriors^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Intellect
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Trygon Prime
enhancements.desc: **^^Trygon^^** model only. The bearer gains the **^^Synapse^^** keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Synergy
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Tremor Senses
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Predatory Instincts
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Biomorph Adaption
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant ^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Mutagenic Regeneration
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer's unit regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: Alien Majesty
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. While an enemy unit is in within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

enhancements.name: Martial Espionage
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once Per turn, when a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** or **^^Astra Militarum Mounted^^**unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Reprisal
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit within 8" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: The Hero Returned
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1

enhancements.name: Fire-point Commander
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that stratagem, hits are successfully scored on a 5+.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Auger
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Tyrant
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Hive Tyrant^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Inhuman Integration
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Tyranids^^**units.

enhancements.name: Enraptured Damnation
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Our Time is Nigh
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per battle, when the bearer's unit declares a charge, the bearer can use the Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: A Chink in Their Armour
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped in the bearer's unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

enhancements.name: Prowling Agitant
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advanced, or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer's unit, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Assassination Edict
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Serpentine Tactics
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Cartographic Data-leech
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. While the bearer is embarked within a **^^Transport^^**, each time that **^^Transport^^** is selected to shoot, until end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that **^^Transport^^** as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

enhancements.name: Starfall Shells
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Assault Commando
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Deeds That Speak to the Masses
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

enhancements.name: Gene-sire's Reliquant
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Inspiration
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Denunciator of Tyrants
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit Roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Reinforced Carapace
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack (note that if given to a Tyranid Prime model, this only affects that model and not other models in its unit).

enhancements.name: Synaptic Goad
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons^^** or **^^Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the end of the turn, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Beacon
enhancements.desc: While a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer (ignoring Walls and closed Hatchways), that unit is within Synapse Range of the bearer and of your army.

enhancements.name: Hypersurge Gland
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Charge phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase.

enhancements.name: Primary Detonator
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, when an enemy unit opens a closed Hatchway, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Master Saboteur
enhancements.desc: The first time in the battle that your opponent's army Secures an objective marker while the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 3+, that objective marker is not Secured by your opponent's army.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Imp
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^** model only. Each time an enemy unit opens a Hatchway, if the bearer is within 1" of that Hatchway, roll one D6: one a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Miasmic Fumes
enhancements.desc: **^^Biophagus^^** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Psi-spoor Sensitivity
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer declares a charge, it can target enemy units that are not visible to it.

enhancements.name: Stalking Menace
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Fight phase, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase as if it had the Deep Strike ability. If this is not possible, the bearer is destroyed. When the bearer is set back up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, it cannot declare a charge.
