abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bio-minefield
abilities.desc: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

abilities.name: Floating Death
abilities.desc: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Symbiotic Targeting
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bio-minefield
abilities.desc: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

abilities.name: Floating Death
abilities.desc: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6 that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Seed Spore Mines
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your Shooting Phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new SPORE MINES unit to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 48" of this unit and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. That SPORE MINES unit contains 1 model for each model in this unit.

default.name: Spore mine launcher
default.Keywords: Blast, Devastating Wounds, Heavy, Indirect Fire

abilities.name: Blistering Assault
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blistering Assault move. If it does, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result: each model in this unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Each unit can only make one Blistering Assault move per phase.

abilities.name: Death Scream
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.desc: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if this unit is within range of an objective marker that you control.

abilities.name: Resilient Organism
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Seeding
abilities.desc: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 20 TYRANIDS INFANTRY models, or 1 TYRANIDS MONSTER model with a Wounds characteristic of 12 or less. Each INFANTRY model with a Wounds characteristic of more than 1 takes up the space of 3 models.

abilities.name: Spore Mine Cysts
abilities.desc:
Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can do one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
- Add a new SPORE MINES unit containing D3 models to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is within 6" of this model and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. You cannot select this option for more than one model per turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Airborne Predator
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Seed Mucolids
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with it's ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new MUCOLID SPORES containing 1 model to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 18" of this model and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Hive Defences
abilities.desc: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn

abilities.name: Bio-stimulus
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Feeding Frenzy
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Disruption Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is disrupted. While a unit is disrupted, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Frenzied Metabolism
abilities.desc: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. After resolving those attacks, roll one D6: on a 2+, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 20 GARGOYLES models and 1 WINGED TYRANID PRIME model.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Apex-beast
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Stalking Forward
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 20 TYRANIDS INFANTRY models. Each model with a Wounds characteristic of more than 1 takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can FLY.

abilities.name: Vanguard Predator
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of one or more objective markers, re-roll a Wound roll 1 as well.

abilities.name: Death From Below
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.desc: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP

abilities.name: Neural Disruption
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test

abilities.name: Psychological Saboteur (Aura)
abilities.desc:
While an enemy unit is with 12" of this model, if that unit is Battle-shocked:

- Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll
- Each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Singular Purpose
abilities.desc:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll
- Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Unnatural Resistance
abilities.desc: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Mortal Wounds.

abilities.name: Harpoon Barbs
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is chosen to Fall Back, roll one D6; on a 2+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Singular Purpose
abilities.desc:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll
- Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Alpha Invader
abilities.desc: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Hypersensory Array
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This unit can be attached to the following units: **^^Raveners^^**

abilities.name: Alpha Warrior
abilities.desc: Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Aggressive Leader‑beast
abilities.desc: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding **^^Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Hormagaunts^^**
- **^^Termagants^^**
- **^^Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons^^**
- **^^Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons^^**

abilities.name: Serpentine Fiend
abilities.desc: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of **^^Ruins^^**, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.desc: Each time an attack with this model’s gaping maw targets an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** unit, each successful unmodified Wound roll is a Critical Wound. Each time an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** model is destroyed as a result of an attack made by this model’s gaping maw, this model regains up to D3+2 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Subterranean Hunter
abilities.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Invasion Fleet.rule:
At the start of the first battle round, select one Hyper-adaptation to be active for TYRANIDS units until the end of the battle:
- Swarming Instincts: attacks vs INFANTRY or SWARM units have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].
- Hyper-aggression: attacks vs MONSTER or VEHICLE units have [LETHAL HITS].
- Hive Predators: attacks vs CHARACTER units have [PRECISION] on a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Rapid Regeneration
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, Feel No Pain 5+ instead.

stratagems.name: Adrenal Surge
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units within Synapse Range that are eligible to fight, or one other TYRANIDS unit eligible to fight.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in any of those units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Death Frenzy
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Overrun
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just before a TYRANIDS unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models can move an additional 3" to end within Engagement Range. If within Synapse Range and not within Engagement Range, it can instead make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Predatory Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units within Synapse Range, or one other TYRANIDS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation (not the one chosen at the start of the battle). Until your next Command phase, it is active for those units in addition to any other.

stratagems.name: Endless Swarm
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two ENDLESS MULTITUDE units within Synapse Range, or one other ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit.
stratagems.effect: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each selected unit.

Crusher Stampede.rule: Each time a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if its unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if its unit is Below Half-strength. While a TYRANIDS MONSTER unit (excluding Battle-shocked) is at Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control of its models.

stratagems.name: Corrosive Viscera
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army with Deadly Demise that cannot FLY is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll for Deadly Demise; instead mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: Rampaging Monstrosities
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll (MONSTER unit).

stratagems.name: Savage Roar
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in it attacks your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If the test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Untrammelled Ferocity
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move through models (excluding TITANIC) and terrain 4" or less in height. They can move through taller terrain too, but then roll one D6 after moving: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Swarm-Guided Salvoes
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and you can ignore any or all modifiers to Ballistic Skill and to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: [IGNORES COVER] on ranged weapons (also ignore Hit/BS modifiers). MONSTER unit.

stratagems.name: Massive Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Unending Swarm.rule: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after it finishes its attacks, if one or more models from one or more ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army were destroyed, each such unit can make a Surge move: roll one D6; the unit moves up to that many inches but must end as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT), and can move within Engagement Range. A Battle-shocked unit cannot make a Surge move.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Goading
stratagems.when: Any phase, just before an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit within Synapse Range makes a Surge move.
stratagems.target: That ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit.
stratagems.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6, and your unit can end as close as possible to the closest objective marker instead of the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Unending Waves
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit identical to the destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength. Attached CHARACTERs are not returned. Once per battle.

stratagems.name: Teeming Masses
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Swarming Masses
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and if your unit contains 15 or more models, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]; also Critical Hits on 5+ if the unit has 15+ models.

stratagems.name: Bounding Advance
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Preservation Imperative
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.

Assimilation Swarm.rule: In your Command phase, each HARVESTER unit can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of it (a unit can only be regenerated once per phase). Each regeneration does one of: one model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds; OR return one destroyed INFANTRY model (excluding CHARACTERS) with full wounds (up to 3 models if an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit).

stratagems.name: Broodguard Impulse
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that destroyed your HARVESTER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Reclaim Biomass
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model is removed.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (see Feed the Swarm).

stratagems.name: Tyrannoformed
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even with no models in range, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: Ablative Carapace
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability, or Feel No Pain 4+ if within range of an objective marker you control.

stratagems.name: Secure Biomass
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a HARVESTER unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ also scores a Critical Hit.

mathBuff.note: Melee [LETHAL HITS]; HARVESTER units also get Critical Hits on 5+.

stratagems.name: Rapacious Hunger
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit immediately Regenerates (see Feed the Swarm). If it is a HARVESTER unit and you choose the wounds option, a model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead of D3.

Vanguard Onslaught.rule:
TYRANIDS units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. VANGUARD INVADER units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

Vanguard Prime: DEATHLEAPER loses the Hunter Organism rule and can be your WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Surprise Assault
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That VANGUARD INVADER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit targeted by your unit's attacks. It takes a Battle-shock test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll; if the test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit vs the selected enemy unit; +1 Wound too if that unit failed its Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Assassin Beasts
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Seeded Broods
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit in Reserves, or up to two VANGUARD INVADER units in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, for setting up those units, treat the current battle round number as one higher than it is.

stratagems.name: Hypersensory Scillia
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units within 9" of that enemy unit, or one other TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit within 9".
stratagems.effect: Those units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Unseen Lurkers
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" (or 6" if your unit has Lone Operative).

stratagems.name: Invisible Hunter
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units, or one TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit (more than 3" from all enemy units).
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Synaptic Nexus.rule:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one Synaptic Imperative (each once per battle). Until the end of the round it is active for your army; a TYRANIDS unit within Synapse Range benefits:
- Synaptic Augmentation: 5+ invulnerable save.
- Surging Vitality: +1 to Advance and Charge rolls.
- Goaded to Slaughter: +1 to the Hit roll for melee attacks.

stratagems.name: The Smothering Shadow
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Channelling
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

stratagems.name: Irresistible Will
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to it.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model attacks that enemy unit, if the attacking model's unit is within 6" of your SYNAPSE unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits/Wounds of 1 vs the chosen enemy unit, only while within 6" of your SYNAPSE unit.

stratagems.name: Reinforced Hive Node
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Imperative Dominance
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army within Synapse Range of your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Synaptic Imperative (even if already selected this battle). Until your next Command phase it is active for your unit instead of any other.

stratagems.name: Override Instincts
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit within Synapse Range that made a Fall Back move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn.

Subterranean Assault.rule:
Each time a TYRANIDS model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Each time a BURROWER unit is set up from Reserves, place a 40mm Tunnel Marker within 1" of it and more than 3" from enemy models. In your Reinforcements step, units set up from Reserves can be set up wholly within 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" from enemy models. If an enemy model (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends a move within 3" of a Tunnel Marker, remove it.

KEYWORDS: MAWLOC and TRYGON units gain BURROWER. In the Muster Armies step, up to 2 TRYGON models gain CHARACTER (can take Enhancements / be WARLORD).

stratagems.name: Adaptive Optimisation
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One MAWLOC or TRYGON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the SYNAPSE keyword.

stratagems.name: Replenishing Swarms
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.
stratagems.effect: One model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 with full wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Enfilading Emergence
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] — unit must have arrived as Reinforcements this turn.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Network
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit wholly within 9" of one or more of your Tunnel Markers and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit and set it up again wholly within 9" of another of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: Swarming Assault
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, friendly TYRANIDS units within 6" of your unit can re-roll Charge rolls.

stratagems.name: Retreat Below
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit or up to two BURROWER units from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Warrior Bioform Onslaught.rule:
TYRANID WARRIORS, Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip and WINGED TYRANID PRIME units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.

KEYWORDS: TYRANID WARRIORS WITH RANGED BIO-WEAPONS and TYRANID WARRIORS WITH MELEE BIO-WEAPONS units gain the TYRANID WARRIORS and BATTLELINE keywords, and while not Battle-shocked their TYRANID WARRIORS models have an Objective Control of 3.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Amplification
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If that unit is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, select up to one ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit (not Battle-shocked) within 6". Until the end of the phase, each time a model in those units makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1, and re-roll a Hit roll of 1 as well if it is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1; TYRANID WARRIORS units also re-roll Hits of 1 (tick that separately for Warriors).

stratagems.name: Spontaneous Hypercorrosion
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit, and add 1 to the Strength of melee weapons equipped by TYRANID WARRIORS and WINGED TYRANID PRIME models in your unit.

mathBuff.note: +2 Strength on ranged weapons. (Melee weapons of TYRANID WARRIORS / WINGED TYRANID PRIME get +1 Strength — model that separately if simulating melee.)

stratagems.name: Restorative Impulse
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
stratagems.effect: Return 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to your unit.

stratagems.name: Synaptic Micronodes
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. It remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Parasitic Payload
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS WITH RANGED BIO-WEAPONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. After shooting, select one enemy unit hit; until the end of the turn models in it cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [IGNORES COVER].

stratagems.name: Synaptic Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANID WARRIORS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: If that unit is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, select up to one ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit (not Battle-shocked) within 6". Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, if the attack's Strength is greater than the unit's Toughness, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of the third.

enhancements.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

enhancements.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^T’au Empire^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Through Unity, Devastation
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

enhancements.name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

enhancements.name: Strike Swiftly
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Strategic Conqueror
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model's Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Coordinated Exploitation
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

enhancements.name: Starflare Ignition System
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Prototype Weapon System
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time the bearer is select to shoot, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the select ability.

enhancements.name: Internal Grenade Racks
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. The bearer has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

enhancements.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Nomadic Hunter
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot Trail Shaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

enhancements.name: Borthrod Gland
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot Flesh Shaper^^** only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Root-carved Weapons
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot War Shaper^^** model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

enhancements.name: Kroothawk Flock
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Student of Kauyon
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot Shaper^^** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three **^^Kroot Carnivores^^** or **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^** units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Admired Leader
enhancements.desc: **^^T'au Empire^^** model (excluding **^^Kroot^^** models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Fanatical Convert
enhancements.desc: **^^Kroot^^** model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

enhancements.name: Transponder Lock Module
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire Walker^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Fusion Blades
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the **[MELTA 4]** ability.

enhancements.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one T'au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Supernova Launcher
enhancements.desc: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

enhancements.name: Quill Marker
enhancements.desc: At the start of your Charge phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Kroot^^** unit from your army declares a charge, if it is within 6" of that enemy unit, it can include that enemy unit as a target of that charge, even if it is not visible to it.

enhancements.name: Experienced Leader
enhancements.desc: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, each time a **^^Kroot^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Target Optimisation Microdrones
enhancements.desc: **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** model only. Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when a friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^**, **^^Pathfinder Team^^** or **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** unit within 6" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Duty's Echo
enhancements.desc: **^^Ethereal^^** model only. At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^** or **^^Pathfinder Team^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. If you do, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 3" and then counts as having performed the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre this turn.

abilities.name: Agile Combatant
abilities.desc: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Hero of the Empire (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Advanced Guardian Drone
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Command-link Drone (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Way of the Short Blade
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Puretide's Teachings
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Suppression Volley

Until the start of your next turn, while unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.desc:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Fieldcraft
abilities.desc: At the end of the your Command phase, if this unit within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Kroot Packmates
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Forward Observers
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

options.name: Homing beacon
options.ability:
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and more than 9" away from all enemy units.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.*

Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Target Uploaded
