detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Kauyon.rule: During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'AU EMPIRE models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. During those battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit, each time a ranged attack it makes targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill and/or to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: A Tempting Trap
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase (not battle rounds 1-2).
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time, also select an objective marker not in your opponent's deployment zone — this becomes your Trap objective marker for the battle.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound vs enemies within range of your Trap objective marker. Battle rounds 3-5 only.

stratagems.name: Point-Blank Ambush
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase (not battle rounds 1-2).
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP vs targets within 9". Battle rounds 3-5 only.

stratagems.name: Coordinate to Engage
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (For the Greater Good).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the MARKERLIGHT keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit (improved BS) vs your Spotted unit; MARKERLIGHT units also ignore cover.

stratagems.name: Combat Embarkation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge, and one friendly TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can embark within that TRANSPORT (every model within 3", sufficient capacity); your opponent can select new charge targets.

stratagems.name: Photon Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE GRENADES unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

stratagems.name: Wall of Mirrors
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One STEALTH, GHOSTKEEL or COMMANDER SHADOWSUN unit from your army (not within Engagement Range of enemy units).
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Mont'ka.rule: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'AU EMPIRE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During those battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit, its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Pinpoint Counter-Offensive
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a T'AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll vs the enemy unit that destroyed one of your units (battle-long).

stratagems.name: Aggressive Mobility
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Focused Fire
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase (not battle rounds 4-5).
stratagems.target: Two T'AU EMPIRE units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either unit makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP, but both units must focus the single chosen enemy unit. Battle rounds 1-3 only.

stratagems.name: Combat Debarkation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Wound re-roll vs the closest enemy unit. Unit must have disembarked this turn.

stratagems.name: Pulse Onslaught
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit (excluding KROOT) from your army that has just shot, and one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your opponent's next turn, that enemy unit is shaken (−2" Move, −2 to Advance and Charge rolls).

stratagems.name: Counterfire Defence Systems
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Retaliation Cadre.rule: Each time a T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Fail-Safe Detonator
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model from your army is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That destroyed model's unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: If the model has Deadly Demise, do not roll — choose whether the result is 1 or 6. If it does not, roll one D6 for each unit within 6": on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Stimm Injectors
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

stratagems.name: The Shortened Blade
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models. It is not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: The Arro'kon Protocol
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, attacks targeting an enemy unit with 6+ models have [SUSTAINED HITS 1]; vs an enemy unit with 11+ models they have [SUSTAINED HITS 2] instead.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] vs 6+ model units; set to Sustained Hits 2 vs 11+ model units.

stratagems.name: The Torchstar Gambit
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that can FLY whose attacks have been resolved this phase.
stratagems.effect: If not within Engagement Range of enemy units, your unit can make a Normal move. If it does, it cannot declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Grav-Inhibitor Field
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and roll one D6 per model in it: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Kroot Hunting Pack.rule:
Each time a KROOT model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target is Below Half-strength.

Skirmish Fighters: KROOT models have a 6+ invulnerable save against melee attacks and a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

KEYWORDS: KROOT CARNIVORE units gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Join the Hunt
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT INFANTRY or KROOT HOUNDS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit identical to the destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength. Cannot return CHARACTERs to Attached units. Once per battle.

stratagems.name: A Trap Well Laid
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit resolves its attacks, select one enemy unit hit. Until the end of the phase, each time a KROOT model from your army attacks that unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP vs an enemy unit your Kroot hit this phase (not while your unit is Battle-shocked).

stratagems.name: EMP Grenades
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy VEHICLE unit is selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.target: One KROOT GRENADES unit from your army within 8" of that enemy VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, worsen the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill of that enemy VEHICLE unit's weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: The Grisly Feast
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent's next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test (−1 if Below Half-strength). They take no other Battle-shock tests that phase.

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Warriors
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a KROOT unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That KROOT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Hidden Hunters
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KROOT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Auxiliary Cadre.rule:
KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS units have Targeting Triangulation (Aura): while an enemy unit is within 9" of and visible to this unit, each time a ranged attack made by a friendly T'AU EMPIRE model (excluding KROOT, VESPID STINGWINGS and TITANIC models) targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1.

Other T'AU EMPIRE units have Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): while a friendly KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit is wholly within 6" of and visible to this unit, that unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Experimental Modifications
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP on all weapons (Kroot / Vespid Stingwings unit).

stratagems.name: Multisensory Scanning
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If it is a KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (full Wound re-roll for KROOT / VESPID STINGWINGS units).

stratagems.name: Interlocking Manoeuvres
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If not within Engagement Range of enemy units, your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". Otherwise it can make a Fall Back move (cannot embark if it disembarked this turn).

stratagems.name: Pheromone Waypoints
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Alien Expertise
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If it is a KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit, it is also eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Guided Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS) from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is wholly within 9" of one or more KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units, add 2 instead.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength ranged; set to +2 if wholly within 9" of a Kroot/Vespid unit.

Experimental Prototype Cadre.rule: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by T'AU EMPIRE models from your army.

stratagems.name: Automated Repair Drones
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one BATTLESUIT model in your unit: that model regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.

stratagems.name: Reactive Impact Dampeners
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the attack's Strength is greater than your unit's Toughness, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Experimental Weaponry
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in your unit, you can re-roll the result.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll the number of attacks (e.g. for variable Attacks weapons).

stratagems.name: Experimental Ammunition
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one: improve the Strength of ranged weapons in your unit by 1; OR improve their Strength and Armour Penetration by 1 and give them [HAZARDOUS]. Cannot also use Threat Assessment Analyser on this unit this phase.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength ranged (alternative mode: +1 S and +1 AP with [HAZARDOUS] — add apMod:1 if using that mode).

stratagems.name: Threat Assessment Analyser
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] for your unit's ranged weapons until end of phase. You can instead select [SUSTAINED HITS 1], [LETHAL HITS] and [HAZARDOUS] together. Cannot also use Experimental Ammunition on this unit this phase.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or [LETHAL HITS]; or both + [HAZARDOUS]).

stratagems.name: Neuroweb System Jammer
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One T'AU EMPIRE CRISIS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Supa-Cybork Body
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Headwoppa’s Killchoppa
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

enhancements.name: Kunnin’ But Brutal
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Follow Me Ladz
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Surly As A Squiggoth
enhancements.desc: **^^Beastboss On Squigosaur^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Skrag Every Stash!
enhancements.desc: **^^Beast Snagga^^** model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective market remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start of end of any turn.

enhancements.name: Proper Killy
enhancements.desc: **^^Beast Snagga^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Glory Hog
enhancements.desc: **^^Beastboss On Squigosaur^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Gitfinder Gogglez
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

enhancements.name: Press It Fasta!
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, when rolling to determine which ability that unit's weapons gain from the Try Dat Button! Detachment rule, roll one additional D6; until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both Button Effects generated by those rolls. If a duplicate Button Effect is rolled, it has no additional effect.

enhancements.name: Supa-glowy Fing
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 18" and visible to the bearer, then roll one D6: on a 1-2, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test; on a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5-6, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Smoky Gubbinz
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Ferocious Show Off
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry^^** model only. Each time the bearer fights, while resolving those attacks, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons. If the bearer's unit contains 10 or more models, while resolving those attacks, add 3 to the Strength characteristic instead.

enhancements.name: Brutal But Kunnin'
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry^^** model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or is embarked within a **^^Transport^^** that is on the battlefield), roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the bearer's unit contains 10 or more models: on a 5+, you gain 1 CP.

enhancements.name: Raucous Warcaller
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit always counts as containing 10 or more models for the purposes of your Detachment rule and any Stratagems you use.

enhancements.name: Bloodthirsty Belligerence
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit. While that unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit as well.

enhancements.name: Da Biggest Boss
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Warboss^^** model only. Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: Big Gob
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Warboss^^** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement range of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, and when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: 'Eadstompa
enhancements.desc: **^^Infantry Warboss^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

enhancements.name: Tellyporta
enhancements.desc: **^^Warboss In Mega Armour^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Fasta Than Yooz
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit disembarks from a **^^Transport^^** after that **^^Transport^^** has made a Normal move, the bearer's unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

enhancements.name: Squig-hide Tyres
enhancements.desc: **^^Deffkilla Wartrike^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

enhancements.name: Speed Makes Right
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or a **^^Transport^^** the bearer is embarked within) is within 9" of one or more enemy units, roll one D6; on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Wazblasta
enhancements.desc: **^^Deffkilla Wartrike^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Gob Boomer
enhancements.desc: **^^Warboss^^** or **^^Mek^^** model only. Each time the bearer issues Taktiks, it can do so to a friendly **^^Orks Infantry^^** or **^^Orks Mounted^^** unit within 18", instead of 6".

enhancements.name: Mork's Kunnin'
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Orks^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Mek Kaptin
enhancements.desc: **^^Big Mek^^**, **^^Big Mek In Mega Armour^^** or **^^Big Mek With Shokk Attack Gun^^** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **^^Flash Gitz^^** unit. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Skwad Leader
enhancements.desc: **^^Warboss Infantry^^** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **^^Kommandos^^** unit. While leading a **^^Kommandos^^** unit, it has the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities.

enhancements.name: Da Gobshot Thunderbuss
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** models only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** and **[HAZARDOUS]** abilities.

enhancements.name: Targetin' Squigs
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Dead Shiny Shootas
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[RAPID FIRE 1]** ability.

enhancements.name: Zog Off And Eat Dakka!
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Razgit's Magik Map
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Orks Infantry^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Git-spotter Squig
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

enhancements.name: Bionik Workshop
enhancements.desc:
**^^Big Mek^^** or **^^Painboy^^** model only. At the start of the battle, roll one D3 and compare the result to the list below. Until the end of the battle, models in the bearer’s unit have that bioniks ability.
**1. Bionik Legs:** Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.
**2. Bionik Arms:** Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.
**3. Bionik Bonce:** Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

enhancements.name: Da Kaptin
enhancements.desc: **^^Warboss^^** model only. Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Orks^^** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and it is no longer Battle‑shocked.

enhancements.name: Living Battering Ram
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer attempts to operate a closed Hatchway, your opponent cannot try to prevent it. In addition, each time the bearer opens a Hatchway, each enemy unit within 6" of that Hatchway and wholly on the opposite side of it from the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Scarred Brute
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Tellyporta
enhancements.desc: In the Deploy Armies step, select one **^^Meganobz^^** unit from your army. Until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Gnasher Squig Crates
enhancements.desc: **^^Warboss^^** model only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Nobz^^** or **^^Meganobz^^** unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) that is within 6" of the bearer and is within range of an objective marker. If there are no enemy models within range of that objective marker, it is Secured by your army.

enhancements.name: Master Meknologist
enhancements.desc: **^^Big Mek^^** model only. Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Dakkamek
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by the selected **^^Vehicle^^** model have the **[RAPID FIRE 1]** ability

enhancements.name: Supa-burny Fuel
enhancements.desc: **^^Deffkilla Wartrike^^** model only. Change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – burna weapon to 3D6, and change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – cutta weapon to 3.

enhancements.name: Kustom Shokk Box
enhancements.desc: **^^Deffkilla Wartrike^^** model only. Each time the bearer uses its turbo, its unit can move horizontally through terrain features.

enhancements.name: Supercharged Squig Oil
enhancements.desc: **^^Mek^^** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls for the selected **^^Vehicle^^** model’s unit.

enhancements.name: Runnin' Boots
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry Character^^** model only. Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer’s unit, if that unit disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** this turn, add 1 to the result.

enhancements.name: Tuff Git
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Infantry Character^^** model only. At the end of a phase in which the bearer’s unit disembarked from a **^^Transport^^**, if that unit is Battle‑shocked, it is no longer Battle‑shocked.

enhancements.name: Blitzkaptin
enhancements.desc: **^^Orks Character^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer’s unit (or any **^^Transport^^** it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three **^^Orks Vehicle^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Fixit da Grot
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Waaagh! Wazdakka
abilities.desc: If this model is your **^^Warlord^^**, **^^Warbiker^^** units from your army have the **^^Battleline^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

subAbilities.name: Turbo Engine
subAbilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

subAbilities.name: Pulse Jet
subAbilities.desc:
Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase:
- Add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
- Models in this unit can move through models and terrain features.

subAbilities.name: Shokk Attack Engine
subAbilities.desc: In your Command phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: More Dakka
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Fix Dat Armour Up
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

This model can be attached to the following unit:

options.name: Kustom force field
options.ability: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

options.ability:
Once per battle, at the end of your Movement phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains D3 lost wounds.
Designer’s Note: Place a Grot Oiler token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Ramshackle Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Shoutin’ Pole (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 11 ORKS INFANTRY models (excluding GHAZGHKULL THRAKA). Each MEGA ARMOUR or JUMP PACK model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Boom Bomb
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6: on a 4+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Billowing Fumes (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Red Skull Kommandos
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Kunnin’ Infiltrator
abilities.desc: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, instead of making a Normal move with this model’s unit, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- KOMMANDOS

abilities.name: Get Da Good Bitz
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one (but only if one of those is a WARBOSS model). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

Boy w/ Big shoota and close combat weapon
Boy w/ Rokkit launcha and close combat weapon

abilities.name: Pyromaniaks
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a burna that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Burna Bomb
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Dakkastorm
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, every successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Piston-driven Brutality
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Speedboss
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fuel-mixa Grot
abilities.desc: Each time this model’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- WARBIKERS

abilities.name: Deff from Above
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Gun-crazy Show-offs
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit targets the closest eligible target with its snazzgun, until the end of the phase, that weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 4.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this unit is in your army, its Ghazghkull Thraka model must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Prophet of Da Great Waaagh!
abilities.desc: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll and if the Waaagh! is active for your army, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

abilities.name: Ghazghkull’s Waaagh! Banner (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly **^^Orks^^** unit is within 12" of Makari, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Boyz^^**
- **^^Meganobz^^**
- **^^Nobz^^**

abilities.name: Clankin’ Forward
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over enemy models (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Big an’ Stompy
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ORKS INFANTRY models (excluding GHAZGHKULL THRAKA). Each MEGA ARMOUR or JUMP PACK model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Runtherd

detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

War Horde.rule: Melee weapons equipped by ORKS models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Careen!
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an ORKS VEHICLE unit from your army with Deadly Demise is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That destroyed ORKS VEHICLE unit, if you roll a 6 for its Deadly Demise.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise resolves, moving over enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) as if not there.

stratagems.name: Orks Is Never Beaten
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Unbridled Carnage
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: 'Ard As Nails
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit (excluding GROTS, MONSTER and VEHICLE units) from your army that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mob Rule
stratagems.when: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One MOB unit from your army that contains 10+ models and is not Below Half-strength.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly Battle-shocked ORKS INFANTRY unit within 6" of that MOB unit; it is no longer Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: 'Ere We Go
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for your unit.

Da Big Hunt.rule: At the start of your Command phase, select one MONSTER, VEHICLE or CHARACTER unit from your opponent's army as your Prey until your next Command phase. Each time a BEAST SNAGGA unit declares a charge that includes your Prey, re-roll the Charge roll. Each time a BEAST SNAGGA model makes an attack that targets your Prey, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Drag It Down
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets your Prey, a Critical Hit is scored on a 5+.

mathBuff.note: Melee [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (Critical Hits also on 5+ vs your Prey).

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Momentum
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That BEAST SNAGGA unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll one D6 per model in your unit: for each 4+, 1 mortal wound (max 6). If that unit is your Prey, roll three additional D6.

stratagems.name: Dat One's Even Bigga!
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and you can re-roll Charge rolls provided one target is your Prey.

stratagems.name: Where D'ya Fink You're Going?
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagems.effect: If not within Engagement Range, your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Stalkin' Taktiks
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets your unit, models have the Benefit of Cover. INFANTRY also gain Stealth.

stratagems.name: Instinctive Hunters
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Kult of Speed.rule: SPEED FREEKS units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Speediest Freeks
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save (4+ if a VEHICLE with Toughness 8 or less).

stratagems.name: Squig Flingin'
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 9". It must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Dakkastorm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons have [SUSTAINED HITS 1], or [SUSTAINED HITS 2] vs units within 9". (Not with Blitza Fire.)

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]; set to Sustained Hits 2 vs targets within 9".

stratagems.name: Blitza Fire
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons have [LETHAL HITS], and vs units within 9" a Critical Hit is scored on a 5+. (Not with Dakkastorm.)

mathBuff.note: Ranged [LETHAL HITS] (Critical Hits also on 5+ vs targets within 9").

stratagems.name: Full Throttle!
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That SPEED FREEKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound melee (must have charged).

stratagems.name: More Gitz Over 'Ere!
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Dread Mob.rule: Each time a MEK, ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit is selected to shoot or fight, roll one D6 (or choose, also gaining [HAZARDOUS]): 1-2 [SUSTAINED HITS 1]; 3-4 [LETHAL HITS]; 5-6 on a Critical Wound improve AP by 2. KEYWORDS: GRETCHIN units gain BATTLELINE.

stratagems.name: Klankin' Klaws
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength of melee weapons in your unit. If you push it, also +1 Damage and [HAZARDOUS].

mathBuff.note: +2 Strength melee (push: also +1 Damage with [HAZARDOUS]).

stratagems.name: Superfuelled Boiler
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ORKS WALKER unit is selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That ORKS WALKER unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, re-roll Advance rolls and ranged weapons have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Bigger Shells for Bigger Gitz
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One MEK, ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll. If you push it, +1 Damage and [HAZARDOUS].

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound, only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets (push: +1 Damage with [HAZARDOUS]).

stratagems.name: Dakka! Dakka! Dakka!
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If you push it, re-roll the Hit roll instead and weapons gain [HAZARDOUS].

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 (push: full Hit re-roll with [HAZARDOUS]).

stratagems.name: Conniving Runts
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One GRETCHIN unit within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move.

stratagems.name: Extra Gubbinz
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC) that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Green Tide.rule: Each time an attack targets a BOYZ unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. If that BOYZ unit contains 10 or more models, they have a 5+ invulnerable save instead.

stratagems.name: Competitive Streak
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit contains 10+ models, re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (full Wound re-roll if 10+ models).

stratagems.name: Bulldozer Brutality
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit that has not fought this phase and is within Engagement Range of an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models within 3" of an enemy model are eligible to fight and can target enemy units within 3" of them.

stratagems.name: Braggin' Rights
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Two BOYZ units within 6" of each other.
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, while within 6" of each other, both count as containing 10+ models for your Detachment rule, Enhancements and Stratagems.

stratagems.name: Come On Ladz!
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Return up to D3+2 destroyed models to your unit (excluding CHARACTER models).

stratagems.name: Tide of Muscle
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, add 1 to the Charge roll; if it contains 10+ models, re-roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Go Get 'Em!
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BOYZ unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit shoots, your unit makes a Go Get 'Em! move: roll one D6 (re-roll if 10+ models); move that many inches, ending as close as possible to the closest enemy unit, possibly within Engagement Range.

Bully Boyz.rule: At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more WARBOSS models on the battlefield, you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. That second Waaagh! only counts as called for WARBOSS, NOBZ and MEGANOBZ units from your army.

stratagems.name: Armed to Da Teef
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, re-roll the Hit roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 (full Hit re-roll if a Waaagh! is active).

stratagems.name: Too Arrogant to Die
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not shot or fought, roll one D6 (+2 if Waaagh! active): on a 5+, do not remove it; it shoots or fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Always Lookin' Fer a Fight
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit that destroyed that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, it can move up to D3+3" (or 6" if a Waaagh! is active).

stratagems.name: Crushing Impact
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll one D6 per model within Engagement Range: for each 5+ (4+ if Waaagh! active), 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Cut'em Down
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all its models take a Desperate Escape test (−1 to each test if a Waaagh! is active for your unit).

stratagems.name: Hulking Brutes
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

Taktikal Brigade.rule:
Once per battle round, in your Command phase or after being set up, each BOSS SNIKROT, MEK and WARBOSS model can issue a Taktik to one friendly ORKS unit within 6" (Leadership test; if failed, 1 mortal wound). Until your next Command phase that unit is affected:
- Get Stuck In: re-roll Charge rolls.
- Get On Wiv It: +1 Strength melee.
- Sneaky Stalkin': INFANTRY/MOUNTED (excl. MEGANOBZ) gain Stealth + Benefit of Cover vs ranged.
- Shoota Drills: +1 to Hit for INFANTRY/MOUNTED ranged attacks.

KEYWORDS: STORMBOYZ units gain BATTLELINE.

stratagems.name: Dat's Ours
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit within Engagement Range of an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Fight Proppa
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY or ORKS MOUNTED unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS]. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: Melee [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or [LETHAL HITS] — pick one).

stratagems.name: Taktikal Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ORKS unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That ORKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Krunchin' Descent
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after a STORMBOYZ unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That STORMBOYZ unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll one D6 per model within Engagement Range: for each 4+, 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: On to Da Next
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Ded Sneaky
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KOMMANDOS or STORMBOYZ unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

More Dakka!.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by ORKS INFANTRY and ORKS WALKER models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. While the Waaagh! is active, during your Shooting phase, those weapons also have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Orks Is Still Orks
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 melee (full re-roll vs a target on an objective).

stratagems.name: Get Stuck In, Ladz!
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit (excluding GRETCHIN).
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you already called a Waaagh!.

stratagems.name: Huge Show-offs
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS WALKER unit (excluding KILLA KANS).
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, improve your unit's Move, Leadership and Objective Control by 1, and each time a model in your unit attacks, add 1 to the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit (also +1 Move/Ld/OC). KILLA KANS excluded.

stratagems.name: Long, Uncontrolled Bursts
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

mathBuff.note: Ranged weapons gain [IGNORES COVER].

stratagems.name: Speshul Shells
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", improve the Armour Penetration of ranged weapons in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 AP vs the closest target within 18".

stratagems.name: Call Dat Dakka?
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that had one or more models destroyed by that unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but only targeting that enemy unit (if eligible).

Freebooter Krew.rule: At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker as your loot objective until your next Command phase. Each time a model in an ORKS INFANTRY, ORKS MOUNTED or ORKS WALKER unit makes an attack, that attack has [SUSTAINED HITS 1] if that model's unit is within range of your loot objective, or the target is within range of your loot objective.

stratagems.name: Bash and Grab
stratagems.when: The Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full melee Wound re-roll vs enemies within range of your loot objective.

stratagems.name: Grab and Bash
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit (excluding GRETCHIN) within range of the loot objective.
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you already called a Waaagh!.

stratagems.name: Boardin' Rush
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Deck Fraggers
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit targets an INFANTRY unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has the [BLAST] ability.

stratagems.name: Rolling Loot-heap
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One FLASH GITZ unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

stratagems.name: Krump and Run
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit falls back.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase and is not within range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Speedwaaagh!.rule: Each time a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) Advances, it can use its turbo: do not make an Advance roll; instead models have a Move of 24" but can only move in one straight line, ranged weapons gain [ASSAULT] until end of turn, and that unit cannot declare a charge.

stratagems.name: On Da Move
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back or Advanced (unless it used its turbo).

stratagems.name: Mobile Dakkastorm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit (excluding Indirect Fire attacks). Until the end of the phase, each time a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK model makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength of that attack by 2.

mathBuff.note: +2 Strength vs the marked enemy unit (also applies to TRUKK attacks).

stratagems.name: Speshul Ammo
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Torrent) have the [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

stratagems.name: Ded Killy Construction
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability, and if your unit charged this turn, add 1 to their Damage.

stratagems.name: Dust Trails
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ORKS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Evasive Manoova
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Blitz Brigade.rule: Each time an ORKS unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that ORKS unit.

stratagems.name: Mount Up, Ladz
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS INFANTRY unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units, and one friendly TRANSPORT it can embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Mekanised Brutality
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after it makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Run 'Em Down
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select up to two other friendly ORKS VEHICLE or MONSTER units within 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit and those units are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

stratagems.name: Armoured Duellists
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ORKS VEHICLE unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit and +1 Wound, but only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Impervious
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, KILL RIG or HUNTA RIG unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the attack's Strength is greater than your unit's Toughness, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Yooz in Trouble Now
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One BATTLEWAGON, HUNTA RIG or KILL RIG model hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: One ORKS INFANTRY unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Surge move (roll one D6; move that many inches, ending as close as possible to the closest enemy unit, possibly within Engagement Range).

enhancements.name: Veil of Darkness
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

enhancements.name: Nether-realm Casket
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Phasal Subjugator
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding CHARACTER units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the hit roll.

enhancements.name: Dimensional Overseer
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

enhancements.name: Eternal Madness
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. In the Fight phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit is destroyed, if that model had not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Ingrained Superiority
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Soulless Reaper
enhancements.desc: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6. On a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back and must Remain Stationary.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Nightmare
enhancements.desc: DESTROYER CULT model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Dimensional Sanctum
enhancements.desc: CRYPTEK model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Hyperphasic Fulcrum
enhancements.desc: CRYPTEK model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army's Power Matrix, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Autodivinator
enhancements.desc: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as a result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Metalodermal Tesla Weave
enhancements.desc: CRYPTEK model only. Once per phase, when an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as a target of a charge, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Honourable Combatant
enhancements.desc: OVERLORD model only. Each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, your opponent loses 1CP if they have any.

enhancements.name: Unflinching Will
enhancements.desc: OVERLORD model only. The bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warrior Noble
enhancements.desc: OVERLORD model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Eternal Conqueror
enhancements.desc: OVERLORD model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Enaegic Dermal Bond
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Arisen Tyrant
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer's unit was set up on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

enhancements.name: Hyperspatial Transfer Node
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. Each time the bearer's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Osteoclave Fulcrum
enhancements.desc: NECRONS model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability.

enhancements.name: Dread Majesty
enhancements.desc: While a friendly ^^**Necrons**^^ unit (excluding ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Titianic^^** units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Miniaturised Nebuloscope
enhancements.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Demanding Leader
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Chrono-impedance Fields
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Necrons Vehicle^^** or **^^Necrons Mounted^^** unit (excluding Titanic units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Gauntlet of Compression
enhancements.desc: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Atomic Disintegrators
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTI‑MONSTER 5+], [ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+].

enhancements.name: Quantum Abacus
enhancements.desc: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Gravitic Bolas
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Titanic^^** units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Destroyer Ankh
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Murdermind
enhancements.desc: The bearer has the Destroyer Cult keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Destroyer Cult unit (excluding Character units). If you do, the bearer’s unit cannot contain any models without the Destroyer Cult keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Nekrosor
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Cursed Circlet
enhancements.desc:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from the bearer’s unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, the bearer’s unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer’s unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but the bearer’s unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). 
When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle‑shocked.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abilities.name: Grand Strategist
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Lord of the Storm
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Master Chronomancer
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: The Stars Are Right
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability.
