abilities.desc: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this unit's Szarekh model, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

subAbilities.name: Phaeron of the Stars (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Necrons**^^ unit (excluding ^^**Monster^^** units) is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

subAbilities.name: Phaeron of the Blades (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** (excluding ^^**Monster^^** units) unit is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

subAbilities.name: Relentless March (Aura)
subAbilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit (excluding ^^**Monster^^** units) is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Reanimation Nodes (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly NECRONS INFANTRY unit is within 6” of this FORTIFICATION, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Ancient Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.desc: When this unit is first set up on the battlefield, its models do not have to be set up in Unit Coherency. Instead, each model must be set up wholly within 12" of one other model from its unit. From that point on, each model in this unit is treated as a separate unit.

abilities.name: Terrifying Monstrosity
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-9 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

options.name: Two synaptic obliterators and two transdimensional projectors

abilities.name: Translocation Shroud
abilities.desc: Each time this model's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until that move is finished, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features (it cannot finish a move on top of another model or its base).

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: My Will Be Done
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abilities.name: Harassment Swarm (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 3" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargearAbilities.name: Nanoscarab Projector
wargearAbilities.desc: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit within 3" of the bearer activates its Reanimation Protocols, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, that unit reanimates 1 additional wound.

wargearAbilities.name: Accelerator Mandible
wargearAbilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, select one friendly ^^**Canoptek^^** unit within 3" of the bearer’s unit. Until the end of the phase, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Weapon Sentinels
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Canoptek Retinue
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a ^^**Cryptek^^** model (a unit cannot have more than one ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** unit joined to it and cannot have both a ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** and a ^^**Cryptothralls^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

models.name: Tomb Crawler w/ twin gauss reaper
Tomb Crawler w/ twin gauss reaper

abilities.name: Tectonic Reverberations
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Obelisk Node Control
abilities.desc: While this model is within range of an objective marker you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Canoptek Macrocytes, Immortals, Necron Warriors^^**. 


*You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one ^^**Royal Warden^^** or ^^**Noble^^** model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Protective Disciples
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Infectious Murder‑madness (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit (excluding ^^**Monster**^^ and ^^**Titanic^^** units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if that model has the ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** keyword or that enemy unit is the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Prophet of Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, select one other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit within 9" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Awakened Dynasty.rule: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Eternal Revenant
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up as close as possible to where it was destroyed, not within Engagement Range, with half its starting wounds. Once per battle per model.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Undying Legions
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit that had one or more models destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit reanimates D3 wounds (D3+1 if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading it).

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Hungry Void
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength of melee weapons in your unit. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading it, improve the Armour Penetration of those weapons by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength melee; add +1 AP as well if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading the unit.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Sudden Storm
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading it, re-roll Advance rolls for it.

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading it, re-roll the Hit roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 vs targets within half range (full re-roll if a CHARACTER leads the unit).

stratagems.name: Protocol of the Vengeful Stars
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a NECRONS unit.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS CHARACTER unit that was within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit resolves its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but only targeting that enemy unit (if eligible).

Annihilation Legion.rule: Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit declares a charge, re-roll the Charge roll; if one or more targets are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration of that attack.

stratagems.name: Masks of Death
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: The Spoor of Frailty
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks a unit below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit vs targets below Starting Strength; +1 Wound too vs Below Half-strength targets.

stratagems.name: Murderous Reanimation
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that just destroyed an enemy unit, or just took one Below Half-strength.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Blood-fuelled Cruelty
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move ending as close as possible to that enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Insanity's Ire
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit that had one or more models destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move ending as close as possible to that enemy unit.

Canoptek Court.rule: Your deployment zone is always within your Power Matrix. At the start of any phase, No Man's Land / your opponent's deployment zone is within your Power Matrix if you control at least half its objectives. Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1; if that unit is wholly within your Power Matrix, re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Curse of the Cryptek
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model destroyed by that unit's attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly CANOPTEK model attacks the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Cynosure of Eradication
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit wholly within your Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]. Requires the unit wholly within your Power Matrix.

stratagems.name: Solar Pulse
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective within 18". Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models have [IGNORES COVER] while targeting units within range of that objective.

stratagems.name: Reactive Subroutines
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Countertemporal Shift
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Suboptimal Facade
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit that was a target of that charge and is wholly within your Power Matrix.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

Obeisance Phalanx.rule: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until your next Command phase, each time a NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Your Time Is Nigh
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your opponent's WARLORD is destroyed.
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Enslaved Artifice
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding TITANIC) that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Nanoassembly Protocols
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Sentinels of Eternity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH PRAETORIANS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Suffer No Rival
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Territorial Obsession
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control of models in your unit (add 3 instead if it has the VEHICLE keyword).

Hypercrypt Legion.rule: At the end of your opponent's turn, select a number of NECRONS units (not within Engagement Range): Incursion 1, Strike Force 2, Onslaught 3. Remove them from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Hyperphasic Recall
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY unit that had models destroyed, and one friendly MONOLITH model.
stratagems.effect: Remove your INFANTRY unit and set it back up wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH and not within Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Quantum Deflection
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Reanimation Crypts
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD.
stratagems.effect: For each of your NECRONS units in Reserves, that unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Cosmic Precision
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER) arriving via Deep Strike or Hyperphasing this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models (not eligible to charge that turn).

stratagems.name: Dimensional Corridor
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit set up this turn via a MONOLITH's Eternity Gate ability.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.

stratagems.name: Entropic Damping
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TITANIC model that was selected as a target and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Starshatter Arsenal.rule: Each time a NECRONS model (excluding MONSTER) makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, ranged weapons equipped by NECRONS VEHICLE and MOUNTED models (excluding TITANIC) have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Merciless Reclamation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC) that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound vs targets within range of an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Forms
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC) that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the attack's Strength is greater than the unit's Toughness, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Chronoshift
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC) that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Dimensional Tunnel
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.

stratagems.name: Endless Servitude
stratagems.when: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC) within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Reactive Reposition
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC) that was a target of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Cryptek Conclave.rule: Ranged weapons equipped by CRYPTEK models have the [ASSAULT] ability. In your Shooting phase, each time a CRYPTEK unit is selected to shoot, select one of [ANTI-INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI-MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]; until the end of the phase its ranged weapons have that ability.

stratagems.name: Molecular Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, ignore any or all modifiers to its BS/WS and to the Hit roll. If your unit has the CRYPTEK keyword, also ignore modifiers to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Microscarab Swarm
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK INFANTRY unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the NECRON WARRIORS keyword, models have a 5+ invulnerable save; if it has the IMMORTALS keyword, a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Animus Curse
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model destroyed by that unit. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly NECRONS model attacks the attacking unit, re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Synergistic Empowerment
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly NECRONS model (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of a CRYPTEK model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that model has the CRYPTEK keyword.

stratagems.name: Untapped Power
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations rule, you can select one additional ability.

stratagems.name: Potentiality Syphon
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Command phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit within range of one or more objective markers.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate (a CRYPTEK unit reanimates an additional 1 wound).

Cursed Legion.rule: Add 2 to the Strength of weapons equipped by DESTROYER CULT models from your army. The first time each turn a DESTROYER CULT unit destroys a unit or takes one Below Half-strength, until the end of the turn add 2 to the Strength of weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models (excluding DESTROYER CULT, MONSTER and TITANIC).

stratagems.name: Methodical Murder
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

mathBuff.note: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. (Excludes MONSTERS/VEHICLES per the Stratagem.)

stratagems.name: Image of Death
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Mortis Protocols
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a DESTROYER CULT unit destroys an enemy unit this turn.
stratagems.target: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 9" of that DESTROYER CULT unit.
stratagems.effect: The friendly unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

stratagems.name: Driven to Butchery
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. Once per turn.

stratagems.name: Spreading Madness
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets are within Engagement Range of a friendly unit, add 2 to the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Unnatural Aggression
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 6" of an enemy unit it could charge.
stratagems.effect: Your unit declares a charge targeting one or more of those enemy units (no Charge bonus this turn).

Pantheon of Woe.rule:
NECRONS MONSTER units have Distortion Fields (Aura): while an enemy unit is within 6", it is unravelling — each time an attack targets it, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1. At the start of each phase, each NECRONS MONSTER unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds to extend its Distortion Fields aura to 9" until end of phase.

RESTRICTIONS: each NECRONS MONSTER takes a Necrodermal Binding ability for an added points cost (C'tan Shards / Transcendent C'tan).

stratagems.name: Disharmonisation Cascade
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER model is destroyed, before its Deadly Demise roll.
stratagems.target: That NECRONS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model's Deadly Demise inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of 6.

stratagems.name: Molecular Erosion
stratagems.when: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. It takes a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1; if failed, it suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Once per battle round.

stratagems.name: Mass Transmogrification
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a NECRONS MONSTER unit destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) within 6" of that MONSTER unit.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit's Reanimation Protocols activate. Once per turn.

stratagems.name: Entrophasic Aura Targeting
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS) that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is unravelling, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1; also re-roll Wounds of 1 vs an unravelling target (within 6" of your C'tan).

stratagems.name: Chronodistortion
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought, roll one D6 (+1 if the attacking unit is unravelling): on a 4+, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Phase Melding
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all its models take a Desperate Escape test (−1 to each if that unit is Battle-shocked).

enhancements.name: Bastion Shield
enhancements.desc: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, if the attacking model is within 18" of the bearer’s unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 instead.

enhancements.name: High Kâhl
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Ironskein
enhancements.desc: Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

enhancements.name: Quake Multigenerator
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Oathbound Speculator
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Writ of Acquisition
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, you gain 1YP for each assailed unit hit by one or more of those attacks (to a maximum of 3YP).

enhancements.name: Surgical Saboteur
enhancements.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next Shooting phase, that model is pinned.

enhancements.name: Nomad Strategist
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Fight phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one ^^**Hernkyn^^** unit from your army, and, for every 2YP you just spent, select up to one additional ^^**Hernkyn^^** unit from your army. You can remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units (excluding assailed units).

enhancements.name: Eye For Weakness
enhancements.desc: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an assailed unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Dead Reckoning
enhancements.desc: **^^Leagues of Votann^^** model only. At the end of the turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you spent no YP in that turn, you gain 1YP.

enhancements.name: Iron Ambassador
enhancements.desc: **^^Leagues of Votann^^** model equipped with an Autoch-pattern combi-bolter only. Once per battle, when the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 3YP, and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's ranged weapons.

enhancements.name: Ancestral Crest
enhancements.desc: Once per turn, when you target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend 1YP and reduces the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if you spend YP using the Optimal Application Detachment rule when doing so, you can roll one D6: on a 2+, you gain 1YP.

Return one destroyed model to that unit, and then, for every 2YP you just spent, return up to one additional destroyed model to that unit.

Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is in range of one or more objective markers you control that are not in your deployment zone, you can spend 1YP. If you do, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This model cannot make a Vengeance move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Vengeance move per phase.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Transport

This model has a transport capacity of 5 ^^**Hernkyn Yaegir**^^ models.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one ^^**Hernkyn Yaegir^^** unit from your army that has not been split. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this ^^**Transport^^**; the other can start the battle embarked within another ^^**Transport^^**, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.
