detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Votann use YP (Yield/Judgement points). Rebuild with build.ps1.

Hearthband.rule:
Each time a LEAGUES OF VOTANN model makes an attack with a weapon that targets the closest eligible target or a target within Engagement Range of that model's unit:
- Re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
- If your unit is a KÂHL, EINHYR HEARTHGUARD or ÛTHAR THE DESTINED unit, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Brëkkeknots
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KÂHL, ÛTHAR THE DESTINED or EINHYR HEARTHGUARD unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Sure of Purpose
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Superior Craftsmanship
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

mathBuff.note: +1 Damage melee, only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Aggression
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Materialisation Matrices
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit in Reserves with the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can be set up anywhere more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units (not eligible to charge that turn).

stratagems.name: Fury of the Hearth
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One EINHYR HEARTHGUARD unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength of ranged weapons in your unit by 1. If you spend 1YP, those weapons also gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

mathBuff.note: +1 Strength ranged (spend 1YP for [SUSTAINED HITS 1] too).

Brandfast Oathband.rule: LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT units have Firebase Control (Aura): while a friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of this TRANSPORT, ranged weapons equipped by models in that INFANTRY unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

stratagems.name: Secure Positions
stratagems.when: End of any of your phases.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT unit.
stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark, set up wholly within 6" of it. It cannot charge this turn but can otherwise act.

stratagems.name: Bastion Running
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HEKATON LAND FORTRESS unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Illuminated Priority
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit. Until the end of the phase, each time a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY model attacks that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: INFANTRY re-roll Hits of 1 vs the enemy unit your VEHICLE hit this phase.

stratagems.name: Inexorable Efficiency
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Opportunistic Escalation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit (excluding HEKATON LAND FORTRESS) hit by those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Vengeance Flare
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit hit by those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Select a friendly KAPRICUS or SAGITAUR within 6" (or HEKATON LAND FORTRESS if you spent YP); it can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, only targeting that enemy unit.

Hearthfyre Arsenal.rule: At the end of your Command phase, gain 1YP for each objective marker you control outside your deployment zone that has an IRON-MASTER and/or MEMNYR STRATEGIST model within range (max 2YP/turn). In your Shooting phase, each time a BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit is selected to shoot, you can spend 1YP to re-roll a Hit roll of 1 for it until end of phase.

stratagems.name: Unwavering Accuracy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, ignore any or all modifiers to its Ballistic Skill, the Hit roll, the Wound roll, and that attack's Armour Penetration.

stratagems.name: First Concern
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, it can make a Normal move.

stratagems.name: Delayed-Fire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit. Until your next Shooting phase, each time it makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 per model: for each 1, 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Wall of Steel
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase, just after an IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range and roll one D6 per model (two extra D6 if you spent YP): for each 4+, 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Preventative Purge
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN or IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, only targeting that enemy unit, with −1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Cogitated Need
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move, ending as close as possible to the closest objective marker.

Persecution Prospect.rule: LEAGUES OF VOTANN units have Guerrilla Adepts: in your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, it can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES); until end of phase it can only target that unit, and if one or more attacks hit, that unit becomes assailed until your next Shooting phase. If already assailed, it also becomes pinned (−2" Move, −2 to Charge rolls).

stratagems.name: Adaptable Avarice
stratagems.when: Start of any phase, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: Spend any number of YP. If you then have 6 or fewer YP, until your next turn, units from your army have Hostile Acquisition instead.

stratagems.name: Frontier Momentum
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Exposed Flaws
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if you spent YP and/or the attack targets an assailed unit, re-roll the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Wound re-roll (if you spend 2YP, or vs an assailed target).

stratagems.name: Ranger Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if it targets an assailed unit and/or your unit has the HERNKYN keyword, re-roll the Hit roll.

mathBuff.note: Full Hit re-roll (for HERNKYN units, or vs an assailed target).

stratagems.name: Claimstaker Reflex
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit (excluding ARTILLERY and VEHICLE) within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6" (up to 6" if you spent YP).

stratagems.name: Dispersed Formation
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has Stealth and the Benefit of Cover against ranged attacks.

Mercenary Oathband.rule: Your LEAGUES OF VOTANN units start the battle with the Hostile Acquisition ability. At the end of your Command phase, you can spend 3YP to swap all units between Hostile Acquisition and Fortify Takeover.

stratagems.name: Auxiliary Contract
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Optimal Expenditure
stratagems.when: The Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 3YP optionally. Until the end of the phase, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits and Wounds of 1 melee (spend 3YP to upgrade the Wound re-roll to full).

stratagems.name: Grand Artifice
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Privateer Arsenal
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 3YP optionally. Until the end of the phase, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP, re-roll the Hit roll and re-roll a Wound roll of 1 instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits and Wounds of 1 ranged (spend 3YP to upgrade the Hit re-roll to full).

stratagems.name: New Horizons
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units, and one friendly TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Mobile Exploitation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HERNKYN unit not within Engagement Range (or spend 2YP for up to two HERNKYN units).
stratagems.effect: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Needgaârd Oathband.rule: Each time an enemy unit is destroyed, you gain 1YP.

stratagems.name: Void Hardened
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Honour of the Hold
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 3YP optionally. Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets it, improve the Armour Penetration by 1 (by 2 if you spent YP).

mathBuff.note: +1 AP melee vs the chosen enemy unit (set +2 if you spend 3YP).

stratagems.name: Ordered Retreat
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Ancestral Sentence
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 3YP optionally. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons in your unit have [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or [SUSTAINED HITS 2] if you spent YP).

mathBuff.note: Ranged [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (set to Sustained Hits 2 if you spend 3YP).

stratagems.name: Huntr's Mark
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Hits of 1 and Wounds of 1.

stratagems.name: Reactive Reprisal
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, only targeting that enemy unit (if eligible).

Dêlve Assault Shift.rule:
CTHONIAN BESERKS units from your army have the Deep Strike ability.

KEYWORDS: CTHONIAN BESERKS units gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

stratagems.name: Cyberstimm Infusion
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Until the end of the phase, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP, re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 melee (spend 2YP for full Wound re-roll). Cthonian Beserks unit.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Force
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Piles In or Consolidates, each model can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: Augmented Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS unit that has not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Spend up to 2YP. Until the end of the turn, add X" to the Move characteristic (X = YP spent) and your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Tectonic Fracture
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a CTHONIAN EARTHSHAKERS unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Spend 2YP optionally. Select one enemy unit hit. Until your next Shooting phase, −2" Move (and −2 to Charge rolls if you spent YP).

stratagems.name: Weavewërke Buttress
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
stratagems.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Hidden Accessways
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One CTHONIAN BESERKS, HEARTHKYN WARRIORS or HERNKYN YAEGIRS unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Alien Cunning
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Perfectly Adapted
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer

enhancements.name: Synaptic Linchpin
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Biology
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

enhancements.name: Instinctive Defense
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Harvester^^** units, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit. The first time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, until the end of battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only (excluding **^^Monsters^^** models) The bearer's unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

enhancements.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Harvester^^** model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that **^^Harvester^^** model can Regenerate one friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit that is within 9" instead of one within 6".

enhancements.name: Monstrous Nemesis
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Monster^^**or **^^Vehicle^^**unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Null Nodules
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Ominous Presence
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Add 3 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Enraged Reserves
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up with 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Control
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the attack.

enhancements.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis (Aura)
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

enhancements.name: Power of the Hive Mind
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids Psyker^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of psychic weapons equipped by the wearer of 1.

enhancements.name: Naturalised Camoflage
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, select up to three friendly **^^Endless Multitude^^** units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Piercing Talons
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time a model in the Bearer's unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Relentless Hunger
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit makes a Pile In or Consolidation, models in this unit can move an additional 3"

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+ that unit must make a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Neuronode
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three **^^Vanguard Invader^^** units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Stalker
enhancements.desc: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Chameleonic
enhancements.desc: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Sensory Assimilation
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Elevated Might
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Ocular Adaptation
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Tyrant
enhancements.desc: **^^Neurotyrant^^** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **^^Tyranid Warriors^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Intellect
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Trygon Prime
enhancements.desc: **^^Trygon^^** model only. The bearer gains the **^^Synapse^^** keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Synergy
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Tremor Senses
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Predatory Instincts
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Biomorph Adaption
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant ^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Mutagenic Regeneration
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer's unit regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: Alien Majesty
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. While an enemy unit is in within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

enhancements.name: Martial Espionage
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once Per turn, when a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** or **^^Astra Militarum Mounted^^**unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Reprisal
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit within 8" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: The Hero Returned
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1

enhancements.name: Fire-point Commander
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that stratagem, hits are successfully scored on a 5+.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Auger
enhancements.desc: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Tyrant
enhancements.desc: **^^Winged Hive Tyrant^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Inhuman Integration
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Tyranids^^**units.

enhancements.name: Enraptured Damnation
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Our Time is Nigh
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per battle, when the bearer's unit declares a charge, the bearer can use the Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: A Chink in Their Armour
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped in the bearer's unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

enhancements.name: Prowling Agitant
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advanced, or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer's unit, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: Assassination Edict
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Serpentine Tactics
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Cartographic Data-leech
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. While the bearer is embarked within a **^^Transport^^**, each time that **^^Transport^^** is selected to shoot, until end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that **^^Transport^^** as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

enhancements.name: Starfall Shells
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Assault Commando
enhancements.desc: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Deeds That Speak to the Masses
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

enhancements.name: Gene-sire's Reliquant
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Inspiration
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Denunciator of Tyrants
enhancements.desc: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit Roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Reinforced Carapace
enhancements.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack (note that if given to a Tyranid Prime model, this only affects that model and not other models in its unit).

enhancements.name: Synaptic Goad
enhancements.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons^^** or **^^Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the end of the turn, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Beacon
enhancements.desc: While a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer (ignoring Walls and closed Hatchways), that unit is within Synapse Range of the bearer and of your army.

enhancements.name: Hypersurge Gland
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Charge phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase.

enhancements.name: Primary Detonator
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, when an enemy unit opens a closed Hatchway, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Master Saboteur
enhancements.desc: The first time in the battle that your opponent's army Secures an objective marker while the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 3+, that objective marker is not Secured by your opponent's army.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Imp
enhancements.desc: **^^Abominant^^** model only. Each time an enemy unit opens a Hatchway, if the bearer is within 1" of that Hatchway, roll one D6: one a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Miasmic Fumes
enhancements.desc: **^^Biophagus^^** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Psi-spoor Sensitivity
enhancements.desc: Each time the bearer declares a charge, it can target enemy units that are not visible to it.

enhancements.name: Stalking Menace
enhancements.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Fight phase, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase as if it had the Deep Strike ability. If this is not possible, the bearer is destroyed. When the bearer is set back up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, it cannot declare a charge.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Feel No Pain

abilities.name: Hulking Bodyguards
abilities.desc: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain

abilities.name: The Chosen One
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+ do not remove the destroyed model from play, it can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making it's attacks and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Regenerating Gene-mass
abilities.desc: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- ABERRANTS

abilities.name: Crossfire
abilities.desc: in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

options.name: Flare launcher
options.ability: The bearer’s unit has the SMOKE keyword and you can target it with the Smokescreen Stratagem for 0CP.

options.name: Spotter
options.ability: The bearer’s ranged weapons have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+.

options.name: Survey augur
options.ability: Each time the bearer’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by the bearer this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model makes an attack against that unit, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Nexus of Devotion
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If that unit has the HYBRID METAMORPHS keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

abilities.name: Summon the Cult
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when you have to remove a Cult Ambush marker because your opponent has moved too close to it, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can use this ability. If you do, instead of removing that marker, you can place it anywhere on the battlefield that is within 12" of a model from your army with this ability and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, this ability is not considered to have been used and that marker is removed as normal).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids^^**
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^**
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^**

abilities.name: Outrider Gangs
abilities.desc: Each time you use the Cult Ambush ability to set this unit back up on the battlefield, in addition to the normal rules, all of its models must be set up wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and at least one of its models must be touching one of your Cult Ambush markers (that marker is then removed from the battlefield). If this cannot be done, this unit cannot be set back up.

abilities.name: Demolition Run
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, when this unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each ATALAN JACKALS model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds.)

models.name: Atalan Jackal w/ Atalan power weapon
Atalan Jackal w/ Grenade launcher & power weapon

abilities.name: Twisted Science
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Biological Warfare
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Damage characteristics of its injector goad by 3.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ABERRANTS

- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS WITH AUTOPISTOLS
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS WITH HANDFLAMERS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS

You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Voice of New Truths
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it, if it does, select one enemy unit with 18" of it, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Scrambler Array
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS
You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Grinding Line-breaker
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of this model Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-3 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-3 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 6 GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY models.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY models.

abilities.name: Brood Surge
abilities.desc:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: this unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so those models can be within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

If, at the start of the battle, no model in this unit is equipped with a hand flamer, each time this unit makes a Brood Surge move, it can be moved up to 6" instead of up to D6". A unit cannot make a Brood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

wargearAbilities.name: Cult Icon
wargearAbilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

abilities.name: Priority Target
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Master Outrider
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ATALAN JACKALS

abilities.name: Hypersensory Abilities
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can shoot at that unit as if it were your Shooting phase, and then make a Normal move of up to D6" (it cannot embark within a TRANSPORT as part of this move)

abilities.name: Heroic Fusillade
abilities.desc: Once per turn, after one model from your army with this ability has shot, you can select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Sudden Assault
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, other Character models attached to that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS
You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Psychic Familiar
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any of your opponent’s Shooting phases, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Mind Control ability.

abilities.name: Mind Control (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one PSYKER model from your army with this ability can use it. If used, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that PSYKER model and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound Roll.

abilities.name: Spiritual Leader
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly GENESTELERS CULTS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS

abilities.name: A Plan Generations in the Making
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

models.name: Neophyte Hybrid w/ Hybrid Firearm & Cult Icon

wargearAbilities.name: Cult Icon
wargearAbilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

options.name: Autopistol, hybrid firearm and close combat weapon
Autopistol, anointed pistol and power weapon

abilities.name: Battlefield Analysis
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Cult Infiltration
abilities.desc: At the start of each player’s Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one of your Cult Ambush markers that is on the battlefield and has not been moved this turn and move it up to 6"

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS
You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Might From Beyond
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Cosmic Horror (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Psychic Familiar
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Cosmic Horror ability.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc:
- You cannot include more than one **^^Patriarch^^** model in your army.
- If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS

abilities.name: Cult Demagogue
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Decoys and Misdirection
abilities.desc: If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids^^**
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^**
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^**

abilities.name: Swift and Deadly
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Primed and Ready
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability as the target of the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, provided that model has not already been the target of that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Planted Explosives
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, this model can use its Reductus mine. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. Only one model from your army with this ability can use it in the same battle round.

abilities.name: Creeping Shadow
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with a cult sniper rifle, once per turn when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"

abilities.name: Psychic Spoor
abilities.desc: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Cloaked Assassin
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with a Sanctus Bio-dagger, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this model.

options.name: Cult sniper rifle and close combat weapon

abilities.name: Industrialised Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound Roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the wound roll.

wargearAbilities.name: Cult Icon
wargearAbilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.
