abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Psionic Shield (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS

abilities.name: Claimed for the Cult
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, roll one D6 for each objective marker that you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it. If one or more of the results is a 4+, you gain 1CP.

wargearAbilities.name: Cult Icon
wargearAbilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

models.name: Acolyte Hybrid w/ Heavy Mining Tool

abilities.name: Pouncing Leap
abilities.desc: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Pheromone Trail
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, you can target one model with this ability with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.desc: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Alpha Warrior
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Death Blow
abilities.desc: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Gargoyles^^**
- **^^Tyranid Warriors With Melee Bio-Weapons^^**
- **^^Tyranid Warriors With Ranged Bio-Weapons^^**

abilities.name: Winged Swarm
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Fear of the Unseen (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Hunter Organism
abilities.desc: This model cannot be your Warlord

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.desc: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Terror from the Deep
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-4, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Parasitic Infection
abilities.desc: Each time an **^^Infantry^^** model is destroyed by an attack made with this model’s barbed ovipositor, after this model has finished making its attacks, you can add one new **^^Ripper Swarms^^** unit to your army consisting of D3 models and set it up within 3" of this model. If you do, that **^^Ripper Swarms^^** unit can be set up within Engagement Range of the destroyed model’s unit (but not within Engagement Range of any other enemy units).

abilities.name: It Itches!
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Aerial Seeding
abilities.desc: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 20 TYRANIDS INFANTRY models, or 1 TYRANIDS MONSTER model with a Wounds characteristic of 12 or less. Each INFANTRY model with a Wounds characteristic of more than 1 takes up the space of 3 models.

abilities.name: Subterranean Tunnels
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can use a subterranean tunnel. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Death From Below
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.desc: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP

abilities.name: Neural Disruption
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test

abilities.name: Psychological Saboteur (Aura)
abilities.desc:
While an enemy unit is with 12" of this model, if that unit is Battle-shocked:

- Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll
- Each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Paroxysm (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Will of the Hive Mind
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Alpha Invader
abilities.desc: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Hypersensory Array
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This unit can be attached to the following units: **^^Raveners^^**

abilities.name: Serpentine Fiend
abilities.desc: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of **^^Ruins^^**, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.desc: Each time an attack with this model’s gaping maw targets an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** unit, each successful unmodified Wound roll is a Critical Wound. Each time an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** model is destroyed as a result of an attack made by this model’s gaping maw, this model regains up to D3+2 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Subterranean Hunter
abilities.desc: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Brood Brother Auxilia.rule:
Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 18" and visible; until end of phase that ASTRA MILITARUM unit can only target it and that unit is caught in overlapping fire (each time a GENESTEALER CULTS model targets it with a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll).

BROOD BROTHERS: include ASTRA MILITARUM units — Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500 pts. A GENESTEALER CULTS model must be your WARLORD; excludes AIRCRAFT, COMMISSAR, EPIC HERO, MILITARUM TEMPESTUS, OGRYN, RATLING, TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER, MINISTORUM PRIEST.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Iron
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers; set it up anywhere more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Regimental Reinforcements
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY REGIMENT unit (excluding ARTILLERY/CHARACTER) is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That INFANTRY unit. You can use this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: On a 3+, place a Cult Ambush marker more than 9" from enemy units and add a new identical unit in Cult Ambush at Starting Strength. Once per battle.

stratagems.name: Suppress and Overwhelm
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM unit has shot.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit. Until end of turn it cannot be targeted with Fire Overwatch, and each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit selects it as a charge target, re-roll the Charge roll.

stratagems.name: Acceptable Losses
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GENESTEALER CULTS units. Your unit can shoot it; after resolving, roll one D6 per those GSC units: on a 5+ that unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Symbiotic Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM and one GENESTEALER CULTS unit that have not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and in range of both. Until end of phase those units can only target it, and each time such a model attacks, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (both selected units must focus the one chosen enemy unit).

stratagems.name: A Dark Network
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up from Reserves.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM or GENESTEALER CULTS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Biosanctic Broodsurge.rule: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS and PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS units. Each time such a unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until end of phase add 1 to the Attacks of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Evasive Vanguard
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing them.
stratagems.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: Set it up anywhere more than 9" horizontally from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Saintly Paroxysm
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model.
stratagems.target: That destroyed CHARACTER model. You can use this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (2D3 if the model was an ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH).

stratagems.name: Gene-twisted Muscle
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound, only vs MONSTER or VEHICLE targets.

stratagems.name: Hyper-metabolic Vigour
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3" and need not end closer to the closest enemy model (just as close as possible to the closest enemy unit).

stratagems.name: Stimulated Bio-surge
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is a target, add 1 to the Charge roll for each selected target (max +3).

stratagems.name: Bio-horror Revelation
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" is selected to shoot, it takes a Leadership test (−1); if failed, its attacks targeting your unit are at −1 to Hit.

Outlander Claw.rule: While a GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or VEHICLE model is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to its Objective Control. At the end of your Command phase, if one or more ATALAN JACKALS units are within range of an objective marker you control, it remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over it is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Along Shadowed Trails
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: Set it up anywhere more than 9" horizontally from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Devoted Crew
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GOLIATH ROCKGRINDER or GOLIATH TRUCK unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Close-range Shoot-out
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or VEHICLE unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".

mathBuff.note: Ranged [LETHAL HITS] vs targets within 18".

stratagems.name: Rapid Feint
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Deft Manoeuvring
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: Encircling the Prey
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or VEHICLE unit not within Engagement Range and wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Xenocreed Congregation.rule: For each ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS and NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit, while one or more CHARACTER models are leading it, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls for it. If that CHARACTER is a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, it has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability while leading that unit.

stratagems.name: Vengeance for the Martyr!
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model.
stratagems.target: One other GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly ACOLYTE/HYBRID METAMORPHS/NEOPHYTE model attacks that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 (full re-roll if the destroyed model was a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD).

stratagems.name: Frenzied Devotion
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding CHARACTERS) in your unit by 1, and those weapons have [HAZARDOUS].

mathBuff.note: +1 Attacks and +1 to Hit (improved WS) melee, with [HAZARDOUS]. Non-CHARACTER models.

stratagems.name: Tireless Fervour
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back; re-roll the Charge roll if targeting an enemy within Engagement Range of a friendly CHARACTER.

stratagems.name: Transcendent Celerity
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: The Downtrodden Rise
stratagems.when: End of the Reinforcements step of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Set up your unit on the battlefield without a Cult Ambush marker, more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: The Path of Anguish
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit that had models destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", ending as close as possible to the closest enemy unit, possibly within Engagement Range.

Final Day.rule:
At the end of your Movement phase, for each TYRANIDS SYNAPSE unit, you can select one friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit (excluding PURESTRAIN/PATRIARCH) and one friendly TYRANIDS unit, both within 9". The GSC unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds; one model in the TYRANIDS unit regains that many wounds and, until your next Movement phase, +1 to Hit. TYRANIDS units have Catalyst (Aura): while an enemy unit is within 6", friendly GSC attacks vs it get +1 to Hit.

includes TYRANIDS VANGUARD INVADER units — Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500 pts. No TYRANIDS model can be WARLORD.

stratagems.name: Hyperferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit attacks, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly TYRANIDS units are within 6" of that enemy unit, re-roll the Wound roll instead.

mathBuff.note: Re-roll Wounds of 1 (full re-roll vs an enemy within 6" of a friendly TYRANIDS unit).

stratagems.name: Psi Surge
stratagems.when: Start of any phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit's Catalyst ability by 3". Cannot be used again until your next Command phase.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Star Children
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a TYRANIDS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.target: That destroyed unit. You can use this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a GENESTEALER CULTS model attacks that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Divine Imperative
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of a friendly TYRANIDS unit. Until end of phase, each time your unit declares a charge targeting it, add 1 to the Charge roll and re-roll it.

stratagems.name: Darting Attacks
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Resistance Tunnels
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS or TYRANIDS unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Host of Ascension.rule: Each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

stratagems.name: Coordinated Trap
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Two GENESTEALER CULTS units that have not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (within Engagement Range of both if used in Fight). Until end of phase those units can only target it, and each time a model in them attacks, add 1 to the Wound roll.

mathBuff.note: +1 Wound (both selected units must focus the one chosen enemy unit).

stratagems.name: Primed and Readied
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Crawlers
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit arriving via Deep Strike this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units (not eligible to charge that turn).

stratagems.name: Lying in Wait
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS BATTLELINE unit in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting up via a Cult Ambush marker, set up wholly within 6" of it and not within Engagement Range of enemy units.

stratagems.name: Return to the Shadows
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Snare
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit that was a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Guiding Presence
enhancements.desc: Aeldari Psyker model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Harmonisation Matrix
enhancements.desc: Aeldari model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any Transport it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
enhancements.desc: Aeldari Psyker model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Aeldari Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Guileful Strategist
enhancements.desc: Aeldari model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Aeldari Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Aspect of Murder
enhancements.desc: **^^Autarch^^** or **^^Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Wisdom
enhancements.desc: ^^**Autarch^^** or ^^**Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading an ^^**Aspect Warriors^^** unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Shimmerstone
enhancements.desc: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Strategic Savant
enhancements.desc: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Gaze of Ynnead
enhancements.desc: Farseer model only. The bearer's Eldritch Storm weapon has the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Storm of Whispers
enhancements.desc: Warlock model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Borrowed Vigour
enhancements.desc: **^^Archon^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Morbid Might
enhancements.desc: Succubus model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Cegorach's Coil
enhancements.desc: Troupe Master model only. Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer's unit that is within Engagment Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Mask of Secrets
enhancements.desc: Harlequins model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Murder's Jest
enhancements.desc: Death Jester model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below Half-strength, each successful Hit scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Mistweave
enhancements.desc: Shadowseer model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Craftworld's Champion
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Ethereal Pathway
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two Guardians units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Protector of the Paths
enhancements.desc: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

enhancements.name: Breath of Vaul
enhancements.desc: **^^Asuryani^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a **^^Storm Guardians^^** unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re-roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a Guardian fusion gun in that unit, you can re-roll the result.

enhancements.name: Crucible of Malediction
enhancements.desc: **^^Haemonculus^^** model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a **^^Psyker^^** unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Eye of Spite
enhancements.desc: **^^Succubus^^** model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
enhancements.desc:
**^^Archon^^** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:
Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Dark Vitality
enhancements.desc: **^^Drukhari^^** model only. The bearer's unit is always Empowered - you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit's Pain abilities

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^, that ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^ has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Webway walker
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Reaper's Cowl
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

enhancements.name: Conductor of Torment
enhancements.desc:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Drukhari**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Harlequins**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.

enhancements.name: Lucid Eye
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

enhancements.name: Runes of Warding
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Torc of Morai-Heg
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Psyker model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Phantasmal Smoke
enhancements.desc:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of a friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the  Stealth ability
Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Sadistic Fulcrum
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower the bearer’s unit in the Shooting phase, select one friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^ within 6" of the bearer’s unit; until the end of the phase, each time that ^^**Transport**^^ makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Raider
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, if that enemy unit was within range of one or more objective markers when the bearer’s unit was selected to fight, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

enhancements.name: Nightmare Shroud
enhancements.desc: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Light of Clarity
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Infanty models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of Monster models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Stave of Kurnous
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding Titanic units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [Precision] ability.

enhancements.name: Rune of Mists
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Higher Duty
enhancements.desc: Spiritseer model only. Oncer per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, the bearer's unit can make a normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Psychic Destroyer
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ ^^Psyker^^ model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Phoenix Gem
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one of more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Timeless Strategist
enhancements.desc: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Firstdrawn Blade
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Mirage Field
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Seersight Strike
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted Psyker model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [Anti-Monster 2+] and [Anti-Vehicle 2+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
enhancements.desc: Asuryani Mounted model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Master Regenesist
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer's unit instead of D3+1.

enhancements.name: Master Nemesine
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. The bearer's weapons have the ^^**[Anti-Beast 2+]**^^ and ^^**[Anti-Monster 4+]**^^ abilities.

enhancements.name: Master Artisan
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Master Repugnomancer [Aura]
enhancements.desc: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer's Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle-shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

enhancements.name: Leechbite Plate
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player's Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Webway Awl
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Informant Network
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ and/or ^^**Hand of the Archon**^^ units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Towering Arrogance
enhancements.desc: ^^**Archon**^^ models only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Pharmacophex
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list. The result rolled applies to the bearer's unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

enhancements.name: Chronoshard
enhancements.desc: ^^** Succubus**^^ model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Periapt of Torments
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

enhancements.name: Morghenna's Curse
enhancements.desc: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1.

enhancements.name: Key of Ghosts
enhancements.desc: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only (excluding ^^**Solitaire**^^ models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Fanged Leer
enhancements.desc: ^^**Death Jester**^^ model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

enhancements.name: Shedskin Raiment
enhancements.desc: ^^**Shadowseer**^^ model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Harlequins units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Weavers' Wail
enhancements.desc: ^^**Troupe Master**^^ model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Pirate Prince
enhancements.desc: ^^**Prince Yriel**^^ unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Alacritous Assault
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[LANCE]**^^ ability.

enhancements.name: Exotic Munitions
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[ANTI‑MONSTER 5+]**^^ and ^^**[ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+]**^^ abilities.

enhancements.name: Adrenal Infusions
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

enhancements.name: Infamy (Aura)
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3” of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

enhancements.name: Webway Pathstone
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Archraider
enhancements.desc:
^^**Anhrathe Character**^^ unit only. At the start of the battle, select one ^^**Character**^^ model in this unit. That model has the following ability: 


**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12” of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: Voidstone
enhancements.desc: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Hand of the Archon
■ Incubi
■ Kabalite Warriors

abilities.name: Overlord
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Devious Mastermind
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Shadowfield
abilities.desc: You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 2+ invulnerable save. (See Shadowfield ability)

abilities.name: Hatred Eternal (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting or the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

options.name: Soul Trap
options.ability: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons. The first time the bearer makes a melee attack that destroys an enemy model, after all the bearer's attacks have been resolved, until the end of the battle, add an additional 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Pain Engine (Aura)
abilities.desc:
Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a friendly unit within 9" of this unit, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if one or more models in this unit are not equipped with a spirit vortex: on a 5+, you gain 1 Pain token.


**Designer's Note:** Pain tokens you spend for reasons other than Empowering a unit do not trigger this ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Pain Parasite (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit shoots or fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds (if all models in this unit have their starting number of wounds and this unit is below its Starting Strength, 1 model is returned to this unit with 3 wounds remaining).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Incubi

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Master of Blades (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile-In or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

abilities.name: Silent Executioner
abilities.desc: Each time this model make an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If that target is Below Half-Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Wracks

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Fear Incarnate (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Pain Adept
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

abilities.name: Fleshcraft (Pain)
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model's unit. Each time you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Battlefield Butchery (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this unit's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Skyboard Evasion
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

options.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
options.ability: The bearer’s unit has the Grenades keyword.

wargearAbilities.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
wargearAbilities.desc: The bearer’s unit has the Grenades keyword.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Tormentors
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test. Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Decapitating Strikes (Pain)
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an ^^**Infantry**^^ unit, that attack has the ^^**[Devastating Wounds]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Cruel Enforcers
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under you control, until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Sadistic Raiders (Pain)

detData._format: ruleName + rule + stratagems [{name,type,cp,when,target,effect,mathBuff?}]. mathBuff scope: 'ranged'|'melee'|'all'. Drukhari use Pain tokens / Empowered. Rebuild with build.ps1.

Realspace Raiders.rule: At the start of the battle, gain 2 Pain tokens for each combination your army contains (cumulative, up to 6): ARCHON + KABALITE WARRIORS; SUCCUBUS + WYCHES; HAEMONCULUS + WRACKS.

stratagems.name: Insensible to Pain
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Fighting Shadows
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit (excluding HAEMONCULUS COVENS) that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Instinctive Spite
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two DRUKHARI BATTLELINE units, or one other DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Spend 1 Pain token optionally. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in those units attacks an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll (and +1 Wound if you spent the token).

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit vs Below Half-strength targets (spend 1 Pain token for +1 Wound too).

stratagems.name: Dark Harvest
stratagems.when: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two WRACKS units, or one other DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in those units have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

mathBuff.note: Melee [LETHAL HITS].

stratagems.name: Eager for the Kill
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two WYCHES units, or one other DRUKHARI unit, that have not moved this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll; instead add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Raid and Fade
stratagems.when: End of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KABALITE WARRIORS units, or one other DRUKHARI unit (excluding SCOURGES and AIRCRAFT).
stratagems.effect: Each of those units can make a Normal move of up to 6" (not within Engagement Range; not eligible to charge this turn).

Skysplinter Assault.rule: Each time a DRUKHARI unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn: ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Vicious Blades
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a DRUKHARI TRANSPORT has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That TRANSPORT.
stratagems.effect: After it fights, select one enemy unit it targeted and roll one D6 per embarked model (+1 if a WRACKS model): for each 5+, 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Wraithlike Retreat
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit that fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move, but unless it is a WYCHES unit it must end within 3" of a friendly DRUKHARI TRANSPORT and embark within it.

stratagems.name: Pounce on the Prey
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI INFANTRY unit disembarks from a TRANSPORT that made a Normal move.
stratagems.target: That INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge.

stratagems.name: Skyborne Annihilation
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit that has not shot this phase and disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons in your unit have [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or [SUSTAINED HITS 2] if a KABALITE WARRIORS or HAND OF THE ARCHON unit).

mathBuff.note: Ranged [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (set Sustained 2 for KABALITE WARRIORS / HAND OF THE ARCHON). Unit must have disembarked this turn.

stratagems.name: Swooping Mockery
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI TRANSPORT within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your TRANSPORT can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Night Shield
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI VEHICLE unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Spectacle of Spite.rule:
At the start of your Command phase, select (or roll two D6 for) Combat Drugs active for WYCH CULT models until your next Command phase (each selectable once per battle):
1. Adrenalight: +1 Attacks melee.
2. Hypex: +2" Move.
3. Serpentin: +1 Weapon Skill melee.
4. Painbringer: +1 Toughness.
5. Grave Lotus: +1 Strength melee.
6. Splintermind: +1 Leadership and +1 Ballistic Skill.

stratagems.name: Berserk Fugue
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Deadly Debut
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit that made a Charge move this turn and has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons in your unit have [LETHAL HITS]. If a WYCHES unit, also improve the Armour Penetration of those weapons by 1.

mathBuff.note: Melee [LETHAL HITS] (must have charged). WYCHES units also get +1 AP — add apMod:1 if simulating Wyches.

stratagems.name: Feigned Weakness
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI unit Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Preternatural Agility
stratagems.when: Start of your Movement or Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ignore modifiers to its Move and to Advance/Charge rolls, and it can move horizontally through models.

stratagems.name: A Challenge Met
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit that could declare a charge.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 9" that was set up or ended a Normal/Advance move this phase. Your unit declares a charge targeting only it (no Charge bonus).

stratagems.name: Acrobatic Display
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WYCH CULT unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

Covenite Coterie.rule: Each time an attack targets a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Postmortality
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS model just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Spend 1-3 Pain tokens. At the end of the phase, set it back up near where it died (not within Engagement Range) with wounds equal to the tokens spent. Once per model per battle.

stratagems.name: Symphony of Suffering
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a DRUKHARI unit destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.target: That DRUKHARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 9" and visible must take a Battle-shock test (−1 if your unit is a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit).

stratagems.name: Poisoner's Art
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit has fought.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) hit. Until end of battle it is poisoned; at the start of each Command phase roll one D6 per poisoned unit: on a 4+ it suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Distillers of Fear
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Battle-shocked enemy unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mathBuff.note: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], only vs Battle-shocked enemy units.

stratagems.name: Connoisseurs of Pain
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Spend 1 Pain token. Until the attacking unit finishes its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1. (HAEMONCULUS COVENS units regain the token at end of phase if they survive.)

stratagems.name: Enfolding Nightmare
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: your unit can move that many inches, ending as close as possible to the closest enemy unit, possibly within Engagement Range.

Kabalite Cartel.rule:
At the start of the first battle round, select one Contract and a matching enemy unit as your Contract unit. KABAL and BLADES FOR HIRE units gain the Contract ability; when the Contract unit is destroyed, the Contract completes and you gain 3 Pain tokens.
- Trophy Hunters (CHARACTER): [PRECISION] vs the Contract unit.
- Sow Fear and Terror (INFANTRY/MOUNTED): [SUSTAINED HITS 1] vs INFANTRY/MOUNTED.
- Show of Strength (MONSTER/VEHICLE): [LETHAL HITS] vs MONSTER/VEHICLE.

stratagems.name: Double-Cross
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit selected as a target, and one friendly DRUKHARI unit (excluding VEHICLES).
stratagems.effect: Until end of phase, each time you would allocate an attack to your KABAL/BLADES unit, if your other DRUKHARI unit is within Engagement Range of the attacker, no save is made; instead that DRUKHARI unit suffers mortal wounds equal to the attack's Damage.

stratagems.name: Taken Alive
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI unit that has not fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your Contract unit is destroyed as a result, every enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test.

mathBuff.note: +1 Hit melee.

stratagems.name: Tailored Toxins
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets your Contract unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Enemies Without Number
stratagems.when: Your Command phase, just after you complete a Contract.
stratagems.target: One ARCHON WARLORD from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select a new Contract and a matching enemy unit as your Contract unit (Murderous Agenda applies as normal).

stratagems.name: Making a Point
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KABALITE WARRIORS or HAND OF THE ARCHON unit that has not shot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

mathBuff.note: +1 to Hit (improved BS) and +1 AP on ranged weapons.

stratagems.name: Deadly Deceivers
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One KABAL or BLADES FOR HIRE unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be targeted by a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Reaper's Wager.rule:
At the start of the battle, DRUKHARI units are winning the wager. Each time a DRUKHARI unit destroys an enemy unit, DRUKHARI units are winning; each time a HARLEQUINS unit destroys an enemy unit, HARLEQUIN units are winning (and the other side is losing). Each time a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS model attacks: if its unit is winning, re-roll a Hit roll of 1; if losing, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1 instead.

includes HARLEQUINS units — Incursion 500 / Strike Force 1000 / Onslaught 1500 pts. No HARLEQUINS model can be WARLORD; cannot use the Corsairs army rule.

stratagems.name: Malicious Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit that has not shot or fought this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

mathBuff.note: [LETHAL HITS] (or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] — pick one).

stratagems.name: Fateful Role
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if it has not fought, roll one D6 (+1 if losing the wager): on a 4+, do not remove it; it fights after the attacking unit finishes, then is removed.

stratagems.name: Murderer's Circus
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit that was selected as a target.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Shorten the Odds
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit has Advanced.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Scintillating Tempo
stratagems.when: Your Movement or Charge phase, just after a DRUKHARI or HARLEQUINS unit is selected to move, is set up, or declares a charge.
stratagems.target: That unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at your unit.

stratagems.name: Dance Macabre
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One DRUKHARI INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6" (up to 6" if losing the wager).

enhancements.name: Thief of Secrets
enhancements.desc: **^^Adeptus Astartes^^** model only. Improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of a melee attack made by the bearer this phase, until the end of the battle, improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Beacon Angelis
enhancements.desc: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Osseus Key
enhancements.desc: WATCH MASTER or TECHMARINE model only. At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That model must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: The Tome of Ectoclades
enhancements.desc:
WATCH MASTER or CAPTAIN model only. Once per battle, after you have selected your Oath of Moment target, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select a second enemy unit to be an Oath of Moment target. 


**Designer’s Note:** *This means that each time a model with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets either of your Oath of Moment targets, you can re-roll the Hit roll.*

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Strategic Knowledge
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Watch Master
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

This model can be attached to the following units:

- FORTIS KILL TEAM

abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Champion
abilities.desc: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 1 wound remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:

default.name: Hellfire Extremis
default.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Devastating Wounds, Ignores Cover, Torrent

abilities.name: Blackstar Cluster Launcher
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or KILL TEAM models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

options.name: Auspex array
options.ability: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

options.name: Infernum halo-launcher
options.ability: The bearer has the SMOKE keyword.

abilities.name: Terminatus Assault
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Teleport Homer
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" of that token and not within 9" of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a TERMINATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

options.name: Cyclone Missile Launcher, Storm Bolter & Power Fist
Cyclone Missile Launcher, Storm Bolter & Chainfist
Cyclone Missile Launcher, Storm Bolter & Power Weapon

abilities.name: Fortis Doctrines
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, or makes a melee attack in a turn in which it made a Charge move, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army can be attached to a HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INFILTRATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead. 
If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step, that Leader unit gains the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

abilities.name: Spectrus Doctrines
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Keep the Banner High
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Terminator Squad
■ Terminator Assault Squad

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain, Chapter Master or Lieutenant model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Astartes Banner
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Surgical Precision
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Vivispectrum
abilities.desc: If this model’s unit destroys an enemy unit as the result of a melee attack, until the end of the battle, this model has an Objective Control characteristic of 9.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Aggressor Squad
■ Eradicator Squad
■ Heavy Intercessor Squad

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Shock Assault
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Ballistus Strike
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Deeds of Heroism
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this model is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad

You can attach this model to the above unit even if one Captain, Chapter Master or Lieutenant model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Astartes Banner
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Bladeguard
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following abilities to apply to models in this unit until the end of the phase:

■ Swords of the Imperium: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Shields of the Imperium: Each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in this unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

abilities.name: Brutalis Charge

If it does, after that enemy model’s unit has finished making its attacks, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

detData._format: Same shape as detachments.json. Each detachment has optional 'ruleName' + 'rule' (string), 'stratagems' (array), and a 'chapter' tag (Codex / Ultramarines / ImperialFists / IronHands / Salamanders / RavenGuard / WhiteScars / BloodAngels / DarkAngels / BlackTemplars / SpaceWolves / Deathwatch). Filtered per chapter via _SM_CHAPTER_TAGS. Stratagems may have optional 'mathBuff' for Mathhammer toggles.

Black Spear Task Force.rule:
RESTRICTIONS: ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH units only. Cannot include: Assault Squad / Attack Bike Squad / Devastator Squad / Land Speeder Storm / Relic Terminator Squad / Scout Bike Squad / Scout Squad / Scout Sniper Squad / Tactical Squad / Terminator Assault Squad / Terminator Squad / Vanguard Veteran Squad / Vanguard Veteran with Jump Packs (and a few others).

Mission Tactics: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Mission Tactics. Each can only be selected once per battle.

Furor — Weapons have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].
Malleus — Weapons have [LETHAL HITS].
Purgatus — If a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has [PRECISION].

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Tactics
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KILL TEAM units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: For each unit targeted, select Furor, Malleus or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Mission Tactic is active for that unit instead of any army-wide tactic.

stratagems.name: Hellfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] abilities. Cannot stack with Kraken or Dragonfire.

stratagems.name: Kraken Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve the Range characteristic of those weapons by 6".

mathBuff.note: +1 AP ranged for KILL TEAM. Cannot stack with Hellfire or Dragonfire.

stratagems.name: Dragonfire Rounds
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One KILL TEAM unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities. Cannot stack with Kraken or Hellfire.

stratagems.name: Site-to-site Teleportation
stratagems.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two KILL TEAM units, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Until the end of your next Movement phase, models without Deep Strike have Deep Strike.
